# Update from the Campaign Trail 7/15/22
Good evening,Congressman Chabot has been working hard. The Congressman made his way throughout Ohio's First Congressional district during the 4th of July weekend. He has also been making sure to pound the pavement and knock doors.Meanwhile, Greg Landsman has been making headlines but for all the wrong reasons. Landsman broke disclosure laws, hasn't paid his taxes, and continues to be a central figure in corruption cases.Read on for these updates and more. **_Congressman Chabot on the Trail_** _Congressman Chabot Knocking Doors_ Congressman Chabot has been working hard and bringing his message of lowering inflation, bringing down gas prices, and making sure we have safe neighborhoods directly to voters' doors. Keep an eye out for Congressman Chabot and his team in your neighborhood! _4th of July Celebrations_ Over the 4th of July weekend, Congressman Chabot made his way throughout Ohio's First Congressional District for a variety of celebrations. The Congressman and the campaign walked in parades in Lebanon, Anderson Township, and Loveland. The Congressman also attended celebrations in Blue Ash and Mason. It was great to see so many people out and about enjoying the holiday! **_Greg Landsman's no good, very bad week_** Greg Landsman has not had a very good few weeks. Landsman has been revealed to be a tax dodge, complicit (or too incompetent to notice his role) in one of the largest city council scandals in Cincinnati history, and someone who violates disclosure laws.**Tax-Hiking Dem Under Fire for Unpaid Taxes** "The state in March filed a tax lien against Greg Landsman, a Cincinnati councilman and Democratic candidate for a competitive House race, ordering him to pay interest on unpaid taxes he owes through his firm Landsman & Associates. But while Landsman struggles with tax delinquency, he voted over a four-year span on the Cincinnati City Council to raise taxes and fees at least eight times--even as he acknowledged that Ohio families were "struggling" with taxes." Read the full article [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyhhlydy-kujkulhluu-y/).**Democrat Candidate Broke Law Not Disclosing 'Senior' Role In Venture Fund, Watchdog Alleges**
"When one seeks an elected position, they have an affirmative duty to understand the laws and ensure they are in full compliance," Kendra Arnold, executive director of the Foundation for Accountability and Civic Trust (FACT), a group probing ethics that filed the complaint Wednesday, told the DCNF. "There is no excuse for failing to mention a position within an organization." Read the full article [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyhhlydy-kujkulhluu-j/).**Sittenfeld Trial Week 3 - Landsman's Vote Was "Shepherded" On Behalf Of Bribe Payers, Rather Than Cast For The Best Interests Of Cincinnati**
"The public heard directly from Greg Landsman's former colleague and co-conspirator in the Gang of Five scandal that he would 'shepherd the votes' of his fellow city councilors on behalf of corrupt special interests that paid bribes," said Chabot campaign manager John Gomez. "This further underscores revelations from earlier in the trial that demonstrate that by complicity or incompetence, Greg Landsman voted on the side of corrupt special interests rather than for the best interests of the people of Cincinnati -- while keeping associates implicated in the illegality close and personally benefiting from organizations involved in bribing public officials." Read more about Greg Landsman's corruption and why he should resign and drop out of the race [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyhhlydy-kujkulhluu-t/). _This Week 's Blog - "Next Target - Thomas Jefferson"_This week's blog is about the mob coming for Thomas Jefferson and his legacy:_" There are those in this country (the woke mob) who make it a practice to tear down the reputations of our founding fathers and leaders by insisting that their actions back then meet the standards of the 21st-century. And this is patently absurd."_Read the blog post [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyhhlydy-kujkulhluu-i/). Have a great weekend.Yours truly,John GomezCampaign Manager - Chabot for Congress [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyhhlydy-kujkulhluu-d/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyhhlydy-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyhhlydy-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyhhlydy-kujkulhluu-u/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyhhlydy-kujkulhluu-o/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyhhlydy-kujkulhluu-b/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-tyhhlydy-kujkulhluu-p/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-tyhhlydy-kujkulhluu-z/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-tyhhlydy-l-v) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. Hi there, **It’s Hannah — Ashley’s campaign manager.** I’m reaching out to you because we just had our finance team call, and we have a dilemma. We discussed our budget and priorities for the campaign. Right now, we’re trending to fall short of our goal for July. This could jeopardize our summer priority to invest heavily in a GOTV network of volunteers, supporters, advocates, and everyday Pennsylvanians across Bucks and Montgomery Counties. I know we send you a lot of emails. That’s because, unlike Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick, we can’t rely on big checks from wealthy donors and corporate PACs whenever the going gets tough. Instead, we have grassroots supporters like you who power the bulk of everything we do. **[I wouldn't ask unless it’s important. body:
|
---
| | | Peter, I signed a very limited number of copies of my new book, _Do What You Said You Would Do.

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one - so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight._As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies, and this is your only chance to grab one.
__
---
| | | [REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60813372:JcwokNVNX:m:1:3253819041:92611B43081F14E870F9BE857B17357A:r "REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60813372:JcwokNVNX:m:1:3253819041:92611B43081F14E870F9BE857B17357A:r)
---

**This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump 's successful four years as president.**

President Trump showed us how to win. He said he was going to cut taxes, he did. He said he was going to reduce regulations, he did. Do what you told them you were going to do. That's the model that works.

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60813372:JcwokNVNX:m:1:3253819041:92611B43081F14E870F9BE857B17357A:r "By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts
to take back our Conservative House Majority. ")**

Pelosi's targeting conservatives across America and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL, including dragging conservatives in ALL 50 states through the mud.

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I've signed won't last long, so order yours immediately.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60813372:JcwokNVNX:m:1:3253819041:92611B43081F14E870F9BE857B17357A:r "So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED
EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.")**

I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do.

**[Do you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60813372:JcwokNVNX:m:1:3253819041:92611B43081F14E870F9BE857B17357A:r "Do you?")**

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd81026gn7cm5hsqefcso9vf2pi1akhic736ken0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqn5dpnm5hn1o71e6qb5d716pp7atbmc5ir6opme8q34sb1e3j68dhmmso7bddgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6tj35cllm9jr4sr666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cljm9pr1cdj6aoh5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5ehlp413q28dt3ongpufdg71u1eg2e68rsmtnbg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm2or6clh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4d9d5dhin620q26n07t9fbn3kaospjcu4t780p8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm2or6clh2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjeopd4k8o9c877qjffqq3nd38peqas10o3dds0o_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm2or6clh2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47902323/356107962/281630052?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWFhZjM1NS0wNzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEkbeOhuzqC5txbV4NmiSM-kcrmsFWbspS93zTbXKFc=&emci=62438b55-7404-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=4aaaf355-0705-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=7377580)

| | Summer is here, Peter. When I was growing up, summer was my favorite season of the year. It's a time for BBQs and picnics, hiking the great outdoors, and hitting the beaches. **Peter, June was an awful month for progress.**

In the span of a few weeks, the nation’s highest court took away the right to choose from millions, made it EASIER to carry dangerous and deadly weapons in public, significantly weakened the Environmental Protection Agency’s ability to regulate fossil fuels, and more.

The harm that Americans everywhere, especially the vulnerable and voiceless, have already felt from these earth-shattering decisions is incomprehensible – but it could be just the beginning. **If Justice Thomas’ concurring opinion in Dobbs v. Jackson has told us anything, it’s that the rights that we once held to be indubitably protected – same-sex marriage, access to contraceptives, voting rights, and more – are now in danger. **

Peter, in this critical and decisive moment in our nation’s history, we MUST elect officials who will fight tirelessly for progress. I vow to never relent in my fight against the GOP’s extremist agenda and war on our rights, but I can only continue my work with _your_ help.

**Right now, I’m in the battle of my career against my GOP opponent and the exceptionally well-funded Republican Attorneys General Association, and I’m counting on this team of fearless fighters to help me secure victory. The stakes are too high to let a Republican attorney general take New York, so please:

[Will you rush a donation of $5 to my campaign for re-election now so I can continue my fight for New York for another four years?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47902553/356108578/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk579-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTU0MzMzNC0wNzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=49yZ4ZC7ZoNCT3h8J6BEMTQpeIITX5P5xz3cxVds6Pg=)**

Hello,
If you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. **Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump.**
As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices.
Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president.
Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. **My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation.

body:
Glenn Ivey’s campaign is fueled by a super PAC backed by two Republican billionaires that have a history of going after women-of-color and supporting anti-choice candidates.
Peter — my campaign is fueled by the people.
**Glenn Ivey’s campaign is fueled by a super PAC backed by two Republican billionaires that have a history of going after women-of-color and supporting anti-choice candidates.**
They’re scared of me because once in Congress, they know I will fight to make billionaires pay their fair share, fight for healthcare for all, fight to protect and expand abortion access, and fight for a green economy that works for everyone.
These dark money groups are pouring MILLIONS into trying to buy this election, Peter. We can’t risk our voices being drowned out in these final few days by these dark moneyed interests.
**[Please donate anything you can today so that I can fight for you in Congress tomorrow.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47903157/356110741/756633380?refcode=em071622_7milbump&refcode2=2f2c2ce2-0705-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTE2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjJjMmNlMi0wNzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQP7mS0lq2tunASs7o6mlPgsC_5y-e1YnlAtfr1djqg=)**
— Donna

_\------ Begin Forwarded Message ------_

Can you believe this, Peter?
Dark money groups just dropped**_another $1.7 MILLION_** __ against our campaign over the last two days.
**I’m honored that they’re so scared of a progressive woman-of-color winning that they’re willing to spend over $7 MILLION to try to bring me down.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47903159/356110743/756633380?refcode=em071622_7milbump&refcode2=2f2c2ce2-0705-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTE2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjJjMmNlMi0wNzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQP7mS0lq2tunASs7o6mlPgsC_5y-e1YnlAtfr1djqg=)
They’re trying to buy this election with millions of dollars in misinformation – **we need to show them we can’t be bought.**
**[Will you rush a grassroots donation today to show that the Fourth District can’t be bought?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47903161/356110745/756633380?refcode=em071622_7milbump&refcode2=2f2c2ce2-0705-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTE2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjJjMmNlMi0wNzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQP7mS0lq2tunASs7o6mlPgsC_5y-e1YnlAtfr1djqg=)**
| [RUSH A DONATION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47903162/356110748/756633380?refcode=em071622_7milbump&refcode2=2f2c2ce2-0705-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTE2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjJjMmNlMi0wNzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQP7mS0lq2tunASs7o6mlPgsC_5y-e1YnlAtfr1djqg=)

Grassroots support from Vermonters is what drives this campaign, and we always appreciate hearing from our supporters. **That’s why we were thrilled to see this Letter to the Editor endorsing Becca in _The Brattleboro Reformer:_** “Our democracy is in trouble. Now more than ever we need a representative in Washington who has the courage to stand up to the forces that imperil our democracy. That is a difficult job. We need a person with depth of life experience and professional skill. My choice is Becca Balint and I hope she will be your choice too.” **– Connie Baxter** **[SEND BECCA TO CONGRESS!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47903471/356112170/371725260?refcode=E17008-20220713-EndorsementWrap-SB-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTJmZTQwNy0wODA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ucgSUiXR3Itkcrvc8G9Hl4pt8F06wx2mTaCrIyxWs7c=)** Voters like Connie know Becca is the most capable candidate for the job. name: Michael Gordon
subject: Brandon needs your help!
body:
|
# You're invited!
---
---
We hope everyone can come out to Rome today! For those that plan on coming, it will be really helpful if you download the “i360 Walk” app before you arrive. Above is an example of what it will look like in the App Store! Please come help gather support for the next Congressman from NY22!

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd0c9dng6q2nneapnlk045b7f6pm6qukpv796tko_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdjmhjrcppledgn0opje2ojdd5h65rm4srn6pr68cllc1gr4dtn6dhj4dr1esrrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33cllmjg74tj66lhb6p9nm2qmash5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1dcikn4u7q9kdft4u3egqnpkbe6it2oe4oup510_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zecovcmkhjui3n671ibj9kviafbn4b1u2ufu8n9o_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zirl0ggfqibmnukp9gitc300letqc6h90gh7ekk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk74l4a6vuji3tvgusr4ssm5ujuaognpe2jud188_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2qadvtjo3qiut9r7cqsim47ihmdovgfd79b490o_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu53njog6jedimv3po65fm0s3f9c23avbo466edo_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp3orsr2m5gat1b6l8c22sfvac7as1igaigactig_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze8mg14stlidvitcj0injisl3l3oevkuvd28c5b8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4bbs56lsmpvm51tqpotr5ath03g69l0uhla1aoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6or23d0seao6jln58eudo8620ve3sora030a8bo_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh7sausovlad325qvccs1jhpupqgcrleau96q3s8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjpvq08m1oc6a66mpeciad16s5hk6tj9lu3gj1go_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeghqaadkubg5h7pk794p6qebjdeo6nps413iuvg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsm6ifnjdcj148aoaqg57bsijkqdghk8lvuortn8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlmqcujb3c7tv0nkfjg10uh19d5ucr5f6u64mtv0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zofi01u8085i3u4lhk5vr1al12d8rbal061jgqto_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgigsbgcms6s4kpqp1m8pc2lhishgb8ab8n1pim0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk13khnogh9hho5p2ialp07tn1kabppe8anencm0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg24um3tvl5fkkmreuj5ndn2j4r7e6n1fceovhmg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3lsj1v0086iqte9eso0li2lgt3qikel00sh2moo_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5eukl1qg6cin4jt0poi132cbgfvq5spcsttl8ho_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6cth2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zfic5a29g2a5m494m3si9betbb22v35cu4jkg1bo).

subject: 3-Minute Shower Hack Flushes Away Fungus In Seconds
body:
Who would’ve thought that something SO easy, like doing this in the shower for 3 minutes...
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfi1qcqast3aiim64gqe6uuh1bmnh5ccjtiqil48_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob7chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcothc8qn2pr7c1p6edr4s5qb5d1lm9pjac5km9qjeoj262rbcp35mtgm2tb6m3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor5ddks1p7cphlcaqr1ptgmlin49fg)

Could make that terrible itching and foul foot smell vanish almost overnight...
While also improving the health of your nails and skin...
All without using toxic pills, useless creams or gels that can ruin your skin even more.
Dermatologists are totally clueless about why **_[this shower hack](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjjm2b9jsaito83a9n3hg3r873mi0rh06ruaadj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob7chh2bs)_** works so perfectly.
But the fact that over 45,000 patients got rid of the foot fungus in a matter of days...
Makes it too good not to try at least once!

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: We need to fix our broken education system
body:
Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let thi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zloi1l10co0b2dbluvme253j92oabh7japauudeo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfat37c5qeco5hejiracjkemrm3d1ks6oe6c3j65i6dd30e3h3eolmcgq64ppgeurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor5ddks1p7cphlcapm8dtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdimep77cdgmcpb24no)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don't believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up--that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I've seen, this isn't always the case. [**However, I want to know what you 've seen.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhlml0p9dkn2huqmpjr07iukkr40r8a7rliof4o0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6clh2bs) [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7flcqojdbgjjr4b4osv358s5pp1fkbastmmgbo8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6clh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is "out of date" and needs to be "modernized." Progressives are rewriting our nation's history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I'm going to be meeting with political leaders and educational "experts" across the country. **I 'm going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools. ** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zndpija0513hd2suhii5cgaae8hb6j6r7eht58lg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6clh2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We're trying to gauge the state of America's Educational System by surveying people like you. I'd like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr26aotl7djk7iaruq6ig4pq997ek32rrk70m3gg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjjm6ob6clh2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---

Mitch McConnell has a plan for what he’ll do in 2023 if he takes back the Senate: Nothing. Nothing to help families, nothing to grow our economy, nothing to meet the needs of the American people — because if he can make sure nothing gets done, it would make President Biden look bad. McConnell’s plan is all politics, all obstruction, all the time. Sound familiar? Yep, because it’s the same play he ran against President Obama, including refusing to consider his Supreme Court nominee in 2016. We can’t let it happen again, but we’re going to have to fight, because our Democratic majority hangs by a thread. November will be here before we know it, and early investments make the biggest difference in tight races. >
Now, I get it: Even with Democratic control, everything hasn’t exactly been sunshine and rainbows. Even though we’ve taken big strides with the American Rescue Plan, and the Infrastructure Act, it’s bone-deep frustrating that we haven’t been able to protect voting rights or get climate action and child care over the finish line already.
But the answer isn’t to give up.
There’s one way to make it easier to get more done: expand our Democratic majorities.
And there’s one way to guarantee that NOTHING else gets done: hang back and watch Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy grab the reins.
A Democratic Congress — with stronger majorities, and more members who understand what working families need — means we have a chance to keep up the fight. A chance to level the playing field for families. A chance to protect our democracy.
So here’s my plan: I’m going to spend the rest of 2022 fighting to get as much done as possible with the Congress we have now, and working to elect more Warren Democrats up and down the ballot so we can expand our majorities and get more on the table.
But our success is going to come down to grassroots organizing and grassroots fundraising in the next few months.
[_**So I have to ask: If it makes sense for you right now, can you make a donation to help support our campaign and grow our movement?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47906622/356125240/921386962?refcode=EMZ6R_GOP_20220715_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjYyZWU4NS0wYzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GfwvwVVLTsqPqRrB_36Ihyyi421VgeZDXAOtE8ZzgGo=)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

clean_body: He’s got a plan for 2023, and it boils down to one word. | | | Mitch McConnell has a plan for what he’ll do in 2023 if he takes back the Senate: Nothing. Nothing to help families, nothing to grow our economy, nothing to meet the needs of the American people — because if he can make sure nothing gets done, it would make President Biden look bad. McConnell’s plan is all politics, all obstruction, all the time. Sound familiar? Yep, because it’s the same play he ran against President Obama, including refusing to consider his Supreme Court nominee in 2016. We can’t let it happen again, but we’re going to have to fight, because our Democratic majority hangs by a thread. | | | This is Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis.

Peter, the pandemic has changed the world as we know it. But what will _never _change: **Our inalienable American rights.**
---
**Unfortunately:** Liberals _never_ let a crisis go to waste. State Democrats and the Biden Administration have used this crisis as a TROJAN HORSE to _trample_ our rights, and as a means to turn America into a socialist country.
---
| | | ❌Vaccine passports

❌Business shutdowns

❌Mask mandates for _children_

---
| ❌Big Tech censorship

❌Woke curriculum in our schools

❌Unemployment & inflation
---
But this Pandemic Power-Grab only targets _real Americans_. The rules don't apply to liberal elites at the Met Gala, illegal migrants flooding our border, or rioters at BLM protests.

**Fortunately: State Republicans are taking matters into our own hands.**
**[CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR STATES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60813877:JiVG6NVyN:m:1:3317145305:2208D8314A0B3F13C64636065160D7E9:r "CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR STATES")**
While other states have closed schools, businesses and churches--trampling citizens' personal freedoms--Florida and Conservative state leaders remain the LAST line of defense, safeguarding the Constitutional rights guaranteed to all Americans.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A pledge to protect the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. |
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9bf307bb8974b688832c346fbe90db9&_e=Ti54pCbMB2tyRwn4sU6cAaQZCwAZIPmOTsYRNiAD8BkbHVGeLvCyLlPFBq3IejZy8VsCSc7TTqfueRACizTFWDrzwAKx8wi7Ou02lpIeJgoh67JPrkOiFdGDVycApiDS6sRcFwMMTSo0wzI1PECGuOU4jCt3vrLPyP7EbCGf9cUE4zMUd5jCcaDDktdATXzDDXFL2AivpgYMM9S1L3LGqZ6oTZtoVx2Y0GvFPTI_YVmT_UWfH4FrPvjvyJfWeHrYAABAYLLWFgwB2jqaLkM0VSKnqu8ecKNTvO29s9ahA04a9Mh-kzG-6Rtbj03dJaZ6M_RSDa-Ou9jRbhvfZ9_Af7oqcJ22LONQtC9AlbHQ0Fdw8KJWlsoJQsKm9moqdu2y__7-AISBrwSZJWX483QA_Quu2jNkvinlKxDI3MlKlE4xKvdAHFRigrG5eRAbhcO9)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9bf307bb8974b688832c346fbe90db9&_e=Ti54pCbMB2tyRwn4sU6cAaQZCwAZIPmOTsYRNiAD8BkbHVGeLvCyLlPFBq3IejZy8VsCSc7TTqfueRACizTFWDrzwAKx8wi7Ou02lpIeJgoh67JPrkOiFdGDVycApiDS6sRcFwMMTSo0wzI1PECGuOU4jCt3vrLPyP7EbCGf9cUE4zMUd5jCcaDDktdATXzDDXFL2AivpgYMM9S1L3LGqZ6oTZtoVx2Y0GvFPTI_YVliMpWXbhV9pES7AAQkRDADUL0fM7QDXmECcHHdw7E3Fo1Ui89biEmD80UMk8ZKSvqVMECUJVnFrvVPomj8KkJ5ulDGHiqXidLI4Uj-2N1dCfVNYYhHhbM8URGZl-ziHhNQNO2q_4pJ1RtzvxAvFEGgn0klzqzUhPsDbtUAimj8Fsa9UFIaXf1ya9vgGE4gnEgwjOrnW8FKZf-j2mjSYHuI) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9bf307bb8974b688832c346fbe90db9&_e=Ti54pCbMB2tyRwn4sU6cAaQZCwAZIPmOTsYRNiAD8BkbHVGeLvCyLlPFBq3IejZy8VsCSc7TTqfueRACizTFWDrzwAKx8wi7Ou02lpIeJgoh67JPrkOiFdGDVycApiDS6sRcFwMMTSo0wzI1PECGuOU4jCt3vrLPyP7EbCGf9cUE4zMUd5jCcaDDktdATXzDDXFL2AivpgYMM9S1L3LGqZ6oTZtoVx2Y0GvFPTI_YVnVgTbCt1_RbVkBFtyPfI-yg-saFwLU_ULiqOHQjQzwWBNpYHMdVzrRYWBosAXvoodOcelCK5l8JKQS7LdWe_npgII0osAN922pXv7FuowgPFzt9bu68yX928rZ1Rjt0s65txkM3YPZA_0wqudBPSP2YdZ-mWBv0oaY4VcAdgly6Gnd5CApUqqU8AqZGghvlIui_5zB64R6qLWddsAd1H6_) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

Team,

Maintaining a Democratic majority is essential to ensuring the future of our country is bright. Unlike the GOP, Democrats work to ensure the right to vote, equitable access to healthcare, our climate, and more are protected.

If the GOP takes over in November, our rights are on the line. A Republican majority threatens to undo all the progress we have worked so hard to make. We cannot let them secure any victories this Election Day.

Unlike the GOP, Democrats work to ensure the right to vote, equitable access to healthcare, our climate, and more are protected. If the GOP takes over in November, our rights are on the line. A Republican majority threatens to undo all the progress we have worked so hard to make. We cannot let them secure any victories this Election Day. Bonnie’s critical FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is TONIGHT at midnight. We’re only $1,999 away from closing our budget gap to help Democrats keep their majority in the House. We need to protect our progress, your help is crucial. Can you rush a $10 donation right now? Friend, I have an urgent update:
**My opponent, Herschel Walker (R), just announced that he's raised over $16 MILLION to defeat me and take back the Senate for Republicans.**
**Even worse, Mitch McConnell's super PAC is gearing up to _blanket the airwaves_ in Georgia with a new MULTI-MILLION-DOLLAR ad buy. You can bet the GOP will attack me with everything they have.**
With recent polls showing me 1 point down, this surge in Republican spending could put us at a major disadvantage. Senate control is at stake in this race – and if we fail to fight back now, we could fall even further behind.
**That's why we set a rapid-response goal to raise $50,000 by our mid-month deadline to pull ahead and WIN. But time is running out, and we're still coming up short. Please, friend, I'm counting on you:**

Dear Peter, **It's Ben Jones here, Dr. Jason Martin's deputy campaign manager.** I handle Dr. Martin's day-to-day schedule as well as, ensuring our message and campaign reaches as many voters as possible. **In the weeks leading up to the August 4th primary, I've planned a schedule to take us all across the state and back.**[(Find those events here.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47910507/356140030/442522745?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODk0YWMwOC0xMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6a6M4kDTnivtjtfUvUtUxVDObFb8rT39KSDxOqHJyw=&emci=f54b7729-0e05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=4894ac08-1105-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9304149)**** Yesterday, early voting began and we spoke to directly to more than 60,000 voters. Now that Roe v. Wade has been overturned, the stakes of this race have never been higher.

name: Melanie =?utf-8?b?ROKAmUFycmlnbw==?=
subject: New Yorkers are prepared to change the status quo, and I’m here to do just that.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists)
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47910832/356141398/-1051679664?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220716mm2_md_od_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGVhOWJhZS0xMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Amxh2QqBIWyPOImyvoYwFeUXm14oEZtESnO7PasySSw=)
---
Hey Peter Willis,
I don’t need to tell you how much is on the line this November; I need you to know there is no limit to what we can do together.
The people of New York are ready to guarantee high-quality health care through Medicare for All, create a clean energy future through the Green New Deal, protect reproductive rights, ensure dignity for workers, and more.
New Yorkers are prepared to change the status quo, and I’m here to do just that.

clean_body: | | = Hey Peter Willis, I don’t need to tell you how much is on the line this November; I need you to know there is no limit to what we can do together. The people of New York are ready to guarantee high-quality health care through Medicare for All, create a clean energy future through the Green New Deal, protect reproductive rights, ensure dignity for workers, and more. New Yorkers are prepared to change the status quo, and I’m here to do just that. If we want to build a New York for the many, we need to elect representatives who are unbought by corporate PAC money and undeterred in the fight for working families. That's exactly why we need your help and why our movement needs to step up now when it matters most.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = I know I talk a lot about these fundraising goals we set, especially when it comes to emails like this one. Dear Friends, This week, news broke that Indiana’s Republican Attorney General is considering criminal charges against a doctor who performed an abortion for a 10-year-old sexual assault victim who traveled to Indiana for the procedure. **This is the consequence of the Supreme Court decision. And if we don’t guarantee abortion rights at the federal level, we could soon hear the same stories in Florida. ** I’m heartbroken by the stories we’ve heard since _Roe_ was overturned. Women who were turned away from abortion clinics shortly after the decision came down. Cruel Republicans want to make it even more challenging for those who have endured unimaginable trauma to access reproductive healthcare. Right-wing radicals considering total abortion bans in Florida and across the country. [**We have to fight back. That’s why I am once again asking the Senate to bypass the filibuster to protect abortion rights. If you agree, click here to add your name.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47910995/356141962/1455029116?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2IxMjlmNi0xMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kc78gU5iilXKh1A4m8ufyKp-qNx404p6paVDoLjqbJo=&emci=11ecd217-6e04-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=67b129f6-1105-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6576167)

| | From passing landmark gun violence prevention legislation to fighting COVID-19 and delivering vaccines, I’ve never shied away from tackling the biggest and most complex challenges we face. I have no intention of backing down this time either. I stand proudly with women and all other Americans fighting to ensure that access to abortion is guaranteed nationwide by fixing the mess the GOP's Supreme Court has handed us. [**I know we’re all together on this issue, so please, click here to add your name to the fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47910997/356141964/1455029116?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2IxMjlmNi0xMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kc78gU5iilXKh1A4m8ufyKp-qNx404p6paVDoLjqbJo=&emci=11ecd217-6e04-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=67b129f6-1105-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6576167)

In Solidarity,

Jared

clean_body: We need to defend reproductive rights now | | | We need to defend reproductive rights now | | Dear Friends, This week, news broke that Indiana’s Republican Attorney General is considering criminal charges against a doctor who performed an abortion for a 10-year-old sexual assault victim who traveled to Indiana for the procedure. This is the consequence of the Supreme Court decision. And if we don’t guarantee abortion rights at the federal level, we could soon hear the same stories in Florida. I’m heartbroken by the stories we’ve heard since Roe was overturned. Women who were turned away from abortion clinics shortly after the decision came down. Cruel Republicans want to make it even more challenging for those who have endured unimaginable trauma to access reproductive healthcare. Right-wing radicals considering total abortion bans in Florida and across the country. | | From passing landmark gun violence prevention legislation to fighting COVID-19 and delivering vaccines, I’ve never shied away from tackling the biggest and most complex challenges we face. I have no intention of backing down this time either. I stand proudly with women and all other Americans fighting to ensure that access to abortion is guaranteed nationwide by fixing the mess the GOP's Supreme Court has handed us. In Solidarity, Jared Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress Jared Moskowitz for Congress PO Box 8784 Coral Springs, FL 33065 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
As a diplomat in the Obama administration, Tom Malinowski stood up to dictators overseas. Now experts say his re-election could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.malinowskifornj.com/p/Bix_Do8Sr0m0vj5sQl0SCA2?unsubscribedata=vec8LhFA6LYonPPhLeBIv7akeyVmOYXAVSE%2B4hIQzgv1wCh%2B%2BVz7EVG7MtptSBXMiI7T72evhwTwOo%2Fw4JnkwED9JxPJJOXf7x4DlXUGndVde3gkNLbzTf4LvFnUzGP5ucX3qu%2BMFl4pVnZhmzUU3swipAzbiCj%2B2uj%2F0M9wU3ZTryltSJYLWrKo1p9i0Id5EyxXkvrRV79tOnYrZPo5ZpobnkQPVQVlacU0PWB%2Ffg9lzOYHlzWuqt7UxqKDzIuB5MtJ094kwHmGWVMWa3T1NAgALAbMRpfo7wAHA5GBqmxsZaCA1ieUoEK3%2Fp46rygiDCVJI4QHmrK8vKV23JhJ0U4toe9fCw7%2B%2BZ4zNslt7BbSAJryBqCdtPbjZHWp%2Bso%2Bhh%2B6BXS2wF6AIVvWUmqn2NktI3K35AweTCtrMDqj05zlVZTvGBX64vZtusH8OVdG)

| |

Team, we’re reaching out to our Team Tom community to sound the alarm.

The GOP is _relentlessly_ targeting Tom’s seat, team. _They’re pouring in Super PAC money, doing their damnedest to tarnish Tom’s record, and using inflammatory tactics to rile up far-right voters on behalf of Tom’s opponent._ If they succeed in sending do-nothing politician Tom Kean Jr. to Congress, New Jerseyans will be stuck with a spineless, pandering coward — who refuses to condemn the insurrection and runs away from any discussion of January 6.

We cannot let them win, ever. Not when our House majority — and the fate of our democracy — hangs in the balance. But with less than four months left till Election Day, we’re running out of time to defend this seat.

[If you’re able to make a contribution today, your support will help us continue fighting tooth and nail to reelect Tom. You can chip in at this link:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47911400/356143387/-1267168966?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220716_1_2&refcode2=be9597a9-1205-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTk1OTdhOS0xMjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6ac4k_nByc-mj1hrX4ViSqmmhe26faapz-fXBP-8Yc=)

[https://act.malinowskifornj.com/a/july-donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47911401/356143388/-1267168966?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220716_1_2&refcode2=be9597a9-1205-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTk1OTdhOS0xMjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6ac4k_nByc-mj1hrX4ViSqmmhe26faapz-fXBP-8Yc=)

It is true, Tom is a steadfast, stalwart, principled leader who tells it like it is, and never backs down from a tough fight on behalf of New Jerseyans. **And that’s why the GOP is TERRIFIED of Tom — because for a party that relies on misinformation and lies, Tom’s commitment to the truth is an existential threat.** Extremist GOP leaders are desperate to flip his seat in their effort to take back Congress — because they know that Tom will never stop using his platform to hold them accountable.

Tom’s race is truly one of the most important elections in the country, team. There’s a very good chance that if we hold this seat, we will protect our entire Democratic majority in Congress, and our democracy with it. And as tough as this battle is, we know it’s one we can’t afford to lose.

[Team, we’re not backing down. And we need you with us. Will you rush $10 or whatever you can to our Stand with Tom Fund? You’ll support crucial work in this final, critical stage — from reaching out to new constituents and bringing them on board, to gearing up for a MASSIVE voter turnout effort:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47911402/356143389/-1267168966?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220716_1_2&refcode2=be9597a9-1205-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTk1OTdhOS0xMjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6ac4k_nByc-mj1hrX4ViSqmmhe26faapz-fXBP-8Yc=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Team, we’re reaching out to our Team Tom community to sound the alarm. The GOP is relentlessly targeting Tom’s seat, team. They’re pouring in Super PAC money, doing their damnedest to tarnish Tom’s record, and using inflammatory tactics to rile up far-right voters on behalf of Tom’s opponent. If they succeed in sending do-nothing politician Tom Kean Jr. to Congress, New Jerseyans will be stuck with a spineless, pandering coward — who refuses to condemn the insurrection and runs away from any discussion of January 6. We cannot let them win, ever. Not when our House majority — and the fate of our democracy — hangs in the balance. But with less than four months left till Election Day, we’re running out of time to defend this seat. = = It is true, Tom is a steadfast, stalwart, principled leader who tells it like it is, and never backs down from a tough fight on behalf of New Jerseyans. And that’s why the GOP is TERRIFIED of Tom — because for a party that relies on misinformation and lies, Tom’s commitment to the truth is an existential threat. Extremist GOP leaders are desperate to flip his seat in their effort to take back Congress — because they know that Tom will never stop using his platform to hold them accountable. Tom’s race is truly one of the most important elections in the country, team. There’s a very good chance that if we hold this seat, we will protect our entire Democratic majority in Congress, and our democracy with it. And as tough as this battle is, we know it’s one we can’t afford to lose. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks so much, Team Malinowski * | Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Biden's Trojan horse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | This is Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis.

Peter, the pandemic has changed the world as we know it. But what will _never _change: **Our inalienable American rights.**
---
**Unfortunately:** Liberals _never_ let a crisis go to waste. State Democrats and the Biden Administration have used this crisis as a TROJAN HORSE to _trample_ our rights, and as a means to turn America into a socialist country.
---
| | | ❌Vaccine passports

❌Business shutdowns

❌Mask mandates for _children_

---
| ❌Big Tech censorship

❌Woke curriculum in our schools

❌Unemployment & inflation
---
But this Pandemic Power-Grab only targets _real Americans_. The rules don't apply to liberal elites at the Met Gala, illegal migrants flooding our border, or rioters at BLM protests.

**Fortunately: State Republicans are taking matters into our own hands.**
**[CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR STATES](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60813869:6mecpNVNr:m:1:3253819041:F97E4DF282C86CDBE0B5D3EAB157EEB1:r "CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR STATES")**
While other states have closed schools, businesses and churches--trampling citizens' personal freedoms--Florida and Conservative state leaders remain the LAST line of defense, safeguarding the Constitutional rights guaranteed to all Americans.

Peter, America can never be allowed to become a woke, leftist utopia -- **[which is why we must act NOW to save our states before it's too late.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60813870:6mecpNVNr:m:1:3253819041:F97E4DF282C86CDBE0B5D3EAB157EEB1:r "which is why we

Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I introduced legislation to crack down on the abuses of our asylum system that have led to the worst illegal immigration crisis in decades. I also called out Joe Biden for degrading our Border Patrol by lying about their treatment of illegal immigrants and passed legislation that would allow active duty service members to stay in uniform while they seek proven psychedelic treatment for PTSD.
As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief:
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| REAL SOLUTIONS
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UGE2B1EzJGCsxI5c4eCMDE7Fcm-xB_2EmDzF8LRYFNx6WKJeK2NSP_LHYGx8AVjsXv54JPt50vchpI-yHSJCu4CFGjOjDs_NP8Ok-pUnsV6XgdZkZMFk1-dirBSrTiu1F1MOOiXmk9HkcgbUrL7rig-MAIKRfHv_q3CuAWMSoBvkpOrv-2u_6w2QhCX3BvgLmppn0nPWPNTg2HEYFkUhUJPY7m0gEfuyikWwynsb-oUczqVmHx0l7rHM0ziuByCUlGLExoQgCro=&c=4Ge3CyHn2ILNk4Olkb7zpv_y4rhaKE-RcxZ0VaHghNJtrQDSGcnj_g==&ch=G35d7faDLrb0yNTAkNMt9E581H7A8B24VPcXH-jya_9KWOqYeGd1KQ==)

| America's asylum process is fundamentally broken. Everyone knows it, including the cartels, who are coaching illegal immigrants on how to exploit loopholes, contributing to the worst border crisis in decades.
That's why I introduced legislation to get at the root of this problem.
My bill closes those loopholes and prevents abuse by mandating asylum be made at a port of entry, prohibiting anyone who illegally entered the United States from claiming asylum after the fact, and establishing offices so migrants can claim asylum in a third country before they reach our borders.
It's just one of several practical solutions I will be introducing in the coming weeks to address the crisis at our southern border.
But ultimately, we cannot begin to address this border crisis while Nancy Pelosi is Speaker of the House. That's why I'm devoting all of my energy to taking back the House of Representatives, firing Speaker Pelosi, and replacing every Democrat who has enabled or ignored this border crisis with conservatives who care about America's sovereignty and security on our southern border.
[If you want to help me accomplish that mission, please donate to my campaign here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UGE2B1EzJGCsxI5c4eCMDE7Fcm-xB_2EmDzF8LRYFNx6WKJeK2NSP_LHYGx8AVjsXPESp2kQhQNeNBFB0wP4iRUWohJ-RZTAQnfmCgplnt17k3IBqA0DArCgq8-SV4_02dfnHMg-Y3UnCpHrviUVUEgIp6xcwTxDK1j9x6XcyjHvQv1x6mbWU-OdIlqE8GINcMSwAF55iTMbCa6WZkFyOecbpH-lT6sfBicPfFbaK8NTyllPuHJqgg6niBef7kW0K3jje6rl_jfwdnhu4K__FcTdEMcLVw0D72coTmBmYEfO5GNHQCqMDrj127_O5UZ6_rscJbMWw7B012t1CEsliuHBONlGcBzBcdbWYmdDT0E=&c=4Ge3CyHn2ILNk4Olkb7zpv_y4rhaKE-RcxZ0VaHghNJtrQDSGcnj_g==&ch=G35d7faDLrb0yNTAkNMt9E581H7A8B24VPcXH-jya_9KWOqYeGd1KQ==)

| Remember this?
"I promise you those people will pay. There will be consequences ... It's dangerous, it's wrong. It sends the wrong message around the world, it sends the wrong message at home. It's simply not who we are."
What about this?
"As we all know it evoked images of some of the worst moments of our history where that kind of behavior has been used against the indigenous people of our country, has been used against African Americans during times of slavery."
That was Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, respectively, lying about the actions of Border Patrol agents doing their jobs to stop a flood of illegal immigrants from crossing into our country.
Well, it seems like Jussie Smollett is advising the Biden White House now. Because just as Jussie Smollett lied about Trump supporters assaulting him in the middle of the night in Chicago, Biden and Harris lied about Border Patrol "whipping" illegal immigrants.
Yep, the Biden administration admitted that Border Patrol agents were falsely accused of "whipping" Haitian migrants in Texas last year. But they were punished anyways for "foul language" and using horses to stop illegal immigrants from crossing our border.
It's no wonder the morale of our Border Patrol agents is the lowest it's been in recent memory. This administration does nothing but degrade law enforcement at our border and encourage the rampant illegal immigration that makes their jobs impossible.
It's time for Joe to apologize.
[SIGN THE PETITION. TELL JOE BIDEN TO APOLOGIZE TO BORDER PATROL AGENTS FOR HIS LIES](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UGE2B1EzJGCsxI5c4eCMDE7Fcm-xB_2EmDzF8LRYFNx6WKJeK2NSP_LHYGx8AVjsxNS65aKM8oReMYWd0p-9lnimrlYuCEEN2SmdKAQ6WzUxS7z_r6fXdI8Rs3thV4ZhMvWgk8m4yzdaeY2AGeUbns-lFUzOl5MRUoxtaeWibbjpZdoF2MDecjBSq8qlFV3eUnM3VSi9e3iQERDizN_ipeFwCqAPll1FHRNBITkl9jq94UTdfcpTYegD9J-80UM2Xs4Otxjgp0s9C5WqPcL-ZPgucInmOxGHx9l5YRfDkAxm9iJ_kMLDk0yn6ZDC9k6bK_qAxhreHUl2Oqx9kuu7CiSqOQXYyTOx&c=4Ge3CyHn2ILNk4Olkb7zpv_y4rhaKE-RcxZ0VaHghNJtrQDSGcnj_g==&ch=G35d7faDLrb0yNTAkNMt9E581H7A8B24VPcXH-jya_9KWOqYeGd1KQ==)

| We are in an uphill battle against PTSD among our veterans and active duty service members. Nearly 30% of post-9/11 veterans are diagnosed with PTSD, which can lead to suicide and other serious mental health challenges.
That's why we should use every tool in our toolbox to win this fight. One of those tools might come as a shock to you: the use of psychedelics.
Now I know hearing the word "psychedelics" might make you think of acid trips from the 60s. But that's not what we're talking about here.
What we're talking about is a scientific, proven use of psychedelics to treat PTSD. Research in the private sector has shown that, following the use of MDMA, 88% of trial participants show significant reduction of PTSD symptoms and 67% no longer had PTSD. Those are incredible results.
Unfortunately, under current law, active duty service members cannot stay in uniform while seeking psychedelic treatment for PTSD. That's why I introduced legislation that passed the House this week to provide a grant program for active duty service members to seek psychedelics treatment for PTSD while remaining in uniform.
This is a small step in the right direction to get help to the men and women who have sacrificed dearly for our country.
Watch the video above to learn more.

My bill closes those loopholes and prevents abuse by mandating asylum be made at a port of entry, prohibiting anyone who illegally entered the United States from claiming asylum after the fact, and establishing offices so migrants can claim asylum in a third country before they reach our borders. It's just one of several practical solutions I will be introducing in the coming weeks to address the crisis at our southern border. But ultimately, we cannot begin to address this border crisis while Nancy Pelosi is Speaker of the House. That's why I'm devoting all of my energy to taking back the House of Representatives, firing Speaker Pelosi, and replacing every Democrat who has enabled or ignored this border crisis with conservatives who care about America's sovereignty and security on our southern border. == | | | | | | | | IS JUSSIE SMOLLET ADVISING JOE BIDEN? | | | == | == | | | Remember this? "I promise you those people will pay. There will be consequences ... It's dangerous, it's wrong. It sends the wrong message around the world, it sends the wrong message at home. It's simply not who we are." What about this? "As we all know it evoked images of some of the worst moments of our history where that kind of behavior has been used against the indigenous people of our country, has been used against African Americans during times of slavery." That was Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, respectively, lying about the actions of Border Patrol agents doing their jobs to stop a flood of illegal immigrants from crossing into our country. Well, it seems like Jussie Smollett is advising the Biden White House now. Because just as Jussie Smollett lied about Trump supporters assaulting him in the middle of the night in Chicago, Biden and Harris lied about Border Patrol "whipping" illegal immigrants. Yep, the Biden administration admitted that Border Patrol agents were falsely accused of "whipping" Haitian migrants in Texas last year. But they were punished anyways for "foul language" and using horses to stop illegal immigrants from crossing our border. It's no wonder the morale of our Border Patrol agents is the lowest it's been in recent memory. This administration does nothing but degrade law enforcement at our border and encourage the rampant illegal immigration that makes their jobs impossible. It's time for Joe to apologize. == | | | | | | | | THINKING OUTSIDE THE BOX TO HELP OUR SERVICE MEMBERS | | | == | == | We are in an uphill battle against PTSD among our veterans and active duty service members. Nearly 30% of post-9/11 veterans are diagnosed with PTSD, which can lead to suicide and other serious mental health challenges. That's why we should use every tool in our toolbox to win this fight. One of those tools might come as a shock to you: the use of psychedelics. Now I know hearing the word "psychedelics" might make you think of acid trips from the 60s. But that's not what we're talking about here. What we're talking about is a scientific, proven use of psychedelics to treat PTSD. Research in the private sector has shown that, following the use of MDMA, 88% of trial participants show significant reduction of PTSD symptoms and 67% no longer had PTSD. Those are incredible results. Unfortunately, under current law, active duty service members cannot stay in uniform while seeking psychedelic treatment for PTSD. That's why I introduced legislation that passed the House this week to provide a grant program for active duty service members to seek psychedelics treatment for PTSD while remaining in uniform. This is a small step in the right direction to get help to the men and women who have sacrificed dearly for our country. Watch the video above to learn more. | | | | | | | | On Social Media | == | == | | | == | | | | | | | | | | Weekend Reads | NATIONAL REVIEW: == FOX NEWS: == DAILY WIRE: == | | | Thank you for reading! Have a great weekend. Governor DeSantis is the first Republican Governor in 20 years to earn the endorsement of the Florida Professional Firefighters. The Governor's endorsement was _**unanimous.**_

Governor DeSantis leads the state of Florida every day with this in mind, and protects your rights as a parent to do what's best for your own children." - First Lady Casey DeSantis**_

This week, _**[SBA Pro-Life America endorsed the Governor](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b504e65ec86eaf56d84efb3adf0093f82b3382a8332978bbb5c8d96c2efd76fe4671f23bf7888a2c961582579bb1edad64f6c6c75b8f6e9d4dcd42e4b82e8691 "SBA Pro-Life America endorsed the Governor")**_ for his strong leadership saying, _**" he continues to stand up for the people's right to enact their values in the law."**_

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rochelle Garza for Texas
body:
I will not sit by while he turns this state into a morgue.
| Friend, **This week, Ken Paxton made something abundantly clear: He views women’s lives as disposable.** | _“Texas Sues Biden Administration Over Access to Emergency Medical Abortions”_

\- _The New York Times_
---
In suing the Biden Administration to block abortions in the case of medical emergency, Paxton is choosing to _kill Texas women_ to fulfill his extremist agenda.
What he’s advocating for is femicide — the intentional killing of women by withholding life-saving care. This lawsuit does not reflect Texans’ values. **Across the country and even here in Texas, Americans agree that at least some abortions _should be legal._**
**[Friend, I will not sit by while Ken Paxton turns this state into a morgue. As Attorney General, I will keep Texans safe, and that means ensuring that everyone has access to essential medical procedures, including abortions. name: ICYMI News
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3v6djgap97bt2df1uvua4mphpmp21j9rn5so6do_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrmeo3mm5pbdd5ieuqmfd3j6mqe8p9nclieaotgm5rr1chkmpoe3d30eiob8o5n6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pbbd77mthmcc9gmdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933cljm9o76cdh66oh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd2m7geurrd99j5adjsni62df14j23kadkbfpeqg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgecor2cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zic53j39jbru32bvvff0f1as7vs1uf8ljebbks0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgecor2cdh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoaor376ndg0o5rjvib1nv5nf0njqf110hn7c7fo_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgecor2cdh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zbkvd15ifk5gl6j0cfmake5lbdl0h8g3muob7bg8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: It’s not an exaggeration to say this election is going to be one of the most important ones in a generation. | | = Peter, We’ll be blunt: Our fundraising has slowed down in the last few days. This is not what we wanted to tell you with less than four weeks until our August 9 primary. = = This fall, we must defeat Ron Johnson. It’s not an exaggeration to say this election is going to be one of the most important ones in a generation. Ron Johnson has committed a laundry list of dangerous acts that make him unfit to be a Senator, including trying to personally hand fake slates of electors from Wisconsin and Michigan to Mike Pence. We can defeat him, but we’re going to need everyone to get it done. Ron Johnson is going to be very well funded by his special interest backers, and we need to show that our grassroots-powered team has what it takes to win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Will your Secretary of State be a Jan. 6th insurrectionist? Republicans are coming to steal elections, and your Secretary of State is your main line of defense for preserving election integrity.
body:
Insurrectionists want to run our state elections, but they shouldn’t
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, your state’s Secretary of State is the first line of defense when it comes to election integrity. Especially this year, because ... **Insurrectionists are still agitating to steal our elections, and some of them are campaigning to be Secretaries of State.** **[Will you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, so we can ensure that in 2024 we have someone setting up the electoral process and counting votes in each key state who believes in democracy?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta494b4c3-f4a5-4125-bad1-d5a589a29371/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** During the shocking Jan. 6th hearings, we found that Donald Trump, Mark Meadows, Ted Cruz, Josh Hawley and dozens of House members, state legislators, governors and other officials **told the deadly lie ****that Donald Trump won the election enough times that it inspired people to commit acts of vandalism, violence and treason.** Two of these individuals, de-programmed, as if from a cult, talked about why they attacked the Capitol on January 6th, 2020, why they were there, what they believed, and what they intended to do. And it all came down to one very simple fact: If they had not been lied to by Republicans day in and day out--the very Republicans who are still inciting riot every day by lying about this election--then January 6th would not have happened. A dozen or so House members were revealed to have met with Donald Trump to plan the coup, likely leading to criminal liability for them. Yet, some of them and various other **_GOP officials are now running for positions where they will have control of state election machinery. _**For example, one of these coup plotters, Jody Hice of Georgia, was running for Secretary of State (SoS) in a primary vs Republican Brad Raffensberger, who stood up to Trump's calls for stealing votes.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: DEMOCRATIC ASSOCIATION OF SECRETARIES OF STATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd7b9861-7e37-4cd4-bc69-4004c13c8b4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Luckily, Hice lost in the primary. But we weren't so lucky in other states. Some primaries have not yet taken place, and in some states, Republicans who claim Trump won the 2020 election are their party's nominee. **_We must defeat these democracy arsonists if we are to keep our democratic republic._** **_The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State helps elect Democrats Secretary of State in all states where this is an electoral position._** **_We absolutely must help them if we're to prevent Republicans who perverted our electoral process in 2020--but failed to overthrow our government--from succeeding when they inevitably try the same exact thing in 2024._** If we let these fascistic Republican lunatics win this important position in key states, we're as good as done. **[Will you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, so we can ensure that in 2024 we have someone setting up the electoral process and counting votes in each key state who believes in democracy?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T09f6d278-0ef3-4161-95d5-0ca0453f0cb6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thank you so much for protecting our elections. Cliff

Instead, they chose to squawk at me for not blindly following the radical abortion agenda championed by over-educated, under-loved Millenials...
They don't like it when you ask questions about their radical schemes.
