body:
Over the past few days, my team has been reaching out about my opponent, Ashley Hinson. Hinson has repeatedly acted against the best interests of her constituents, and we are working hard every day to get our message out across our district and make sure everyone knows about her hypocrisy.
Hi Peter, it's Liz. Over the past few days, my team has been reaching out about my opponent, Ashley Hinson. Hinson has repeatedly acted against the best interests of her constituents, and we are working hard every day to get our message out across our district and make sure everyone knows about her hypocrisy. **Peter, she ****even recently introduced legislation that would roll back reproductive rights even further in the wake of the Supreme Court decision overturning _Roe v. Wade_.** Peter, Ashley Hinson’s time is up. It’s important for our team to have conversations with as many voters as possible, so we can hear firsthand about the issues facing them and their families, as well as ensure they know that Ashley Hinson will never deliver the meaningful change they’re looking for. **I am running a people-powered campaign here in Iowa, so everything we do starts with you. If you’re ready to replace Ashley Hinson, will you chip in to help my team stay on track with our July fundraising? Friend, Six months ago, I swore an oath to protect and serve the people of Virginia –– and to defend freedom, peace, and justice across our Commonwealth. Stepping into the office for the first time, I felt an immense sense of duty. I was elected to carry out a job, and failure was not an option. But I’ll be honest –– the situation was bad on day one. **The criminal-first, victim-last mentality of the last administration left danger in our streets, wokeness in our schools, and injustice in our courts.** So our administration got right to work. _We started enforcing the law.__We eliminated policies that restricted our freedoms._ _We took action to restore common sense across our government._ **We put law-abiding citizens, victims, and police officers FIRST. ** I’m proud of our first six months –– but I want you to know this fight to secure Virginia’s future and defend law and order is far from over. _[**If you support this mission, will you pitch in $6 to fuel the next phase of the Great Virginia Comeback?**](http://links.safervirginiapac.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=833d58d1e227478bb69c3a43a8c71141&_e=Z3IXbuSXOfuvV5fVsM7mPJVriXIDEXpjFeIbaedkNexPJu9cjwa7MBy9ZMFO6XhMMix6QBdj1gTgcu3Gw8Riq---VxXm24zghtWfclG8SNJbOeu7UCBJ0wZLz4FizEaGZDbLSlaBXHRVxMKC6SPl5MjQZF4i2DK6cA-rRscDN18EyhVMGNurkYSXCSUtMBMwDcgU1P99YR76y80vKZ1pe10wKlDhLIf4cZJkq4f8r82KfN89vDlg1LYZmbejvwwhR7ynGv0ooDl3jG5rWy2yZyMcLITs6tOb-k7TeoMIGLN7ffBF55kZgiPV_749oG_duLDG0FBloxXSpIFPXM_CMeRUaT1VLZtEId3YK9JS_zc0lfdFjZxG6kIsMlNcm3vPBoTak1urotxchh1rsLFgCu89xw2Gv5cPPceyFV8Tyldf0oWBEBjBSynKHu0qKpv68MAOVT3A_m8bMkyDmKGxFtuSX2v2b7fg8YtYj_pBYKc%3D)_

name: Ryan D. Kelley
subject: Will you help us stay on track?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHIGAN FOR RYAN D
body:
If you help me win the Primary, we will unseat Gretchen!
| | | |
---
---
|
Peter,
The Kelley kids gave me some messages to share with you.
Before I pass on the messages, I want to quickly let you know that we are approaching a CRUCIAL, Pre-Election, reporting deadline on July 17.
Will you help us make a bold statement, by helping us raise $25,000 by midnight, July 17?
We are grateful and excited, that someone has graciously offered a $5,000 match, for funds donated by the deadline.
The donations will be used for get-out-the-vote efforts, for the August 2 primary election.
I know in this time of 9.1% inflation, things are hard, but we will not be able to get Whitmer out of office, if we cannot get out the vote.
If you help us win this primary, we will beat Whitmer!
Thank you for your tireless support!
---

Now, I have some messages to pass on from the Kelley kids:

"Vote Ryan Kelley, get rid of "Sketchy Gretchy!" ~Bella, 12 years old

clean_body: If you help me win the Primary, we will unseat Gretchen! | | | | | Peter, The Kelley kids gave me some messages to share with you. Before I pass on the messages, I want to quickly let you know that we are approaching a CRUCIAL, Pre-Election, reporting deadline on July 17. Will you help us make a bold statement, by helping us raise $25,000 by midnight, July 17? We are grateful and excited, that someone has graciously offered a $5,000 match, for funds donated by the deadline. The donations will be used for get-out-the-vote efforts, for the August 2 primary election. I know in this time of 9.1% inflation, things are hard, but we will not be able to get Whitmer out of office, if we cannot get out the vote. If you help us win this primary, we will beat Whitmer! Thank you for your tireless support! | == | Now, I have some messages to pass on from the Kelley kids: "Vote Ryan Kelley, get rid of "Sketchy Gretchy!" ~Bella, 12 years old "Vote for my dad!" ~Aniko, 10 years old "Vote for Ryan Kelley for Michigan's next Governor!" ~ Vincent, 7 years old "Vote for my dad & get Gretchen Whitmer out!" ~Louie, 5 years old "Freedom!" ~Joey, 2 years old "Goo-goo, ga-ga!" ~Tommy, 3 months old | Don't you just love these little patriots! Can I count on your support to help us finish strong & win the primary election? Please chip in $10, $20, $50, $100 or more. | == | == | == | == | == Thank you for your tremendous support, Peter. Every bit counts, no matter how small. To liberty! Ryan D. Kelley Candidate for Michigan Governor | PAID FOR BY MICHIGAN FOR RYAN D. KELLEY | | | | | | | Michigan For Ryan D. Kelley | 6181 Lake Michigan Drive #105, Allendale, MI 49401 | | Sent by mailto:team@ryandkelley.com in collaboration with

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Our climate future is on the ballot
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
Climate change is the greatest existential threat to our way of life. That's why if I’m blessed to be Maryland’s next Governor, I’ll take urgent action to make Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, and restore the Chesapeake Bay to lasting health. Below, I’m going to talk about the steps I’ll take to lead the transition to a greener Maryland economy. But if you don’t have the time to read my full message, I’d appreciate it if you could chip in whatever you can spare to help us reach as many voters as possible in the final days of this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=20.22]
On Day One of my gubernatorial administration, I’ll sign an executive order requiring all energy consumed by the State to be created by 100% renewable energy where possible, with a mandate for full conversion by the end of my first term. I’ll also convert the entire fleet of state vehicles to electric power. By committing the State to renewable energy, we can lead the private sector’s transition to renewables by creating and sustaining demand for renewable energy infrastructure.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=20.22]
And to protect the Chesapeake Bay, I’ll partner with the EPA and the signatory states to the Chesapeake Clean Water Blueprint to ramp up our efforts to achieve clean air, clean water, and lasting health for the Bay by the end of my first term. These efforts will include adding one billion adult oysters to Maryland’s portion of the watershed, reducing oxygen dead zones caused by algae blooms by 75%, and launching an initiative to preserve Maryland’s tree canopy.
If you believe that the next Governor of Maryland needs to put climate change front and center, then will you chip in to help power our movement to victory? Our climate future is on the ballot in 2022, and we cannot risk getting outspent by a Republican opponent who refuses to take climate change seriously.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge]
We need your help to get our message out about the need to protect the environment, and any amount you can spare will go a long way in the last days of this competitive primary race. Climate change is not some far-away specter. It’s here right now, and we will continue to witness its devastating effects, from more intense flooding, to unseasonably warm weather, to disruptions to our ecosystem. We cannot afford to kick this can down the road – the actions we take today will have enormous consequences for tomorrow.
I can’t thank you enough for your support. With your help, we’re going to make Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, and secure a lasting and healthy future for the Chesapeake Bay for decades to come.
Chip in to help us spearhead the transition to a greener Maryland economy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

body:

Peter, it’s John King. We have just 3 DAYS left until Primary Election Day, and I wanted to email you one last time to ask you to dig deep and give whatever you can to make a last-minute impact: _**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_siri_em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47919725/356171124/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220716-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220716-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220716&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=fb16da56-2005-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjE2ZGE1Ni0yMDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XUsxzR91LOC34Pk9eXKtRkJ8ZXs1v6m9oC8TK3Ox2Ek=)**_ Our plan to bring real change to Maryland may sound like a long-shot, but the truth is my whole life has been a long-shot. I lost my parents at a young age and got in trouble so often that I was kicked out of school. But thanks to people investing in me and seeing my potential, I got through these difficult times and found my true passion — helping others through education. Now, I have an opportunity to continue to make a difference by serving as Maryland’s next governor. I know that everyone deserves to be seen, heard, and given a chance to reach their full potential — like I was as a young man — and I will fight for this to become a reality for all Marylanders. clean_body: I’m ready to shake things up in the governor’s mansion but I need your help to get my campaign to the finish line. | = Peter, it’s John King. We have just 3 DAYS left until Primary Election Day, and I wanted to email you one last time to ask you to dig deep and give whatever you can to make a last-minute impact: = Our plan to bring real change to Maryland may sound like a long-shot, but the truth is my whole life has been a long-shot. I lost my parents at a young age and got in trouble so often that I was kicked out of school. But thanks to people investing in me and seeing my potential, I got through these difficult times and found my true passion — helping others through education. Now, I have an opportunity to continue to make a difference by serving as Maryland’s next governor. I know that everyone deserves to be seen, heard, and given a chance to reach their full potential — like I was as a young man — and I will fight for this to become a reality for all Marylanders. So please, will you support our campaign at this critical moment? We need your help to finish this election strong. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = I am running for governor because I believe we can change things for the better — whether it’s by improving the public school system, removing barriers to opportunity, or ensuring economic dignity for all Marylanders. However, I need your help to get my campaign to the finish line, = I want to improve Maryland and make state government a transformative force for good, but I need your support to get there. = Thank you for your support, John * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . clean_body: Sign on to support raising the minimum wage >>> | | Team — You may have already seen our FANTASTIC ballot measure campaign news: Alongside community organizations and activists, we submitted over 160,000 signatures from 93 counties in Nebraska for our Raise the Wage campaign just last week! So, now’s the time to rally support and start our mobilization efforts to make sure passing this measure is a slam dunk. That’s why we’re reaching out to you today, friend: This ballot measure would raise the minimum wage over the next few years but would still have an immediate impact on over 100,000 Nebraska workers. We’ve already won ballot measure campaigns to raise the minimum wage in EIGHT states, including Missouri and Arizona. And Nebraska is next! Thanks for all your support, team! — Hannah = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 24 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. This Thursday, Charlie is taking the stage for the final primary debate before he squares off against Gov. Ron DeSantis. Are you as excited as we are?

name: Caitlin Johnson, Campaign Manager
subject: UPDATE: This month in the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
I know it can be a challenge to keep up with what's been happening, so here's an update on recent events
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cYps3LVsE2J65XcymvHfeUhJXr6mp7TeDwSV5OkPq0A=/GXAwb4NHbGKgQnDNGeSQEc1p9irxrX3EibsylcfueQE=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.07.16_b1_cjcm_all) Hey team,

Today marks the halfway point of this pivotal month in the race for AZ-04, and it's been an eventful one. I know it can be a challenge to keep up with what's been happening, so here's an update on recent events:

**First:** The FOX News Democracy 2022 Power Rankings rated Greg's seat a Toss Up, making this his most competitive race yet.

**Then:** Our team launched a Primary Preparation Fund and set a goal to raise [**$6,000**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cYps3LVsE2J65XcymvHfeUhJXr6mp7TeDwSV5OkPq0A=/GXAwb4NHbGKgQnDNGeSQEc1p9irxrX3EibsylcfueQE=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.07.16_b1_cjcm_all) by the end of the day today, so we can hit the ground running and keep this seat blue.

**Now:** We need all our grassroots supporters to step up to make sure Greg is ready to take on his Republican opponent after the primary.

[**So, can you chip in now to help us reach our goal and be a part of the fight to keep AZ-04 blue?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cYps3LVsE2J65XcymvHfeUhJXr6mp7TeDwSV5OkPq0A=/GXAwb4NHbGKgQnDNGeSQEc1p9irxrX3EibsylcfueQE=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.07.16_b1_cjcm_all)

Caitlin

body:
Democrats are TERRIFIED
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8bt7dlaplkjc53q7vp90kshhn7qtuufdobklfa8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgeeoj2c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2odimhg77c5ks5q39cdheapm5cjhcspmbc3jmhqe1d34e9ijatdke5gr4otnc1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8rmccln6kqjfclicoqm1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
Democrats are TERRIFIED

Did you see this, Friend??**_Florida Governor Ron DeSantis flew all the way out to my home town of Whitefish, Montana and joined me over the 4th of July weekend!_** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0guh0rdvk11dt97kclv2ccmc0akhfg44bei8krg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgeeoj2c5h2bs) If you didn't know already, Florida is a LONG way from Montana. So why are GOP leaders like Ron DeSantis flocking to this district? It's simple: Other than Montana being the most beautiful, freedom-loving state in the union, **my race for Montana 's new Congressional seat is the single most important race in the country. It's the ONLY THING standing between us and taking back the House, and the entire GOP is counting on me to win.** We've all seen the polls, the Biden-Pelosi agenda has FAILED and Americans are NOT HAPPY. [**A**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvft5r45m7dsobk9bmg7kl75rueb2233smc8mag8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgeeoj2c5h2bs)[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm8lucp3l7q54rivukjgmofa3ga2p99ds1hn1mmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgeeoj2c5h2bs)[**MASSIVE Red Wave is coming**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9n54qaq8o5cs1cgbjfh7e50441na12u8d94d6so_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgeeoj2c5h2bs), and Dems are TERRIFIED of defeat. But I'll be honest, they won't go down without a fight, _**and they sure-as-heck won 't let a Navy SEAL and Trump Cabinet Member like me win without taking drastic measures to destroy my campaign.**_ **In 2020, Dems broke fundraising records in Montana by spending $200 MILLION on their efforts to flip the state BLUE.** But now their majority is hanging by a thin thread, and I have no doubt in my mind that they could spend EVEN more this year. But I'm a Proud American Navy SEAL who came from nothing and believes with all my heart that the American dream is worth fighting for. And I won't let Nancy Pelosi's fundraising machine intimidate me into backing out of this race. So before Pelosi starts pumping hundreds of millions into my race and forces me to drop out, [**I 'm humbly asking you for help.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ah1ggcvsitm76p6ne5efbd36hk5dl13tllft98_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgeeoj2c5h2bs) Unlike Pelosi, I'm not backed by liberal dark money mega donors who could easily throw $10 or $15 million dollars at this race and sink my campaign. I'm fully supported by everyday Patriotic Americans like yourself who are **_TIRED_** of the Left's failed policies destroying our great nation. But my biggest fundraising deadline ever is at 7pm tonight and I'm 35 contributions away from losing it all. [**So I 'm humbly asking every America First Patriot reading this email to make a small contribution of just $5 or $10 to help me turn out the vote in Montana and win this crucial House race to save America.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqm2qufp6mhkj1fcfjjgn1sc3q31rpggl8npn3u0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgeeoj2c5h2bs) [**GIVE $5**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z31vbe2vhtdvf43dgn3ai0obm8qpsgp84e1apteg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgeeoj2c5h2bs) [**GIVE $10**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zomgt3lsgt7f4p8se9j9p8acg82i81nuf02amsg8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgeeoj2c5h2bs) [**GIVE $15**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhp3ts0hbugp54r5okv4baols4hbrnnj8al1o2ko_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgeeoj2c5h2bs) [**GIVE $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrtj3mbrcvthp9s967cocl065md6ad36j24p6ur8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgeeoj2c5h2bs) [**GIVE ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z473t42q7vd931lam4ko67oirjfenhs2n88933c0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgeeoj2c5h2bs) I'm a fighter, a former Navy SEAL, and an America First Warrior. I promise that I will never bend the knee to the radical leftists in Congress, no matter what. [**I want to fight for you, but I need your support today to do that.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo101nsf58ejl4osq172rpuablc18palkrdlc5tg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjgeeoj2c5h2bs) Thank you and God bless America, Ryan Zinke

subject: Remembering the Jan. 6 attack

we can rebuke and defeat the violent extremism of Trump's Republican Party

**Friend: As more horrifying details come to light about the Jan. 6 attack on our democracy, I hope you take a minute to read this message to the very end.**
For as long as I live, friend, I will never forget how the events of Jan. 6 unfolded before my eyes. As insurrectionists marched through the halls outside the House gallery and my colleagues put on their gas masks to get ready for what might come, my police training instinctively kicked in.
For 27 years, I protected my community as a police officer – chasing criminals, taking domestic violence calls – so I was prepared that day to protect my colleagues in the House of Representatives and took charge on behalf of those who had never been in such a high-risk situation before.

No matter what, I promise to continue to protect our country as a U.S. senator – but I can't win this tough race without your help. **[Will you donate now to help me expand our Democratic Senate majority and protect our democracy from the GOP?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47920579/356172747/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3769-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjE3ZGE1Ni0yMDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38yUZh6y_bT8HXOaWkLdBccD1M0keOQTm6LaGs6JDLI=)**

On Jan. 6, I knew there was a chance I might not make it. I was willing to take that risk to protect my colleagues, just like I took that risk every day I put on my police uniform.
I've taken an oath to stand firm "against all enemies, foreign and domestic" – including habitual offenders like Donald Trump and all those who are trying to tear our democracy down. And I know we can rebuke and defeat the violent extremism of Trump's Republican Party if we work together.
I will never stop protecting and serving our country, but I need your help to stop the GOP from gaining power in the Senate. Will you contribute to my Senate campaign today? Thank you for supporting my campaign,

Chief Val Demings

name: Team Lira
subject: When will Greg Abbott STOP failing Texans
body:
| Peter, we’ve called out Greg Abbot before for using our district and the lives of Texans across the state for photo-ops and election stunts, rather than supporting policies that actually make a difference. Over the last month we’ve seen him continue his pattern of failing and harming Texans and our vulnerable communities over and over again. [**Add your name: Tell Greg Abbott to do better →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47921671/356175125/634869938?source=direct_link&referrer=group-john-lira-for-tx23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjdlNWU3NC0yMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=16fIQ4Hp2TxyzE3Q9GVT3CpRlKz6IUZrAMO2lfjLmfs=&emci=1e2d61fc-c003-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=967e5e74-2105-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25686212) After the horrifying and heartbreaking shooting right here in our district at Robb Elementary, Greg Abbott told the press “it could have been worse” to downplay just how devastating it was. And when Texans directed calls for common-sense gun reform toward Abbott, he chose to put his agenda and his relationship with the gun lobby over the lives of our kids and families. Then horrific news broke that 46 migrant bodies were found in an abandoned trailer in San Antonio, TX, also hitting close to home. Instead of recognizing and addressing the extreme risk migrants are taking every day to enter this country and his role in creating the inhumane border crisis we’re facing, he chose to point fingers and shirk responsibility. **Time and time again, Greg Abbott has put Texans' health, safety, and well-being second to his own political priorities and his campaign bank account — and it’s time for us to say NO MORE.** [**Can you take a minute to sign our petition if you agree that Gov. Greg Abbott continues to fail and harm Texans and vulnerable communities?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47921685/356175145/634869938?source=direct_link&referrer=group-john-lira-for-tx23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjdlNWU3NC0yMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=16fIQ4Hp2TxyzE3Q9GVT3CpRlKz6IUZrAMO2lfjLmfs=&emci=1e2d61fc-c003-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=967e5e74-2105-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25686212) **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47921692/356175162/634869938?source=direct_link&referrer=group-john-lira-for-tx23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjdlNWU3NC0yMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=16fIQ4Hp2TxyzE3Q9GVT3CpRlKz6IUZrAMO2lfjLmfs=&emci=1e2d61fc-c003-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=967e5e74-2105-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25686212)** It doesn’t stop there. Greg Abbott was ready to double down the minute Roe v. Wade was overturned. He had a trigger law set up, welcoming back a complete abortion ban from the 1920s, worsening the already restrictive 6-week abortion law from last September. The Dallas Morning News released a poll just last week that showed a majority of Texans DISAPPROVE of Abbott’s trigger law to ban all abortions. Yet, Abbott continues to act against our wishes. We’ve seen the people of this state, and of our district, hurt by Greg Abbott and his backward administration. And it’s time for a change. We need to speak up now, growing the fight until the election this November to finally kick him and his GOP pals out of office and replace them with REAL leaders who will actually represent and fight for the people of TX-23. [**Will you stand with John and join us in this fight by signing this petition today calling Greg Abbott out for failing and harming Texans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47921705/356175176/634869938?source=direct_link&referrer=group-john-lira-for-tx23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjdlNWU3NC0yMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=16fIQ4Hp2TxyzE3Q9GVT3CpRlKz6IUZrAMO2lfjLmfs=&emci=1e2d61fc-c003-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=967e5e74-2105-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25686212) clean_body: | Peter, we’ve called out Greg Abbot before for using our district and the lives of Texans across the state for photo-ops and election stunts, rather than supporting policies that actually make a difference. Over the last month we’ve seen him continue his pattern of failing and harming Texans and our vulnerable communities over and over again. After the horrifying and heartbreaking shooting right here in our district at Robb Elementary, Greg Abbott told the press “it could have been worse” to downplay just how devastating it was. And when Texans directed calls for common-sense gun reform toward Abbott, he chose to put his agenda and his relationship with the gun lobby over the lives of our kids and families. Then horrific news broke that 46 migrant bodies were found in an abandoned trailer in San Antonio, TX, also hitting close to home. Instead of recognizing and addressing the extreme risk migrants are taking every day to enter this country and his role in creating the inhumane border crisis we’re facing, he chose to point fingers and shirk responsibility. Time and time again, Greg Abbott has put Texans' health, safety, and well-being second to his own political priorities and his campaign bank account — and it’s time for us to say NO MORE. It doesn’t stop there. Greg Abbott was ready to double down the minute Roe v. Wade was overturned. He had a trigger law set up, welcoming back a complete abortion ban from the 1920s, worsening the already restrictive 6-week abortion law from last September. The Dallas Morning News released a poll just last week that showed a majority of Texans DISAPPROVE of Abbott’s trigger law to ban all abortions. Yet, Abbott continues to act against our wishes. We’ve seen the people of this state, and of our district, hurt by Greg Abbott and his backward administration. And it’s time for a change. We need to speak up now, growing the fight until the election this November to finally kick him and his GOP pals out of office and replace them with REAL leaders who will actually represent and fight for the people of TX-23. Let’s get to work, Team Lira | | ---|--- John Lira for Congress 1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120 #8096 San Antonio, TX 78220 United States John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: America needs a new Reagan – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/borisbenandms-8132496?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear #VALUE!,

**A staggering 96 percent of Mississippians believe that America is heading in the wrong direction,** according to a new poll for NetChoice.

With 10 percent inflation, you could be forgiven for wondering who the 4 percent are who think things are fine.

**Americans are feeling poorer, and this is likely to have major electoral implications.** Almost three in four Americans, according to the same poll, blame Joe Biden’s administration for the state of the economy. And the economy is their top concern. (Over 80 percent of Mississippians identify the economy as their priority, compared to just 2 percent naming the environment or criminal justice reform, to pick a couple of random examples.)
---
|
---
**_The poster hanging on my office wall –_**
**_America needs another one like him..._**
| The economic outlook is likely to help the Republicans and spell defeat for Democrats. The last time that there was a significant recession between 2007 – 09, the Democrats benefited from not being perceived as the party in power. This time, any such anti-incumbency effect will work the other way, helping Republicans.

**Americans tend to vote conservative not because they find conservatives cuddly, or even agreeable. They vote for conservatives because they are seen as hard-headed realists, who can come along and fix the economy. **But can they?

Not being a Democrat might be enough to see some Republicans elected, but what would they then do different to address some of the underlying problems that the US economy faces?

The storm cloud that hangs over the economy is a consequence of monetary mismanagement. Oodles of cheap credit have been hosed at the economy. Businesses and households are up to their eyeballs in debt. On coming to office, the Biden administration literally sent people free money. Rampant inflation is the result.

The process of bringing inflation under control is going to be painful. Hiking up interest rates has already put a damper on the housing market. If interest rates were increased to a (still historically low) 4 percent, prices might slump.

**When Reagan took office, he was prepared to tighten monetary policy, even if it caused a recession. Are today’s conservatives prepared to do something similar? **Are they prepared to be as judicious in their appointments to the Fed as they have been to the Supreme Court?

The US economy has been harmed by Net Zero policies. **ESG investment regimes have denied the oil and gas sector the investment it needs to increase output fast enough. **

The cumulative effect has been to push up the costs of energy, which has acted as a drag on the economy.

**Do conservatives have an alternative to the Net Zero agenda, and are they prepared to take on the vested interests who will fight any attempts to change direction?** Reagan was prepared to take on the vested interest holding America back, but it was a tough fight and at times it looked like they might defeat him.

The failures of a Democrat President, Jimmy Carter, might have given the conservatives an opportunity in the early 1980s. It was having a clearly thought through alternative that enabled them to tackle America’s underlying economic problems.

We need something similar again today.

---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=67884cd328&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

Ps. Do watch this week’s interview about the future of American conservatism with Matthew Continetti, the author of a wonderful new book on the subject
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ce1a024013&e=5703353baa)
---
Watch our newest interview! Douglas Carswell interviews author Matthew Continetti
|
---

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

Businesses and households are up to their eyeballs in debt. On coming to office, the Biden administration literally sent people free money. Rampant inflation is the result. The process of bringing inflation under control is going to be painful. Hiking up interest rates has already put a damper on the housing market. If interest rates were increased to a (still historically low) 4 percent, prices might slump. When Reagan took office, he was prepared to tighten monetary policy, even if it caused a recession. Are today’s conservatives prepared to do something similar? Are they prepared to be as judicious in their appointments to the Fed as they have been to the Supreme Court? The US economy has been harmed by Net Zero policies. ESG investment regimes have denied the oil and gas sector the investment it needs to increase output fast enough. The cumulative effect has been to push up the costs of energy, which has acted as a drag on the economy. Do conservatives have an alternative to the Net Zero agenda, and are they prepared to take on the vested interests who will fight any attempts to change direction? Reagan was prepared to take on the vested interest holding America back, but it was a tough fight and at times it looked like they might defeat him. The failures of a Democrat President, Jimmy Carter, might have given the conservatives an opportunity in the early 1980s. It was having a clearly thought through alternative that enabled them to tackle America’s underlying economic problems. We need something similar again today. | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO Ps. Do watch this week’s interview about the future of American conservatism with Matthew Continetti, the author of a wonderful new book on the subject | Watch our newest interview! Douglas Carswell interviews author Matthew Continetti | | |

name: Tom Perez
subject: hard work isn’t new to me
body:
Peter,

I’ve proudly dedicated my entire life to public service — fighting for jobs, justice, and opportunity here in Maryland and throughout our country.

Whether on the Montgomery County Council, as Maryland’s Labor Secretary, as a civil rights prosecutor, or as U.S. Labor Secretary under President Barack Obama, I’ve taken on — and won — big fights for working families. Even President Obama said if you _“look at his body of work on behalf of working people, he has been extraordinary.”_ **[I’m proud of the work I’ve done, and I’m proud to share my story with Marylanders. Primary Day is on Tuesday, and I’m hoping I can share my story, and this ad, in every county of Maryland before then to help turn out voters. Can you pitch in to help us spread the word?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47902107/356107299/1994940469?refcode=email_071622_obamaad_t3&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTU0MzMzNC0wNzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uawO0QdVpdy2wqqmdLBvHK_H9R06QgslVAMhg5oh0RA=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47902109/356107300/1994940469?refcode=email_071622_obamaad_t3&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTU0MzMzNC0wNzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uawO0QdVpdy2wqqmdLBvHK_H9R06QgslVAMhg5oh0RA=) | | [WATCH & DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47902110/356107301/1994940469?refcode=email_071622_obamaad_t3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTU0MzMzNC0wNzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uawO0QdVpdy2wqqmdLBvHK_H9R06QgslVAMhg5oh0RA=)
---
Listen Peter, running for governor is no easy task – but hard work isn’t new to me.

I’m the proud son of immigrants from the Dominican Republic. I helped put myself through college by working on the back of a trash truck, umpiring baseball games, working at a warehouse, and other jobs.

I know the value of hard work, and Maryland deserves a Democratic governor who will work hard and deliver results, not just rhetoric.

This ad shows what I've done throughout my career in public service. And I can’t wait to deliver results as Maryland’s next governor. But I need your help to get there.

**[With just 3 days left until the primary, I need your help now more than ever. Can you donate anything you can to my campaign for governor today? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47902111/356107302/1994940469?refcode=email_071622_obamaad_t3&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTU0MzMzNC0wNzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uawO0QdVpdy2wqqmdLBvHK_H9R06QgslVAMhg5oh0RA=)**

Thanks for being a part of this team,

Tom

You might think the answer is obvious. Our government is meant to be by and for the people, after all - **but the Supreme Court has called the future of our democracy itself into question.**

In their next term, SCOTUS will hear a case that could lead state legislatures to assign their state’s electoral votes to the candidate of their choice - regardless of the outcome of the popular vote. **Put another way, state legislatures could _legally steal_ presidential elections from the people.**

Republicans have already proven that they would seize that power if given the slightest opportunity, and Wisconsin’s GOP-controlled legislature even tried to negate our votes by sending a fake slate of Republican electors after the 2020 election. It’s absolutely unconscionable that the Supreme Court would hand them the power to do it again.

**We can’t stress it enough: If the right-wing Supreme Court majority once again sides with Republicans, American democracy as we know it would end. It would be a disaster in Wisconsin and other states with Republican legislatures.**

Peter, in 2024, who do you want to decide the outcome of your state’s presidential election? The voters, or the state legislature?

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The future of the American Dream
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsj3f0ChNM

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osj3f0ChNM

Hello
Fellow Conservative,

We have
near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we
have to show for it?

The woke
Left has declared war on parents and schoolchildren with the
Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory.

Progressive" policies on college campuses throughout the nation
are threatening the future of free speech and other freedoms we
enjoy.

The
government has abandoned free market principles in favor of
out-of-control spending and higher taxes.

Now, good
people like you are feeling the effects of rampant inflation. And
the American Dream is becoming more and more out of
reach-especially for future generations.

I know
this is hard. I know this isn't what we wanted. But right now,
the war for America's future is upon us.

From what
I've been told, you're someone who is concerned about the
direction our country is headed, and that's why I'm emailing you
today.

The
Heritage Foundation is currently working on a strategy to fight
back and preserve the American Dream. And we want to get your
thoughts.

Would you
take this important survey to let us know what you think about
the state of the American Dream for you children and
grandchildren?

It should
only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is
critical, so please don't wait.

You can
get started right now using this secure link:
https://secured.heritage.org/american-dream-survey/

Thank you
so much. I look forward to getting your insights.

Regards,
Andrew P.
McIndoe

QUESTION
1: Do you believe the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory
are destroying the American education system?

Yes

No

The
Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington
D.C. 20002

body:
#

Friends —
I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution — $3 or whatever you can afford — before our mid-month fundraising deadline ends at midnight.
Here’s the truth:
After we won this seat in 2020, Trump came to Arizona and told his supporters that, _“Taking back America begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”_
And just a few weeks ago, Trump endorsed one of my opponents in this race who supports a national abortion ban.
This is a lot, I know. Trump is putting the pressure on. Our opponents have super PACs and outside groups spending millions of dollars in attack ads against us. But we have each other. And that’s how we’ll win again.
So please, I’m humbly asking:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close? I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july22.t8IncZ&refcode=em220716-1-subs&t=1&akid=3301%2E6688874%2Ed87Skc)

name: Team Gansler-Hollingsworth
subject: President Obama
body:
You have seen countless campaign ads, lying, pretending President Barack Obama has endorsed a candidate for Maryland Governor. He has not. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzuugE4KrUlPDf1VabmJAb59AJet3q7Y3HUq1MSMuuxzqqHt_QQyAhXjJWLjtnmbfh-6kMoKDbt4YMxhEge46uPASJZbk7pQFHrrROtQ9Mw9oIJOV_UClOZg8joOVu2VSm9Ef-tsdb_tzN9kAgdXVUtb0ZlvPf8bOP4s9_AJ8K4vigGlfeWL01a1P4uDVemUx8vIvGfY7VJHbThuRh3_eg9kLKh1pSfVirTRduF0smsnDySgm6EmI8f0KYrXnVgYWCfVbiU2NtEMH992HnkbqAsIQ/3ns/_-HRRQjgR7-16IXLj7fY8g/h0/8tQD5qerxYq1WX_B0-cgsf49k_h43-2hFc4BfYIEsh4)
---
Friends, You have seen countless campaign ads, lying, pretending President Barack Obama has endorsed a candidate for Maryland Governor. _He has not._ **Here's the truth.** Doug was **the first statewide elected official in Maryland to endorse then Senator Obama. He co-chaired Obama's Maryland campaign** alongside longtime friend the late Congressman Elijah Cummings. And here's what President Obama had to say about it: _**“I am honored that Doug Gansler is the co-chair of my campaign here in Maryland. He is one of the rising young stars of the national Democratic Party and one of the best Attorneys General in the Country."**_
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzuugE4KrUlPDf1VabmJAb59DQxCZcXksPIQU9xNwJEoP1ScVEL5N_HmKis9N_WedyCDMfZxNTlsKxxZbFDmqTZoE57FeZXHQ1JwlAMFxkeXAb1VVh4Jv2bP7YVBFdOKKfS0g5EBio0ukx56OoUx4a8f6Xu8GZRbOzwLHw7h9u2tzkbg9pYdQ7EAcIFqILcAlMxN9AY9BtQfKExiI3pRGSmd2DYH2_eFw0w7JWNp-ie36yCFcQNN-JOcwnEhx0dNnjFJ2UseMCytHLfyLdySJ-i_c/3ns/_-HRRQjgR7-16IXLj7fY8g/h1/_qp0UbKDzmHkpMdNC1c-ePRN7HO0O8_Yij8a-zieltE)
---
**As president of all the attorneys general, Doug then****went on to work with President Obama** on many initiatives, including securing $38 billion from the big corporate banks to keep people in their homes during the mortgage foreclosure crises. What did those claiming to be endorsed by President Obama do, they endorsed his opponent. **[Click here to see Doug introducing President Obama the day before the Maryland Primary in 2008.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOJPR4Z5lDybbWIPhQSOR8HAokaByDhp02YD-Q9Hj_aTTVRmzNkgwE6bIbh-bM1-iwBy6aptUU6NiUIT2UFr2dcumN2u6twk1zsVEKjK9j6hmrao08GRX5NHQ09XCKyetQR6CtB1xqQcEmUcCBCa0UG2jF2vAizkqFKAG_anBPxMRvEdWeP38qJRrQys1zQZJsUvAzBXPmA9DmwnozpG4q5RnCUPUH-_4Wfr-4u_IZFbwTEoS8FfHYRtvbpqo-GF0Q/3ns/_-HRRQjgR7-16IXLj7fY8g/h2/cnvOG2Vtng9EITh9piWlDWBJp-qC44GVKJMKFw2N8Cs)** **Tuesday, July 19th is Maryland’s primary.** If you are looking for a straightforward candidate to take on high prices, fight crime, and protect a woman's freedom to make the most personal choice in her life, **and if you're looking for the Dem who polls say can win in November, please vote for Doug** and the first Black woman Lieutenant Governor in Maryland history, Mayor Candace Hollingsworth. Thank you, Team Gansler-Hollingsworth
---

clean_body: You have seen countless campaign ads, lying, pretending President Barack Obama has endorsed a candidate for Maryland Governor. He has not. | | Friends, You have seen countless campaign ads, lying, pretending President Barack Obama has endorsed a candidate for Maryland Governor. He has not. Here's the truth. Doug was the first statewide elected official in Maryland to endorse then Senator Obama. He co-chaired Obama's Maryland campaign alongside longtime friend the late Congressman Elijah Cummings. And here's what President Obama had to say about it: “I am honored that Doug Gansler is the co-chair of my campaign here in Maryland. He is one of the rising young stars of the national Democratic Party and one of the best Attorneys General in the Country." | As president of all the attorneys general, Doug thenwent on to work with President Obama on many initiatives, including securing $38 billion from the big corporate banks to keep people in their homes during the mortgage foreclosure crises. What did those claiming to be endorsed by President Obama do, they endorsed his opponent. Tuesday, July 19th is Maryland’s primary. If you are looking for a straightforward candidate to take on high prices, fight crime, and protect a woman's freedom to make the most personal choice in her life, and if you're looking for the Dem who polls say can win in November, please vote for Doug and the first Black woman Lieutenant Governor in Maryland history, Mayor Candace Hollingsworth. Thank you, Team Gansler-Hollingsworth By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Friends of Doug Gansler, please .

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: I need you to know this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=COaoTWyUk%2BetQWGYYWZ2BOL17xt6cLa%2F&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, I need you to know this and take it to heart:
I will never stop standing up to Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and their Republican allies who are hell-bent on undermining our democracy and threatening Americans' fundamental rights - including the right to cast a vote in a free and fair election or to decide when and whether to bear children.
But the truth is this: My efforts to hold Trump and his GOP loyalists accountable have made me a target for defeat.
That's why I'm coming to you today with a troubling update: **As of now, my campaign is still $7,132 short of what we need to raise before our next big fundraising deadline, so I 'm reaching out to humbly ask for a donation to get us back on track. [Please, if you support my efforts to hold extremist Republicans accountable, will you make a contribution now to protect this seat and keep the Senate under Democratic control?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1215-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
We're up against powerful forces: Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are determined to flip a Democratic seat - perhaps even this one - to take back control of the chamber. They only need to flip one seat to succeed. We can't take anything for granted.
Shifting political grounds in this state make this year particularly unpredictable: Recently, RNC chairwoman and noted Trump apologist Ronna McDaniel helped christen a new national Republican campaign office in this state - the national GOP's first-ever office in Connecticut.
**I won 't mince words: They are making this state, and this Senate seat, a target.**
That's why I'm counting on your support today. **If you and everyone reading this chipped in just $5 right now, we 'd close our shortfall _and then some_ within mere seconds. So - with so much at stake - I have to ask: [Please, will you make a contribution now to protect this seat and keep Democratic control of the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1215-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
With your support, I know we can win this race, keep this seat blue, and protect (and expand!) Democratic control of the Senate.
Thanks for all you do.
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1215-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Tim
subject: birthday wish
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17061?t=1009&amount=25&akid=4616%2E3611125%2ERydMEw ]Tim Ryan

Yes, you’ve heard right, folks: Today is my birthday.

But no, I don’t want any more socks, ties, or a new set of golf clubs.

The ONLY thing I want for my birthday is to defeat JD Vance and expand our
Democratic Senate majority so we can finally cut workers in on the deal
and put Ohio first.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17061?t=1010&amount=25&akid=4616%2E3611125%2ERydMEw ]So what do you say? Can you help make this very
special 29th (ha!) birthday one to remember? All I’m asking for is just a
few bucks so we can flip Ohip blue and win the race that will decide
Senate control.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17061?t=1011&amount=25&akid=4616%2E3611125%2ERydMEw ]Tim’s Birthday Fund >>

I’ve made my fair share of trips around the sun.

So trust me when I say there’s never been a more important time to expand
our pro-choice Senate majority, build an economy of the future, and bring
good-paying jobs back to Ohio.

We can make this our reality—but only if we take down JD Vance and the
Silicon Valley billionaires bankrolling his campaign and expand our
Democratic Senate majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17061?t=1012&amount=25&akid=4616%2E3611125%2ERydMEw ]So please, will you grant me this one birthday wish by chipping in to
help our campaign win the race that will decide Senate control? We need
your support.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek,

FIRST: Brian Kemp began the general election with a flood of negative ads
attacking Stacey and our campaign.

THEN: We outraised Kemp in the last reporting period and he pulled down
his ads.

BUT NOW: We’ve learned that Kemp is spending over $1,000,000 in new
negative attacks across the state.

Momentum is on our side right now, but victory in November depends on
continued and sustained investments from committed
supporters like
you, Derek.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220716_B1_AttackAd_S1_T1_AFG_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=1004%2E1862389%2ERSm8tf ]We have to fight back against Kemp’s attacks. Please, make your
first donation today.
Every dollar you contribute goes directly to electing Stacey Abrams the
next governor of Georgia.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220716_B1_AttackAd_S1_T1_AFG_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=1004%2E1862389%2ERSm8tf ]DONATE

Derek, with
Brian Kemp’s new $1,000,000 ad buy, he is signaling that he will spend
whatever it takes to hold on to power this November.

If we’re going to fire a dangerous and extreme incumbent governor, we have
to be able to rely on this grassroots team to power our work and defend
against everything he throws our way. We cannot afford to slow down now.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220716_B1_AttackAd_S1_T1_AFG_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=1004%2E1862389%2ERSm8tf ]Can you pitch in $5 or any amount right now to support
Stacey Abrams? With your help, we can defeat Brian Kemp, win this race and
get to work for the people of Georgia.

Thank you for all you do,

clean_body: [1]Stacey Abrams for Governor Derek, FIRST: Brian Kemp began the general election with a flood of negative ads attacking Stacey and our campaign. THEN: We outraised Kemp in the last reporting period and he pulled down his ads. BUT NOW: We’ve learned that Kemp is spending over $1,000,000 in new negative attacks across the state. Momentum is on our side right now, but victory in November depends on continued and sustained investments from committed supporters like you, Derek. [ ]We have to fight back against Kemp’s attacks. Please, make your first donation today. Every dollar you contribute goes directly to electing Stacey Abrams the next governor of Georgia. [ ]DONATE Derek, with Brian Kemp’s new $1,000,000 ad buy, he is signaling that he will spend whatever it takes to hold on to power this November. If we’re going to fire a dangerous and extreme incumbent governor, we have to be able to rely on this grassroots team to power our work and defend against everything he throws our way. We cannot afford to slow down now. [ ]Can you pitch in $5 or any amount right now to support Stacey Abrams? With your help, we can defeat Brian Kemp, win this race and get to work for the people of Georgia. Thank you for all you do, Abrams for Georgia +---------------------------------+ | PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR | +---------------------------------+ Abrams for Governor 931 Monroe Dr NE Ste A102 #363 Atlanta, GA 30308 United States Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

name: Roger Marshall
subject: Update in the fight for life
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/4e1db4cb06503457/5419baa2656ec391c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
# **Friend — I wanted to share an update with you about my work to continue defending the rights of the unborn since Roe was thrown out by the Supreme Court. **

---
This week, I helped lead an important hearing in the U.S. Senate about what comes next. This was one of the biggest moments I’ve had since being elected in 2020. **While overturning Roe was historic, the work is far from over.** I’m doing everything I can to ensure the Value Them Both amendment passes in Kansas next month, and to ensure we elect pro-life conservatives across the country in November. [**If you agree that this work is critical, I hope you’ll let me know now. Stand with us in the fight for life — >**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/4e1db4cb06503457/184edfafeb1d650ac3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/4e1db4cb06503457/76705a00a3d27aa3c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
As I’ve often said, for me pro-life isn’t just a slogan. It has been and continues to be my life’s work. As a physician, I’ve delivered more than 5,000 babies. As a Senator, I’m fighting to protect the rights of the unborn and to expose the dishonesty of the abortion on demand lobby. [**Your support will continue to be instrumental in that effort. So I hope you’ll reaffirm your commitment to defending life and stand with me now. **](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/4e1db4cb06503457/8bdd97b185779910c3d6b838967d376c/37973) Thank you for your strong support.
---

---
Senator Roger Marshall
---

_**Keep reading for a personal message from Doc:**_ Kansans sent me to the U.S. Senate to defend life and to stand for our jobs, our families, and our faith. And that's exactly what I'm doing. But I can't keep up the fight without your help. We're facing an onslaught from the woke left, and Democrats across the country are raising millions to keep their power. I'm not about to back down, but I need you standing with me. If you're able, I hope you'll chip in below. Taking back the Senate in 2022 depends on patriots like you standing with us. -Senator Roger Marshall

body:
I wanted to give you a quick update on the state of this race.

I wanted to give you a quick update on the state of this race.
**FIRST:** Rachel Maddow said I "have a difficult reelection fight ahead of [me]."

**THEN:** Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies launched MILLIONS of dollars of attack ads against me.

**NOW:** With _Roe v. Wade_ gone, McConnell is threatening a nationwide abortion ban if he takes back the Senate.
**I'm not going to sugarcoat it. If I lose here, Democrats have no chance of holding our Democratic majority, paving the way for McConnell's anti-choice agenda.**
But I know firsthand what it takes to win in a swing state like New Hampshire: I won my last race by just 1,017 votes. That's why my team started earlier than ever to get staff on the ground, reach every Granite Stater, and build a winning campaign.
And that's why I'm reaching out to you today. We're really close to reaching tonight's mid-month goal. If we want to fight back against Mitch McConnell and the GOP's relentless attacks, we have to keep up our momentum.
[**Can you make your first contribution to my reelection campaign to help us hit our goal before midnight tonight? With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Giffords PAC
subject: See this?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Look closely.
#

See this?
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july22.Xk0RhP&refcode=em220716-1-15&refcode2=2234.3935704.8wCPHl&t=1&akid=2234%2E3935704%2E8wCPHl)_Credit: Washington Post_
It’s a map of 2022 Senate elections.
Look closely.
There are some races Democrats should win easily.
There are some races Republicans should win easily.
But there are A LOT of toss-up races.
Wisconsin, Arizona, Pennsylvania, North Carolina, and more...
Our job this November is to elect enough Senators with the courage to pass sensible gun safety legislation. The bipartisan bill that was just signed into law was a great start, but it’s far from everything we need.
Voters care about addressing gun violence. And in a number of these states, we CAN move swing voters to our side on this issue.
But that takes resources, and Gabby cannot do it alone. So we’re asking:
[**Can you please use this link to contribute $3 to Giffords PAC today? Help us elect a Congress that is willing to take action to make our communities safer from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july22.Xk0RhP&refcode=em220716-1-15&t=2&akid=2234%2E3935704%2E8wCPHl)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Fundamental freedoms are at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We must put a stop to the anti-abortion agenda.
#
Peter,
The GOP may be happy with the opinions coming down from the right-wing Supreme Court of their making. But we know they won’t stop there.
This fall, they are hoping to flip the Senate red so they can pass a nationwide abortion ban.
**[With fundamental freedoms at stake, we must not hand the reins of the Senate back to Mitch McConnell. Chip in $5 to stand with me in the fight to keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47927264/356188654/2142410766?refcode=dd_em_220716_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDU3NzRiZC0yZTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiddfUQlGjV-scwG9hwqYnm-8y-VwybBkcvN8lLnKpQ=)**
Conservative, anti-abortion lawmakers in GOP-led states are making their radical agenda clear.
Outlawing abortion _everywhere_. Turning neighbors into bounty hunters. Jailing women for having miscarriages — or leaving them to die without access to life-saving reproductive care.
**We can still fight back, Peter. But we can’t win with McConnell’s GOP in charge.**
**[Donate $5 now toward my $15,000 goal to defend and grow our Democratic majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47927265/356188655/2142410766?refcode=dd_em_220716_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDU3NzRiZC0yZTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiddfUQlGjV-scwG9hwqYnm-8y-VwybBkcvN8lLnKpQ=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

Team,
It’s a big week, as we’re officially opening our campaign headquarters!
We’d like to invite you to our Headquarters Open House this Sunday, July 17, from 2-4 pm. This is our first event at our new campaign headquarters, and we’re very excited to share it with all of you!
We will also be joined by special guest Judge Marilyn Zayas, who is currently running for Justice Pat Dewine’s seat on Ohio’s Supreme Court.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47927465/356189512/230632188?refcode=EM_FR_220716OpenHouse_N_TW4US_90do_5_G_TESTA_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWFiODg0ZDItMzAwNS1lZDExLWI0N2EtMjgxODc4YjgzZDhhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=u7jKNRZGDtrrJWK63PDUP6jlx7GAjDhha5onjiYWjGw=)
As a woman, single mother, entrepreneur and granddaughter of a WWII Veteran, Tamie is a concerned Ohioan ready to get things done for ALL people. She has fresh, bold, and new ideas to present in Washington that will solve Ohio and America’s most challenging issues.
**And she has what it takes to beat Jim Jordan.**
**[Team, we’re so excited to share our headquarters with our team! While this event does NOT require a donation, running an office does cost resources. clean_body: Since Hayes’ reelection, she has voted in agreement with Pelosi 100%. | Peter, get a look at this... | My opponent, Jahana Hayes, votes with ringleader Nancy Pelosi across the board! Yep, you read that right. Since Hayes’ reelection, she has voted in agreement with Pelosi 100%, and even 94% with AOC, who practically PRAISES socialism. This is who is representing you in office, but by her actions, we know that she is NOT voting on your behalf (AKA her job) - instead with Pelosi and the most extreme liberals. Check this out... Hayes voted for the spending bill that caused massive inflation. She has not come up with an explanation for why our empty shelves are not restocked. She called to end Title 42 - an act that helps keep our border secure. Hayes still defends the expansion of critical race theory on our children. She remains silent on the consistently rising crime stats. She is why our nation is failing! I’m ready to right the wrongs of Hayes, Pelosi, and the rest of the ‘Squad’ that have put our nation in a sinkhole. I’m prepared to roll up my sleeves and dig America out of this crisis - but I can only do so much with the ‘Squad’s’ control of D.C. Help me start making headway to kick out ‘Squad’ members by supporting my efforts for Congress. Whether it’s $10, $20, or even $50 - If we are ever going to get the ‘Squad’ and their radical agenda out of office - Sincerely, George S. Peter, The Left’s priorities are sickening. While Americans struggle because of Washington’s policies, House Democrats just voted for A SECOND TIME to pass _the so-called “Women’s Health Protection Act.”_ _
__
_**_This bill is really the “Abortion for All Act.”_**** _
_****_
_** Under this law, it would be legal in all 50 states to abort a baby at any stage of pregnancy—even in the third trimester. _75 percent of Americans are firmly opposed to these gruesome late-term abortions._

Democrats are out of step with America and even common decency.

**_Voters support pro-life protections for the unborn—it’s why so many states have passed pro-life laws!_** But House Democrats just voted to essentially overturn every pro-life law passed by the states. You won’t stand for that, right?
---
[**CHIP IN >> STOP THE LEFT’S POWER GRAB**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a4f1ebd5795f460db99dd010f4073c80&_e=y421SgU_03CZHRh4P9UBaQiBsR-P_Su1ASSw0jBdRm8REnbnxJT_ZA_Isbf48oYiZOGGcHSNOY4QBjYUjSbXq9rkbrfQej1n-hO4ROoCLz_aOow-dh2ohqbOqmoyNMh8JCubI7MBv-uhhxFhQht1bcx0xJT_yZBBnTN4HDeJuisuUY8CEkww3TAOEueoxiXeOgFfgSNyIBkachajmhOPUGFRQv_XNe4unF4HTmOLz64pCbeoByk8TTowm95A3uKgUzcoruzxtAPQH7XTzlV9GCD28TEN8xRb27RV1O5PgWCW0z_aYWtQemBCogdprfhaqvw1s_cxv7hrhD63i3XJi-melMHULmEsmXLt4ynM7tFmZDYpJii2V-vaD6_j3O-vXX1EsMspmtmlZ7He0ULQWjxYIWlTcQ2afonRwIaTH5iPkGLz1I-Ckw0c-BpyffkGAukN_DjCDvulIZ3mFX6BymR0Qan1F9SOKXeG27GMdYzRPmuic6dFCuyjFSWE5F1w)
---
**The Democrats are COMPLETELY out of touch with America. Three-quarters of Americans are firmly opposed to gruesome late-term abortions. But Democrats pander to their pro-abortion base while ignoring the concerns of a majority of Americans.****
****
**Recent polling shows that “inflation / the economy” is by far the TOP concern for Americans.

But Nancy Pelosi and her acolytes are using their time in Washington to overturn the will of tens of millions of pro-life voters across the nation. The good news is, we’ve diligently worked for 18 months to preserve the Senate filibuster—an important Senate rule for debate that conservatives can use to stop this bill in the Senate. _If it weren’t for the filibuster, you’d be reading about Joe Biden signing this bad bill into law.__
__
_This means that:
* _State pro-life laws will be preserved_
* _Thousands of unborn lives will be saved_
* _Our current work to push state legislatures to pass more pro-life laws will go forward!_

**Here at Heritage Action, we’ve been preparing for this. We’ve fought the Democrat agenda in D.C. and successfully stopped it on several fronts. And we’ve trained a top-notch network of activists to push legislation across the finish line all across the country!**
**But we need YOUR SUPPORT to win this fight.[_Can we count on you to support Heritage Action’s nation-wide mission to promote conservative legislation?_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a4f1ebd5795f460db99dd010f4073c80&_e=y421SgU_03CZHRh4P9UBaQiBsR-P_Su1ASSw0jBdRm8REnbnxJT_ZA_Isbf48oYiZOGGcHSNOY4QBjYUjSbXq9rkbrfQej1n-hO4ROoCLz_aOow-dh2ohqbOqmoyNMh8JCubI7MBv-uhhxFhQht1bcx0xJT_yZBBnTN4HDeJuisuUY8CEkww3TAOEueoxiXeOgFfgSNyIBkachajmhOPUGFRQv_XNe4unF4HTmOLz64pCbeoByk8TTowm95A3uKgUzcoruzxtAPQH7XTzlV9GCD28TEN8xRb27RV1O5PgWDdaPnsz5-oWOxevD_-S2QGUAcjRigMw_ij-jSme1Nx8pQtbGfV2TH002fPgNFmzBr6kyiw2oj9AGL2rkvG9AVrGjt255NkGt4W7OxNJLlbh-ZnA7rSUWXbfyDsVQyMQokcE-OGX1YAbevd7CzSF3_ySzsEXlysuS0Z6ukyFS1hVeTp2R-vXvhojt3Zn-sdmpng_z3NcicIiXZWT92_wUiR)**

If you would like to unsubscribe visit this | | | Peter, The Left’s priorities are sickening. While Americans struggle because of Washington’s policies, House Democrats just voted for A SECOND TIME to pass the so-called “Women’s Health Protection Act.” This bill is really the “Abortion for All Act.” Under this law, it would be legal in all 50 states to abort a baby at any stage of pregnancy—even in the third trimester. 75 percent of Americans are firmly opposed to these gruesome late-term abortions. Democrats are out of step with America and even common decency. Voters support pro-life protections for the unborn—it’s why so many states have passed pro-life laws! But House Democrats just voted to essentially overturn every pro-life law passed by the states. You won’t stand for that, right? The Democrats are COMPLETELY out of touch with America. Three-quarters of Americans are firmly opposed to gruesome late-term abortions. But Democrats pander to their pro-abortion base while ignoring the concerns of a majority of Americans. Recent polling shows that “inflation / the economy” is by far the TOP concern for Americans. But Nancy Pelosi and her acolytes are using their time in Washington to overturn the will of tens of millions of pro-life voters across the nation. The good news is, we’ve diligently worked for 18 months to preserve the Senate filibuster—an important Senate rule for debate that conservatives can use to stop this bill in the Senate. If it weren’t for the filibuster, you’d be reading about Joe Biden signing this bad bill into law. This means that: State pro-life laws will be preserved Thousands of unborn lives will be saved Our current work to push state legislatures to pass more pro-life laws will go forward! Here at Heritage Action, we’ve been preparing for this. We’ve fought the Democrat agenda in D.C. and successfully stopped it on several fronts. And we’ve trained a top-notch network of activists to push legislation across the finish line all across the country! But we need YOUR SUPPORT to win this fight. We can’t sit idly by. | | We have to be honest with one another if we are going to turn around the tide of crime that is ravaging America right now. __**First**_ ,_ we must acknowledge that lawlessness is not just the problem of a few isolated communities. Today, far too many Americans find savage crime at their doorstep all across the country. __**Second**_ ,_ we must understand that the men and women in uniform that have sworn an oath to protect and defend us deserve our respect and need our support, not our scorn. _**_Third_ ,**_ we must be absolutely clear that bad soft-on-violent-crime policies only serve to protect criminals from serious consequences for their actions and encourage lawlessness over neighborliness. **__Last_ ,_** we must resolve as Americans to find the courage within our own hearts to step up and take action to protect America's future. [_**Will you step up with a contribution to An America United today to support this crucial mission?**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=59f909ec9bbb4e6bbd5806d6331a2ea3&_e=bM7pcdmIFqH_PbYl694Z4U_tul3jaME3w0xE5ytrocDs7f9YUC-TilGZO1b3wjjYPM0TNe2fmuH5vSJeAIxowHrxl_fpzTqtV8LX_WqX_zJT22ncNmT6MoRAYzVpP-B4E_BA9YA8Osj6mE3miPTxyD0PQ6gRU1ks_IZ9SMRjUGqV2RSubKIG-C4jQCWQRJ9UMNY53OS8FRWTYzWGWXlrOStnSc55n-0aW8dcFpDvFx7gdjXEqHYWj83dKNPDo1UfdSP5s7C0tE8RdJZAYTZfDhk8TBcg3jzIFwHRbQIZy4Xdw8Akm_QyqnWjJDWejq8jYurg5iOUi_ATyHfzR27nSg%3D%3D) Your friend in the fight for our safety,**Governor Larry Hogan**

| | Jasmine’s race in NC-11 is heating up to be one of the _tightest races_ across the country, Peter. With polling showing our Republican opponent Chuck Edwards leading by a single-digit margin, it’s obvious that November is anyone’s game. That’s why we have to put in the work this summer to share Jasmine’s message of love, hope, and how we move forward together with as many voters as possible. Right now, our full team is preparing for our next Day of Action this Saturday – and we are fired up about the energy we’re seeing on the ground. **[To help us connect with exactly the voters who can flip this battleground seat blue, will you chip in $25 or more today? This is one of the tightest House races in the entire country and your support keeps us on the ground talking to voters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47908448/356133582/-240677580?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220716_FR_TightestRace_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGJkZTk5NS0wZjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7UDdU0lzjs1Tz9X1mr9HjT5sROwMLx8U2qYRTpBgWxI=)** | | | [Chip in $25 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47908450/356133584/-1606295236?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220716_FR_TightestRace_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGJkZTk5NS0wZjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7UDdU0lzjs1Tz9X1mr9HjT5sROwMLx8U2qYRTpBgWxI=)

There’s a lot at stake if we don’t win NC-11 – not only for Western North Carolina, but for the _entire country._
Extremist Republicans like Mark Meadows and Madison Cawthorn have made WNC ground zero for their dangerous politics - and my opponent Chuck Edwards offers more of the same. Republicans are on the brink of taking control of the House, and if they succeed, think about the damage that they’ll cause.
We need a House majority that will codify _Roe v. Wade_ and marriage equality into federal law, fight climate change, and protect our democracy – and I will be ready to take those votes on day one.
