name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Woke Nanny-State
body:
**[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7bd9a3d6d3f144b6ad2b5d16c6ee7880&_e=0H5w7yzhgkEe7WaxUSPlQrgnLJqX29WQhH03u5_gH8Gi3jTkE_p_0ndq2c4FibxsnfYzcbSa4w6QSXIxjBQpXaCu0SBE0bBXYjI0cQ_lBzavEIQNej-CiCZJawrW4bPFCrH_BIfYERb1UHcNuAEyILXe2Jl8e8-Z8y7zPXBgISRSfn8pUBcZadVtIWaoWb7DJLMzZS7PpUI-ozrzNzD2uI-xHC5G_DrxRS00o2E44jaaTfpaIq2hr5TegY4woI9Gb_M36clAs11sEfXKsfrrizl-fDW1h1rlwu2fsQzQeeGznGybj8U06rffLoHOxzJGCunOlXxbGcqoZkoj9mao7lW8gO61EVp3AKLXTAn-2p7Z-4QSYRNvTyz9Kt93lgCreSpLdVLk-Ee-N_1s6bEUiA%3D%3D)**
Peter,
Over the past three years, **we have been called to make choices and answer questions we did not expect.**

Questions about how, in a world that seemed frightening and different, we were going to raise our kids, continue to put food on the table, and care for our communities?

And questions that feel further out now like, how does our government interact with its citizenry in a time of crisis?

How is our government -- one of the people, by the people, for the people -- meant to protect life, but not stifle liberty?

_In crisis, do we foster freedom? Or do we force our citizens down?_

Well, over the past three years I believe we have had the truth revealed about those two vastly different approaches. Not in an academic textbook or in a theoretical debate, but in the harsh reality of governing during COVID. You could not find two more starkly different examples than the free state of Florida and the woke tyranny of Gavin Newsom's California.

It isn't hard to understand why the Governor of California wants to talk about Florida. It's part of the one topic he tries to focus on: _**Anything but California.**_

Let's take a look at the record of the "liberal elite" in California:
1. They locked their kids out of public schools at the behest of the teachers' unions.
2. They forced small businesses to close with many never to re-open again.
3. They hobbled law enforcement and allowed drugs and crime to destroy their cities.

Everything on that list is a tragedy, and it's only made worse by the disregard and disrespect shown by leaders like Gavin Newsom. The idea of locking down your citizens and then darting off to the fanciest restaurant in the state to rub their noses in it.

It's wrong, it's disgusting, and it's no surprise that every day driving around Florida I see more and more California license plates as a result.

**In Florida, we didn't bludgeon our people with government mandates; we lifted people up -- protecting their jobs, their businesses, and their kids' education.**

**[Help us keep Florida free in November>>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7bd9a3d6d3f144b6ad2b5d16c6ee7880&_e=0H5w7yzhgkEe7WaxUSPlQrgnLJqX29WQhH03u5_gH8Gi3jTkE_p_0ndq2c4FibxsnfYzcbSa4w6QSXIxjBQpXaCu0SBE0bBXYjI0cQ_lBzavEIQNej-CiCZJawrW4bPFCrH_BIfYERb1UHcNuAEyILXe2Jl8e8-Z8y7zPXBgISRSfn8pUBcZadVtIWaoWb7DNoEkeUBB0Pg-z3IRnMzFHFbvtFdj8STTti9Y_CIQpI1SoNlRsbnxOMv77Pf9xr8VaBsrKLdCnuPKq7tuW7yat1Ofr5v-0b7P1oqinZuJFFsA_Srnq3ErL-gU4j2KTi6k-B1xcZ9Y-bLrzwcBR9oMLee2y9nsLFDln2p8k6QaI2lpmBS4x_Mg7216PculZvu2FsZMtQ6pT2dWU5Op_jhtug%3D%3D "Help us keep Florida free in November >>>")**

We didn't lock business owners out of their livelihoods and we didn't lock people out of their jobs.

**In Florida we didn't turn a blind eye to crime and drugs, we put criminals behind bars, and we kept our streets safe.**

Gavin Newsom doesn't want to talk about California, and I don't blame him. But the reality is, there are plenty of woke liberal billionaires on Gavin Newsom's speed dial who do not want to see individual freedom succeed. **_They don't want to see it succeed in Florida or anywhere else._**

Because if it succeeds, it shows everyone that the top down nanny-state tyranny of California is avoidable -- Free people making their own decisions are better off than a locked down citizenry dictated to by elitists.

That's why I need your help. Gavin Newsom, funded by Hollywood liberals, Big Tech billionaires, and who knows who else is running ads in Florida. _**I need your help to fight back.**_ **On our side are free people who care to stay that way. On their side is everyone who thinks they know better.**

**Show them that we intend to stay free:[Make a donation right now](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7bd9a3d6d3f144b6ad2b5d16c6ee7880&_e=0H5w7yzhgkEe7WaxUSPlQrgnLJqX29WQhH03u5_gH8Gi3jTkE_p_0ndq2c4FibxsnfYzcbSa4w6QSXIxjBQpXaCu0SBE0bBXYjI0cQ_lBzavEIQNej-CiCZJawrW4bPFCrH_BIfYERb1UHcNuAEyILXe2Jl8e8-Z8y7zPXBgISRSfn8pUBcZadVtIWaoWb7DewjlKQE6rpQwG8hdeLQ1hSUBJbmUAojyFeVpgimVm88z_pAu-J3TyzU7aUnCeH_MLCLuVpzf0xcDcWrCFf3IS9wogzmMOSkoM7IsRdt6c0m1VA96-kIEr3JPfS8Ab0PF6_997Dh3wrL2GuskmDp-rYJ6jZw3lR3VxijufmPOYhW4TiuqkymHM-jDONR0Z2tQwYldXWZyDnFqOB-icwcCSg%3D%3D "Make a donation right now") to help us fight back. You can use this** _**[secure link](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7bd9a3d6d3f144b6ad2b5d16c6ee7880&_e=0H5w7yzhgkEe7WaxUSPlQrgnLJqX29WQhH03u5_gH8Gi3jTkE_p_0ndq2c4FibxsnfYzcbSa4w6QSXIxjBQpXaCu0SBE0bBXYjI0cQ_lBzavEIQNej-CiCZJawrW4bPFCrH_BIfYERb1UHcNuAEyILXe2Jl8e8-Z8y7zPXBgISRSfn8pUBcZadVtIWaoWb7DqyIK7bNM-YzMBym6LEc2BGIVty1Tbjh-cia_TZnOmDBX4lBkvqoRpBZebLiIhJwf5gf8LtpahXM-LJ1flOzlhamgr1bI0z9YaRAdZGj_IkOhw4oZRpfV1N7VsYyx2kU4RLV2lw45fCDHh0J4qq0EaCYggJNdHTutW5EZ3_diYYsNyVbSwqZlZC85JitjRHr3wAZOsy9huruqA0Sf4rKBVg%3D%3D "secure link")**_.

Ron DeSantis

clean_body: Peter, Over the past three years, we have been called to make choices and answer questions we did not expect. Questions about how, in a world that seemed frightening and different, we were going to raise our kids, continue to put food on the table, and care for our communities? And questions that feel further out now like, how does our government interact with its citizenry in a time of crisis? How is our government -- one of the people, by the people, for the people -- meant to protect life, but not stifle liberty? In crisis, do we foster freedom? Or do we force our citizens down? Well, over the past three years I believe we have had the truth revealed about those two vastly different approaches. Not in an academic textbook or in a theoretical debate, but in the harsh reality of governing during COVID. You could not find two more starkly different examples than the free state of Florida and the woke tyranny of Gavin Newsom's California. It isn't hard to understand why the Governor of California wants to talk about Florida. It's part of the one topic he tries to focus on: Anything but California. Let's take a look at the record of the "liberal elite" in California: 1. They locked their kids out of public schools at the behest of the teachers' unions. 2. They forced small businesses to close with many never to re-open again. 3. They hobbled law enforcement and allowed drugs and crime to destroy their cities. Everything on that list is a tragedy, and it's only made worse by the disregard and disrespect shown by leaders like Gavin Newsom. The idea of locking down your citizens and then darting off to the fanciest restaurant in the state to rub their noses in it. It's wrong, it's disgusting, and it's no surprise that every day driving around Florida I see more and more California license plates as a result. In Florida, we didn't bludgeon our people with government mandates; we lifted people up -- protecting their jobs, their businesses, and their kids' education. "Help us keep Florida free in November >>>" We didn't lock business owners out of their livelihoods and we didn't lock people out of their jobs. In Florida we didn't turn a blind eye to crime and drugs, we put criminals behind bars, and we kept our streets safe. Gavin Newsom doesn't want to talk about California, and I don't blame him. But the reality is, there are plenty of woke liberal billionaires on Gavin Newsom's speed dial who do not want to see individual freedom succeed. They don't want to see it succeed in Florida or anywhere else. Because if it succeeds, it shows everyone that the top down nanny-state tyranny of California is avoidable -- Free people making their own decisions are better off than a locked down citizenry dictated to by elitists. That's why I need your help. Gavin Newsom, funded by Hollywood liberals, Big Tech billionaires, and who knows who else is running ads in Florida. I need your help to fight back. On our side are free people who care to stay that way. On their side is everyone who thinks they know better. Show them that we intend to stay free: "Make a donation right now" to help us fight back. You can use this "secure link". Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "DONATE NOW" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

body:
All you have to do is watch the evening news to see the media lie to us. But the media does more than lie. Here are at least 8
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zllil4ri11g40s0ju4vr0k5h02svle4obnt06fvo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrr6pjmciq7cdtmecom8tbhegqr8pb2mhgead9he1gnbdr3mspm8ptgeeqn4ptnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pbbd70eti6cdb0mdg6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933cljm9p71c5h60oh5u)

Friend,

All you have to do is watch the evening news to see the media lie to us.

But the media does more than lie. Here are at least _8 times the media committed crimes_.

1. **Hunter Biden 's Laptop **

For weeks, the media lied about the laptop with potential material on foreign business dealings, possible money laundering, national security issues, and more. [_**Click here to hold the media accountable for their crimes >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za4t9hkfol7ss34as2i91d26vv324id7tps4jaj0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjie2ob2c1h2bs)

2. **Clinton Russiagate**

Remember when Hilary Clinton said Trump was colluding with Russia? The media ran with the narrative and perpetuated the lie, causing great harm to the presidency.

3. **Fauci and the COVID Vaccine**

The facts showed that the COVID vaccine wasn't ready to be released as quickly as it was. But the media pushed for it, ignoring the potential health hazards.

4. **Governor Cuomo 's brother's sex scandal**

CNN's Chris Cuomo allegedly committed sexual harassment, and the network covered it up from the public for as long as possible. [_**Support MRC 's mission to stop the media's crimes >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkha0fi4j5oche14kaslrmoq1vjjrrmsajq4rkvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjie2ob2c1h2bs)

5. **Cuomo nursing home deaths**

During COVID, the media concealed the number of deaths in New York nursing homes to support their lockdown narrative.

6. **Supporting the person who leaked the SCOTUS memo about Roe v. Wade **

SCOTUS memos are not public until a final decision is made--it's an important part of the judicial process. The media should not have shared the Supreme Court document and supported whoever leaked it.

7. **Brian Williams presenting himself as a war hero**

NBC anchor Brian Williams lied about being a war hero, stealing valor from the brave men and women who **actually** served our great nation. [_**Click here to help MRC expose the media 's lies >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmkbv52g0s6oqsmccahp5l4d6a0u78dsotthm628_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cjie2ob2c1h2bs)

8. **Jussie Smollett 's staged crime**

The actor lied about being the victim of a racist and homophobic attack, diverting police resources into a false investigation. The media ran with it before finding out the facts.

That's why the Media Research Center's (MRC) work is so important.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media--over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Chia pets and a real email program
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28]
Team,
As part of this email list you’re on, I wrote you a while back about my favorite collection – Chia Pets (see below for a refresher in case you’ve somehow forgotten). One email, back on March 23rd.
Since then, I’ve had people approach me at campaign events exclusively to talk about the Chia Pets. I’ve been regaled by people singing the 1980’s Chia Pet commercial (cha-cha-cha-Chia!). And, on top of that, last month a supporter bought me a gift of a new Chia Pet – a Bart Simpson one, to boot – to add to my collection.
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28]
It’s a silly story, but it illustrates a broader point: we actually write our emails! I’ve always tried to have an email program that allows me to connect with people, rather than just bombard you with over-the-top rhetoric to make a quick buck. Something that I can use to update folks on my campaign, my work back in D.C., and the occasional fun anecdote from my normal life.
I’m glad that’s something we’ve been able to achieve together – Chia Pets and all!
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28]
Elissa
Team,
Today is a special day for me, and I wanted to make sure you all were included. No, not end-of-quarter (we’ll get to that in a minute)... it’s National Chia Day. While I’m sure the seed industry had something else in mind, I’m taking it as National Chia PET day.
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28]
S omething you may not know about me is that I have a rather extensive Chia Pet collection. As a child of the 80’s, I was given one at one point, and over the years have seemed to accumulate them. I sometimes refer to them as “my other pets” (please don’t tell Rocky and Boomer).
They’re a great, low-stress plant for someone like me with a crazy schedule, and they’re my favorite centerpieces when guests come to visit. I have a dog, a cat, a George Washington bust, and the strangest two (since they have no fur!) are a hippo and a frog.
I don’t really have much more to say other than in honor of spring, they make a lovely 80’s themed display in the yard. So, if you have Chia pets, or just a fondness for those commercials, as we approach our first end-of-quarter deadline of the year, I’m asking if you will chip in $5, $10, or $15 to help us grow our campaign and compete in the most competitive House race in Michigan. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28]
Elissa

Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

clean_body: Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28] Team, As part of this email list you’re on, I wrote you a while back about my favorite collection – Chia Pets (see below for a refresher in case you’ve somehow forgotten). One email, back on March 23rd. Since then, I’ve had people approach me at campaign events exclusively to talk about the Chia Pets. I’ve been regaled by people singing the 1980’s Chia Pet commercial (cha-cha-cha-Chia!). And, on top of that, last month a supporter bought me a gift of a new Chia Pet – a Bart Simpson one, to boot – to add to my collection. secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28] It’s a silly story, but it illustrates a broader point: we actually write our emails! I’ve always tried to have an email program that allows me to connect with people, rather than just bombard you with over-the-top rhetoric to make a quick buck. Something that I can use to update folks on my campaign, my work back in D.C., and the occasional fun anecdote from my normal life. I’m glad that’s something we’ve been able to achieve together – Chia Pets and all! CONTRIBUTE [] Elissa Team, Today is a special day for me, and I wanted to make sure you all were included. No, not end-of-quarter (we’ll get to that in a minute)... it’s National Chia Day. While I’m sure the seed industry had something else in mind, I’m taking it as National Chia PET day. secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220715&amount=28] S omething you may not know about me is that I have a rather extensive Chia Pet collection. As a child of the 80’s, I was given one at one point, and over the years have seemed to accumulate them. I sometimes refer to them as “my other pets” (please don’t tell Rocky and Boomer). They’re a great, low-stress plant for someone like me with a crazy schedule, and they’re my favorite centerpieces when guests come to visit. I have a dog, a cat, a George Washington bust, and the strangest two (since they have no fur!) are a hippo and a frog. I don’t really have much more to say other than in honor of spring, they make a lovely 80’s themed display in the yard. So, if you have Chia pets, or just a fondness for those commercials, as we approach our first end-of-quarter deadline of the year, I’m asking if you will chip in $5, $10, or $15 to help us grow our campaign and compete in the most competitive House race in Michigan. [] CONTRIBUTE [] Elissa [#] About Elissa Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [] and Twitter. name: Tom Perez
subject: can I count on your vote Peter?
body:
Peter,

I’ve proudly dedicated my entire life to public service — fighting for jobs, justice, and opportunity here in Maryland and throughout our country.

Whether on the Montgomery County Council, as Maryland’s Labor Secretary, as a civil rights prosecutor or as U.S. Labor Secretary under President Barack Obama, I’ve taken on — and won — big fights for working families. **Even President Obama said if you _“look at his body of work on behalf of working people, he has been extraordinary.”_**

I’m proud of the work I’ve done, and I’m proud to share my story with Marylanders.

**[Primary Day is on Tuesday, and I’m hoping I can count on your vote. Can you click here to watch my ad, and then make your plan to vote on Primary Day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47908836/356134954/1994940469?refcode=email_071622_obamaad_md_t2&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmZiYzRlOS0wZjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YuFrMDOEMgV7_JQXa6oCf4ENFYIn2Ihb-JXFl82BNmE=)**

Listen Peter, running for Governor is no easy task – but hard work isn’t new to me.

I’m the proud son of immigrants from the Dominican Republic. I helped put myself through college by working on the back of a trash truck, umpiring baseball games, working at a warehouse, and more.

I know the value of hard work, and Maryland deserves a Democratic governor who will work hard and deliver results, not just rhetoric.

This ad highlights what I’ve done throughout my career in public service: delivered. I’m ready to continue delivering results as Maryland’s next governor. But I need your help to get there.

**[Peter, I’m humbly asking for your vote on Tuesday, whether you vote by mail, early in-person, or on election day. Make sure you make a plan to vote. And if you’re already a part of Team Tom, thank you! Forward this email to three close friends or family members and make sure they get out to vote too →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47908837/356134955/1994940469?refcode=email_071622_obamaad_md_t2&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmZiYzRlOS0wZjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YuFrMDOEMgV7_JQXa6oCf4ENFYIn2Ihb-JXFl82BNmE=)**

Thanks so much for your support,

Tom

---

But if you would like to **[unsubscribe, click here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/AuhxpCAewE-gGfgmSslfcQ2?unsubscribedata=dB%2Bu6GX88MHKHhskJ6VeygAhy5vmTC%2F5o1QOtUmyJ%2BtLcQdW6%2BtIxVUneQvK%2FYdyFlg3xAT%2Bqz0dYyvYZ%2FvUmXwGDoNftsh8xEyG9Tb7v869EZ8U7R%2FmjqySMOHxhtVSFkdA7zBlS3zVdvG1N1rZ06ZoRu4DEb7FosidBuvu%2BwiKCEKMJPDdg45T7aOY%2FTdf13NlLjtTJGICoZG1IhGbAM2SE%2FdNOqcIBsbE2YftkMnJL%2BwRr5Vj9dv%2FknTnk%2FdmF5c8%2FY1cu7l%2FK9JBBJxDWblGH5FQTeqaV5H4DIg20Zq%2BNSwLqmErqDiU25lyoTxoTVUfJ5PlmNmeIV6kqkAEscLLxLGx56TTaq0%2Fy2%2BCyJG3u%2FNWFFwGBoazCIHQl9J5FF1avXFbc%2BpbIrWZPhxZELLb%2BD5ywSSlD4m05brmCDFzTU2VvuYyI4PbTfcoFqu6)**.

name: Vance Press Team
subject: JD’s Top Hits!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ohioans for JD Inc
body:
|
---
Happy Saturday from your favorite newsletter, JD’s Top Hits!

It’s been an exciting few weeks on the trail, we hit the road on a law enforcement tour and walked a few Fourth of July parades.

Thanks always for your support, check out what we’ve been up to.
[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ced4f2c9a2244243be4428876a9464fa&_e=YFKYWYWbfAAWoggg4hlWucF2RNloELCoQBK-DqlCvqNT4FfT3IZUDwt1nvz3gZOahFBLdC3ykG9T8YEmxVLvPlTwUX5W5TAunXqqE59Y8PnzVAHwMXxL0ImaHCBEiyfdZJEeKOSLC65bjZrJwtqqPSId-1SU0fNHeJu5mDIcagXk0KxAmKHip7A6x9mPg44PKeMxoi4XK5rWJUc9qbwM8bBznM7_4nJoxKUnZlcy5D_MkwPHH8lellG81gQigaiSponeS7KrICYeg5prHd_46nEp0fB5HUxofBdnU7_ws30FJubr3Fj5geMKpkCnro6f3KoxlnwXk9xirPDlOrXGAw%3D%3D)

**JD** embarked on a **law enforcement tour** across Ohio, including Dayton, [Ottawa,](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ced4f2c9a2244243be4428876a9464fa&_e=YFKYWYWbfAAWoggg4hlWuYaHTRP01PkIWi5tYhD1H_YENliyqUmFGvTuuNiWg8uG2gBfS2o5MmhC1OTkG8kn73uzZRQa7XnX34nNf5IjlCpMCI3ZeMk4B6XthbYmZUCeRpV2uO9ebGF9H_TzXlSZ7O2kOK9GniuavH8fxxZchHi_DvNRo0KcupaaiB-2xXOtRBZPzWryVv5YNauwQ9h3WtJA56cV0rIAFO03uHm1vyCWymx7QUok-cjI9m4cUhX_APBGuE2L3SnM5JHqjgeXhz-8lW2lr4ocGjjRZv8lsEyWx7SbrfrpfwTzdQKO2kH4OnJ_3_EhfSvU7YhHrGH4NKcdUX3sYqZui-rEkdoJWN8%3D) Youngstown, Zanesville, Columbus, Washington Court House, Lebanon, and Cincinnati, to learn more about the challenges Ohio police face.

He recounted some of his thoughts in this [**thread.**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ced4f2c9a2244243be4428876a9464fa&_e=YFKYWYWbfAAWoggg4hlWuYaHTRP01PkIWi5tYhD1H_bdyuDUR7Mz7qewcumBcb5te_uwZ3oQbznquYloqCuqG3kCZSRuvCPfDhpB31cBEYuyiSxtZLH_MYd_KBLR4QvzBkg0iqVmrFPk2YaO7gNaOnE1bJAZTrpNe8E-LEPXlrRjvG2EstEBP2GFC7pCZ7dpx9bcefLsYDY4qM-tQJ3dRPdiI33yWDBiowu1iUtFqDCLdMrD5l2WNK5ghN963q9iMu0ZqH7E8m5gWsD5aDuM8cKqVZse6NIgocej_41YAneegbMVfvU2WAfheE2C4u1hskeJzBmvhXEU6OUvmEV0Kw%3D%3D) Here’s a sampling:

_“Many guys are second or third generation officers and they beg their sons and daughters to avoid police work. They’re exhausted and overworked. They arrest people and see them back on the streets the next day. They are harassed, sometimes at their homes, but constantly online and by political activists and leaders. They deserve so much better. And more importantly: this is how we descend into barbarism. If you can’t recruit good cops, how do you protect a civilization? We are playing with fire right now. The people harassing police officers, accusing them of being the new Jim Crow (hi[**@TimRyan**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ced4f2c9a2244243be4428876a9464fa&_e=YFKYWYWbfAAWoggg4hlWuWw_cQ6N9FQzJJSe9s32J8epgEWuz1Wu6qVUXeCIVVkkdlJ5pkm6qe6BDaU-TsQvNPuoNG4wu2ztoaAj6bWb622RAkcSQKxVzIBJAXylQcAzbr1k7fbCq712RfZInHv6vGu-idBZzWrfI23gjmDvB9latp52PiuF-z6dWU8opkFQE4oE0ukENzHrAs3QpzryMJWDWgzX7ST_rSKqzyR02oAm6Hle1d7poSx2p9eyf_tccDhNdy6kBCDft_gfdVf1hA%3D%3D)), and destroying their budgets are turning our country over to violence and chaos. Time for some big changes.”_

**JD** also crushed Tim Ryan for his soft on crime record in an interview on NBC:

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ced4f2c9a2244243be4428876a9464fa&_e=YFKYWYWbfAAWoggg4hlWuYaHTRP01PkIWi5tYhD1H_YENliyqUmFGvTuuNiWg8uGmsbXTJYdSJtS1Uek9_QZj-IXjipchm3J-VmNsVC3ygX7bUCr9zNn4-OLk45QG3TI60uLzrDsbNdXr8z49TM1a13f62m7p6dKNDgMCiuAatPEVuwq1xX9fq8-ebMpS2bcamsNW-P4N8g90ygQIj9j3zXiq7PYmYEBxVJrTMCpAz4omf37z3Oj21s2YpXo2o8OGclmk9yzsKrl8qh6tWRyP4tLGo3uNU8AjkK0K3uNMSljLQHnyoIy87EL3y1IEz3v)

"It's terrible. [Tim Ryan] is a guy who, in the wake of the George Floyd killing, called all police systemically racist and said law enforcement was the new Jim Crow."

**JD** weighed in on Twitter as well:

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ced4f2c9a2244243be4428876a9464fa&_e=YFKYWYWbfAAWoggg4hlWuYaHTRP01PkIWi5tYhD1H_aNVwNM61qVLvzvdd3lFxwaPhqy6FiNeBGwWtF_XUdjxWz9UUlSxlAMxIztAe_V54o300iE7SR4ClTPpJQWBCK36UK2lhJid9DQqtTrlsA5k4KF6LavpxcBl9uFt6iu9BR7iT1R6sBOMmr_vu0jQyR-U7890IA8xYlCaDr8cu23tVTYDj9-v0rAhAqzkErNrdos4D8G7qpYdpRVb4O0uJimten2SCJnFbLY5H4NrA01DGPbjnkF5_-JWKtvWyvKanx8K6X5rk_76dydhiTWTCP1)
**Tucker Carlson** called out Tim Ryan for being a fraud:

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ced4f2c9a2244243be4428876a9464fa&_e=YFKYWYWbfAAWoggg4hlWuYaHTRP01PkIWi5tYhD1H_YENliyqUmFGvTuuNiWg8uGez8_gZ6Gm2GL_qrpZ8_MZoD3VVWQGoBs9rnO5cdnr7U9Q2BJl3vszTlVUKNy39PKDhKePrHs_otp5SKTSqSF8WF5C7VPrXx9Aq8p9wsffyJV2Gs4YB1gWv6lHd7MycYU_RZOQj7PsTnN-btNgKSsAT-gE9EtQxu2ytUS8vzBLRjbbPfP4yaoSekbc_BueVt8U7tiVXcVaJXKO1SQ27JjsZloGu5oJuioBEP_Qiu7u63tGuzF6xK3Ib3-peDEse_ReFvuNN_pDeekizECxIyjszOKyNTvwJh3rUrPqOnHkU4%3D)

"Tim Ryan may be the most disappointing Democrat in the US Congress ... For a little while, he posed as someone who understands the trials of the people he represents ... guy's a total fraud, and he knows he's a fraud, and we called him on it"

Speaking of fraud, Tim Ryan is pretending to be a moderate, but he’s endorsed by AOC, one of the most liberal politicians in the country.

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ced4f2c9a2244243be4428876a9464fa&_e=YFKYWYWbfAAWoggg4hlWuUIbQXXM8ar2h8Arwkfb1Sva8-piov7y06HKqmlz4IO4AC1LmuwPzcw4F4iSXqkWRIhkcYIol_PEMdCILcK6AEuyW3uE98YdofBNtROm_YLddyGVf43dWi5PDnLHu9ZM4wbv4_8BJy3QQHWqHgs0yZGuVXekNiEsvcpmzoLmcEq6Oaii9M__pIbfT4GKSD5bPIMCk55JwQG8KEGu4ZbERgJ3cUh2kceat15ZHtoMM9If-aRSiyzYN9r9B6lNESMbRjk_-MopFt0f2NqF-FEZyZdRGeKcezsGYijCHNpqxh1GaINzaQ53B9EyBkUIdHeWM083MUjECFds9L-n1GyRkl26AvZXFCEFogdBnpnfuYPc)

**REP. ALEXANDRIA OCASIO CORTEZ** unveiled her newest endorsement: **TIM RYAN.** It’s no surprise Tim Ryan received an endorsement from one of the furthest-left members of Congress: **Tim Ryan votes with AOC 95% of the time.**
[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ced4f2c9a2244243be4428876a9464fa&_e=YFKYWYWbfAAWoggg4hlWuYaHTRP01PkIWi5tYhD1H_YENliyqUmFGvTuuNiWg8uGfKZFLLs9mJTsucXK3AcpXtqqjg1-fHgh3w94WVy0PX0c8-R5ZFDyEqPLXRi_h-X6pzK5v4aIlhb_np-ghIgbP5OgOrnjpX8cAF0_Ic5MgvxXGXOstj3V68t-D72zqPT3lzgtJG0QNcISmDkapIQ4-aSqHMTTSBaqMnR0j5xQVVfkDuEzKhlKAiiPY-h50PvV8iHDRgWqeElvm40t2ijxMyoT6_g4gIUavkrFDxdSb4msz7idoXcF33x4_50MTk9u)

**Tim Ryan is living off of his taxpayer-funded salary to campaign, all while he isn’t showing up for work.**

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ced4f2c9a2244243be4428876a9464fa&_e=YFKYWYWbfAAWoggg4hlWuY0k0uVmRpPZE1SesF4O1KUNfvVCY30TBCZXLYFOKiTwx6bALaOGKi0LjuiwtyAPy4JW2JoBpWZ0rbBSecyzHBeA6uhxRaeQphVShh6oDsRz_S5d-M_01LyNMq_9cv2fiPGfQ-nSgGVYMQMxRzzJVjbJtNWKgbx7LvDor1OtvH4jBH1ryxODUqPIqNOWkR81n5nek2FpxxlyATZAoOuQ1eWUVBU5dHIssIMMAqoUidqHWAwTCD9WHdJDXOt0VVluTNVfsDWe64tVgj156LizLDmxt9BcIgeoGFWF6ZS2uW7yEkxJ3sKN2i6dmiI9_Gyfxn4MBYmempHbB76cIXIsemo%3D) [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ced4f2c9a2244243be4428876a9464fa&_e=YFKYWYWbfAAWoggg4hlWuXA9NFGuGKzGQejz35grhKF2JFLJU12VYjL3TNED8xXni6Et81kdVbWiGZVYf9v0X3eeBi0A6u6EctWn-KMskeA3XkTBJZhxb86upMnC0WzP78NCPOFXrGWgOANpQqZ0QvF3umPx96-SLHfBKv0Ad5MdnJkr3UQW1ACR-WQYqYUQ6_Bp-GRN2qslgaCZIA7iVMT8z9-1Vx7wOBcpep55rXB5LqeX8lhG6a69RONhs_v0e2TPUl_us0DAKnJDiYfnYY1rLG3PCemKfF1KGfRMuKHKoCEm1sUQ9xoxk221chPbGip5sN6Tn6vHj1MBK8vYsA%3D%3D) [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ced4f2c9a2244243be4428876a9464fa&_e=YFKYWYWbfAAWoggg4hlWubBit351V0hQJ-fUwyD-0XSF7MobQ8UThw30_iNbs9UjjuJViUmb1s9-qnqXJYV6qjKuCahnIBgzF2coPoW3GqJfxOmLK-Lf1KgVN3PlN3FsOBugkBOH5R0wLGfi7gjjN6rL5eKl3u1vnITqsAgbPM9IYVlBFtAjFwxQR-poi9tqXRN3JRgKbxtHefebCCJVZY1fowTFvffVq5C2bJKPyHUBJJMCatXLgNfY4va7a85mQQQic2k5oF84bEASjAvZJUb6afJYW_7UasqaXgcwBriWkIBS9CNsNdGcEwSLUOCSksLVfPc8IYw-_fuwa_IFB7v2Jzds6JmATqzQtyVqU-myPxsmwGZRgLyd30aU7lGE)

**JD** blasted Tim Ryan for his lies and abuse of taxpayer dollars:

**_JD: "I don't know what's worse, Tim Ryan showing up or not, because he votes with Joe Biden 100% of the time. It's hilarious that a guy who claims to speak for working people, is claiming two years after the pandemic that COVID prevents him from showing up and doing his job.”_**

When Tim Ryan does decide to show up to work, he **votes with Biden 100% of the time,** including for Biden’s trillions in far-left, reckless spending that delivered us **40-year record inflation.**

clean_body: | Happy Saturday from your favorite newsletter, JD’s Top Hits! It’s been an exciting few weeks on the trail, we hit the road on a law enforcement tour and walked a few Fourth of July parades. Thanks always for your support, check out what we’ve been up to. JD embarked on a law enforcement tour across Ohio, including Dayton, Youngstown, Zanesville, Columbus, Washington Court House, Lebanon, and Cincinnati, to learn more about the challenges Ohio police face. He recounted some of his thoughts in this Here’s a sampling: “Many guys are second or third generation officers and they beg their sons and daughters to avoid police work. They’re exhausted and overworked. They arrest people and see them back on the streets the next day. They are harassed, sometimes at their homes, but constantly online and by political activists and leaders. They deserve so much better. And more importantly: this is how we descend into barbarism. If you can’t recruit good cops, how do you protect a civilization? We are playing with fire right now. The people harassing police officers, accusing them of being the new Jim Crow (hi), and destroying their budgets are turning our country over to violence and chaos. Time for some big changes.” JD also crushed Tim Ryan for his soft on crime record in an interview on NBC: "It's terrible. [Tim Ryan] is a guy who, in the wake of the George Floyd killing, called all police systemically racist and said law enforcement was the new Jim Crow." JD weighed in on Twitter as well: Tucker Carlson called out Tim Ryan for being a fraud: "Tim Ryan may be the most disappointing Democrat in the US Congress ... For a little while, he posed as someone who understands the trials of the people he represents ... guy's a total fraud, and he knows he's a fraud, and we called him on it" Speaking of fraud, Tim Ryan is pretending to be a moderate, but he’s endorsed by AOC, one of the most liberal politicians in the country. REP. ALEXANDRIA OCASIO CORTEZ unveiled her newest endorsement: TIM RYAN. It’s no surprise Tim Ryan received an endorsement from one of the furthest-left members of Congress: Tim Ryan votes with AOC 95% of the time. Tim Ryan is living off of his taxpayer-funded salary to campaign, all while he isn’t showing up for work. JD blasted Tim Ryan for his lies and abuse of taxpayer dollars: JD: "I don't know what's worse, Tim Ryan showing up or not, because he votes with Joe Biden 100% of the time. It's hilarious that a guy who claims to speak for working people, is claiming two years after the pandemic that COVID prevents him from showing up and doing his job.” When Tim Ryan does decide to show up to work, he votes with Biden 100% of the time, including for Biden’s trillions in far-left, reckless spending that delivered us 40-year record inflation. JD blasted Tim Ryan on Newsmax: JD: "Everything is getting more expensive, and so if you're getting a 3% raise at work you're actually getting 6% poorer because of the 9% inflation ... I think in Ohio, we both blame the president but we also blame failed congressional leadership." Breitbart and The Ohio Star picked up the story as well: In one article, JD said: “Joe Biden and Tim Ryan have decimated America’s energy sector and spent money we don’t have instead of rebuilding our broken economy. The Biden-Ryan agenda has failed Ohio. It’s time for new leadership, and a new direction." JD joined Charlie Kirk to blast Tim Ryan and Democrats for their ridiculous energy policies: JD: "They're blaming Joe Biden [for soaring gas prices], because Joe Biden came out and said two years ago that he wants the American people to pay more for energy so that we'll transition to a green economy." JD told WKBN: "We've got to get back to drilling, to exploring, to refining our own energy in this state, because we've got great resources. We can employ Ohioans to do it. It would also drive down costs for consumers." Last week, Joe Biden visited Ohio. But, Tim Ryan, who votes with Biden 100% of the time, was nowhere to be seen. Surprising, since he was a “Biden Campaign Surrogate!” Luckily, Ryan’s absence didn’t go unnoticed: Across Ohio, JD and the Vance Team wished America, ‘Happy Birthday!’ SOCIAL. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Do you want to know something really really really cool
disclaimer_text: paid for by YOU
body:
We’re so proud of this.
#
Do you want to know something really, really, REALLY cool about our campaign, Derek?
**To date, the average donation to our campaign is just $29.87.**
Seriously, what’s more Democratic + egalitarian than that?!
As Gisele puts it, our campaign does not take “icky, dirty money” of any kind. Here’s what his promise has been since Day 1:
👉 You won't find John begging corporate PACs for giant checks or calling up dark money groups for help. (We can’t say the same for our opponent, Dr. Oz.)
👉 You’ll never have to wonder if he is voting in the interests of actual Pennsylvanians, or corporations + big-dollar donors
👉 You’ll watch John flip this seat + head to Washington as Democrats’ 51st vote knowing this victory was 100% bought + paid for by YOU.
We don’t expect yinz guys to give to every single email we send, Derek. (That would be kind of awesome, though.) But we do hope that when you’re able to, you’ll chip in to make a direct + immediate impact on this historic campaign.
[**_What do you say, will you match our average donation of $29.87 (or even more) today? John is counting on grassroots donors like you to come through, and we wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important!_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220716-1?refcode=em20220716-6539&refcode2=6539_434096_enCTpj&akid=6539%2E434096%2EenCTpj)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220716-1?refcode=em20220716-6539&refcode2=6539_434096_enCTpj&akid=6539%2E434096%2EenCTpj)**
🙏 Thanks for all you do,
Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220716-6539-footer&t=1&refcode2=6539_434096_enCTpj&akid=6539%2E434096%2EenCTpj)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Hello,
My mother worked alongside my dad in Lebanon Farm Shop well into their 70s. They refused assistance from their many children even after they lost their life savings in the Savings and Loan debacle of the 1980s. My mom in coveralls, petite as she was, handing tools to my dad is an indelible image I carry with me to this day.
My dad built a business repairing farm implements. In a way, I think he hoped that I’d stick around and take it over, but that wasn’t to be. I joined the Navy after getting a scholarship and my life as a machinist and welder came to a close.
Dad said very little about his service in the Second World War. He had the burns and shrapnel of his first ship sinking, and would provide some quips about surviving a night amongst the flotsam and death off Guadalcanal, but he didn’t dissuade me from enlisting. My mom had the bravery in saying quite simply, “The healthy bird flees the nest.” She wiped her eyes on her apron as I drove up the hill on my way to ‘boot camp.’ It took me some time to understand why.
You could say my mom and dad embodied rural Iowa values in their unique ways: Family, hard work, sacrifice, education, and honesty. And I think of them every day on the campaign trail, because it’s those values that drove me to run for political office.
**After nearly 4 decades serving in the United States Navy, I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because it’s time politicians in Washington fight for everyday people like my folks.**
The early polls all show this will be a close race, so of course, I’m facing down millions of dollars in Super PAC attacks. I don’t come from some political dynasty, and I’m not taking corporate PAC money. Instead, I’m relying entirely on the donations of generous grassroots donors like you.
**There’s less than 12 hours until our next critical fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still short of our $25,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and win. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, may I count on you to make a donation to my campaign today – before our fundraising deadline? Every dollar you can give today will help me build a campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47928181/356192878/-42398318?refcode=em20220716mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDUxNmUxZS0zMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WQ2_7RCdShJYQ3-zetUPB4vIJO7uVKZLGd5EiIPQOCU=)

clean_body: If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Hello, My mother worked alongside my dad in Lebanon Farm Shop well into their 70s. They refused assistance from their many children even after they lost their life savings in the Savings and Loan debacle of the 1980s. My mom in coveralls, petite as she was, handing tools to my dad is an indelible image I carry with me to this day. My dad built a business repairing farm implements. In a way, I think he hoped that I’d stick around and take it over, but that wasn’t to be. I joined the Navy after getting a scholarship and my life as a machinist and welder came to a close. Dad said very little about his service in the Second World War. He had the burns and shrapnel of his first ship sinking, and would provide some quips about surviving a night amongst the flotsam and death off Guadalcanal, but he didn’t dissuade me from enlisting. My mom had the bravery in saying quite simply, “The healthy bird flees the nest.” She wiped her eyes on her apron as I drove up the hill on my way to ‘boot camp.’ It took me some time to understand why. You could say my mom and dad embodied rural Iowa values in their unique ways: Family, hard work, sacrifice, education, and honesty. And I think of them every day on the campaign trail, because it’s those values that drove me to run for political office. After nearly 4 decades serving in the United States Navy, I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because it’s time politicians in Washington fight for everyday people like my folks. The early polls all show this will be a close race, so of course, I’m facing down millions of dollars in Super PAC attacks. I don’t come from some political dynasty, and I’m not taking corporate PAC money. Instead, I’m relying entirely on the donations of generous grassroots donors like you. There’s less than 12 hours until our next critical fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still short of our $25,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and win. So I have to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With Senate control on the line, I am so grateful to have the support of people like you. I think my mom and dad would appreciate the support, as well. Thank you, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Humbly asking for your help today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Without your support, Republicans will have a hard time winning the House majority. I'm personally asking: can we count on you today?

|

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60816290:6ezC1NVtN:m:1:3253819041:BF1C928EF37A58EBDA9708D6ECEA9D7C:r)
---
Peter

As a front-line Republican and steadfast ally of President Trump, **Democrats have long targeted me for electoral defeat in November's election.**

They don't like debating with me with regard to important legislation in the House; **and they cannot stand how we're helping the American public come to the realization that Democratic leadership in Congress is more focused on partisanship than getting things done for the American people.**

So, if you agree with me that:

* We need to secure the southern border

* We should defund sanctuary cities

* All life is sacred and should be protected at all costs

**[Please consider endorsing my campaign for re-election today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60816290:6ezC1NVtN:m:1:3253819041:BF1C928EF37A58EBDA9708D6ECEA9D7C:r)**

Your endorsement today will serve me well as my team and I continue to implement our America First agenda in the House.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60816290:6ezC1NVtN:m:1:3253819041:BF1C928EF37A58EBDA9708D6ECEA9D7C:r)

Thanks,
Jim

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

name: Team Schiff
subject: Reading the barometer as we head towards November
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| The quarterly release of campaign reports to the Federal Election Commission shows which campaigns have momentum and who is favored in House and Senate races across the country this fall.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=502%2E5257348%2ESWJwdD)
Derek,
The biggest campaign fundraising news of the midterm elections to-date just broke, and every major news outlet in the country is covering it.
The quarterly release of campaign reports to the Federal Election Commission shows which campaigns have momentum and who is favored in House and Senate races across the country this fall.
Not only that, it will be used by Republican dark money Super PACs allied with Kevin McCarthy and Mitch McConnell to decide who is vulnerable and where they will be spending their resources.
Democrats in competitive House districts across the country simply can’t afford to come up short.
**[So with FEC reports now public, we’re asking: Will you contribute $10 to Adam’s campaign so he can keep fighting to protect our House majority no matter what the Republicans spend?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jul2022_abs_em.4MLSU6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220716_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=502%2E5257348%2ESWJwdD)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

As much as we like to keep you informed about the issues Adam is fighting for in Congress, the truth is we need to keep him and House Democrats in the majority if we’re going to make any progress at all on climate, gun safety, taking on corporate greed, and much more in these next two years.
Thanks for always standing by Adam’s side when it counts.

Happy Saturday #TeamScheller! Here is your Scheller for Congress Newsletter! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f02dfdb1cd7d/scheller-for-congress-newsletter-9040377?e=db8085a287)
---
# Lisa Scheller for Congress Newsletter!
Happy Saturday, #TeamScheller![9.1%](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=8072037456&e=db8085a287)... Can you believe that?That’s the increase in America’s inflation rate for the month of June, and it’s all thanks to the policies of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and our so-called “moderate” Congresswoman, Susan Wild. She has voted in line with the Biden/Pelosi agenda 100% of the time and will continue to do so.
Since we must work together to take back the House now more than ever, I’d like to invite all of you to a great fundraising event this month: “Shooting with Scheller!”
From 3-7 p.m. on Saturday, July 30, come join me at Lehigh Valley Sporting Clays for a half-round of shooting, followed by a dinner reception afterward. Please contact Sam Greener at (703) 717-8544 or [sam@schellerforcongress.com](mailto:sam@schellerforcongress.com) for further details. I look forward to seeing everyone there, as well as speaking and taking your questions during dinner!In just 115 days, we will vote to retire Susan Wild. We will end the Democrats’ one-party control of Washington, and their policies that threaten the American Dream in the Lehigh Valley.I hope you will join me on this journey! -Lisa

| [Join the team!](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=9057192926&e=db8085a287)
---
# Small Businesses Are Struggling
This past weekend I went to go get my favorite PA ice cream, Leiby's in Carbon County when I saw this sign that broke my heart.Susan Wild likes to blame small businesses for the rising cost of goods when it was actually the trillions of dollars in new spending she approved.I guess that is what happens when you sell out the Lehigh Valley to do Nancy Pelosi's bidding.
|
---
# News from the trail!
Biden Begs for Oil in Saudi Arabia While Killing American Energy in the US
President Joe Biden has traveled to Saudi Arabia to meet with Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman.For one, the meeting comes after gasoline prices reached record highs in the United States last month. In a _Washington Post_ [op-ed](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=fc26fb04c7&e=db8085a287) last week, Biden stated his goal of using the bin Salman meeting to push for an increase in Saudi oil production. However, Biden authorized widespread oil exports from American reserves during the spike; they argue he should focus more on domestic oil production than foreign.
Instead of begging other Countries for oil, Biden should expand American energy production and stop his leftist Green New Deal policies that are hurting American families. Not surprisingly, Susan Wild has not said a word on this.
|
---

Festival in Roseto!
Coal Miner Heritage Festival

name: Demings, Val
subject: fighting back against Rubio's vicious lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to keep my ads on the air
| | |
---
**Friend: I have bad news. Right now, Marco Rubio and GOP super PACs are****preparing to spend MILLIONS on attack ads that smear my name and record – and I’m falling short of my goal to raise $50,000 for my TV Ad Fund.

If I miss this goal, I won’t be able to stay on the air and defend myself from Rubio’s lies, but here’s a status update as of 5 p.m.: **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47928645/356194855/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3745-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmVjZTk0ZC0zNTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j1IsuSuxuv1ImCq4UUSs5_aCTu4baC_3fsxWmgmiJfY=)
In the race that will determine Senate control, polling shows that I am _neck and neck_ with Marco Rubio. **And, with Florida’s last Senate race being decided by just 10,033 votes (0.12% of the vote), every single Floridian that I can reach WILL make an impact. **
But running ads in Florida is _exceptionally_ expensive. Experts have even said that going on air this early in the year could leave us out of funding by Election Day – but truthfully, we had no other option.
With the GOP actively trying to destroy my reputation and momentum with baseless attack ads, I had no choice but to launch my ads early to fight back. I refuse to let this race be decided by lies, but I need YOUR help to amplify my message. With the Senate Republican campaign arm sitting on a war chest of over** _$45 _****_MILLION_** , which they can pour into Florida at any minute, my TV Ad Fund goal is absolutely critical.
**Friend, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to keep my ads on the air and help me fight back against Rubio's vicious lies.****So please, help flip Florida blue, defend the Senate and protect our democracy from the GOP’s far-right agenda:**
**[_Will you rush a donation of $5 or more before my MIDNIGHT deadline to help me hit my TV Ad Fund goal? I’m still short, and I need your help to close the gap and reach more Florida voters with the truth. _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47928646/356194856/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3745-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmVjZTk0ZC0zNTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j1IsuSuxuv1ImCq4UUSs5_aCTu4baC_3fsxWmgmiJfY=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Schwab?=
subject: Advance vote in-person TODAY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwab for SOS, Matthew Goddard, Treasurer
body:
Advance in-person voting begins today in many Kansas counties. | | | |
---
| | | Kansas voters,

Advance in-person voting begins TODAY in many Kansas counties, and advance by mail ballots are sent only to voters who requested a ballot!

Click [HERE](https://scottschwab.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=637dedc6f5c04616f44b83bbf&id=c9639b880c&e=e4cd931cf2) to:
* Locate your polling place
* Find your county's advance voting schedule
* Request an advance by mail ballot
* Check the status of your advance by mail ballot

While the voter experience has not changed, there are additional safeguards in place to ensure the security and integrity of your vote. This is due to legislation I was proud to introduce during the 2022 legislative session. Beginning in this election, the following new security measures are in place:
* Ban voting equipment from being connected to the internet
* Expanded post-election audits
* Cleaned voter rolls to ensure accuracy

Don't forget - Kansas state law requires voters to show photo ID when casting a ballot. Heading to the polls today? Take your ID!

Regardless of how you choose to cast your ballot, I hope you will take advantage of the voting options available and participate in this important election.

All my best,
---
|
---
| Scott Schwab
Secretary of State

P.S. Share this message with friends and family and encourage them to join you at the polls!
---
| [GET INVOLVED](https://scottschwab.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=637dedc6f5c04616f44b83bbf&id=7d615fc3ec&e=e4cd931cf2 "GET INVOLVED")

name: Charlie Crist
subject: The Golden Rule
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47928741/356195349/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220716_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmE1NWI2Ni0zNzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jq6xIvvDyyNDD5D4XyPU-vA3PsmtL8LkpOyEPeCsnXo=)
---

The Golden Rule, friends:
_“Do unto others as you would have them do unto you.”_
Every day, I try to live according to that principle.

Sometimes, it can be hard to be so idealistic. Our current “leaders” are more interested in serving their wealthy donors than the people of Florida. Instead of “doing unto others as you would have them do unto you” they would do anything to further their own ambitions.

**That's why it's so important we win this November.**

This year is our chance to defeat the cynical politics of self-interest. I've been traveling up and down the state talking to voters and everywhere I go people are eager to see that change. It's past time we start treating each other decently again. When you talk with regular folks, you quickly realize Floridians are not as angry and divided as the politicians on TV. We actually agree on a lot of what needs to be done.
★ We agree that we need common-sense gun reform to put an end to the terrible mass shootings.
★ We agree that everyone deserves a fair shot at a good life.
★ And we overwhelmingly agree that the governor shouldn't demonize people for being different – or even just disagreeing with him.
Unfortunately, Governor DeSantis doesn't agree with the vast majority of Floridians on these issues. That's why it's so critical that we defeat him this November.

Here's the good news: Our message is resonating. The latest polling from _The Listener Group_ shows we're beating Ron DeSantis. Even a secret Republican poll showed that we're winning a very close race.

But running a campaign is still expensive — I'm not funded by millionaires and billionaires. I rely on grassroots supporters like you. body:
My primary election is less than THREE weeks away. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/this-election-is-a-matter-of-life-or-death?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e992a6cb95&e=645b3b1338)

| | | Dear Peter,

**_My primary election is less than THREE weeks away_**.

I am reaching out to let you know _just how important_ this midterm election is.

Even with Roe v. Wade being overturned, radical Leftists working at Planned Parenthood are **_STILL_** murdering babies.

**One absolutely horrifying story came out this week. In Minnesota, multiple BORN children were left to DIE after their mothers unsuccessfully attempted to kill them in the womb.**

**_This is the scary reality that Democrats REFUSE to talk about._**

We cannot allow the Democrats to continue with a majority in Congress after this election. **_We NEED to make a change THIS election, before more lives are lost._**

If you want to see 100% pro-life Republicans fighting **on the frontlines** for the right to life, support my reelection campaign.

I [co-sponsored](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=d0a2358a4f&e=645b3b1338) legislation that sought to PERMANENTLY ban federal funding for abortions. **_But, this did not pass due to the Far-Left majority in Congress._**

With the momentum the pro-life movement has after Roe v. Wade was overturned, we **_MUST_** keep up the positive energy and vote out **_ALL_** the pro-abortion Democrats that **turn a blind eye to baby murder and the sanctity of each individual life.**

[**Stand with me and the pro-life agenda by rushing an urgent donation to my campaign today.**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=dbf1541d32&e=645b3b1338)

The Leftist-owned media has teamed up with the billionaire Democrat super PACs and donors to try and defeat me this election.

I **_NEED_** to rely on pro-life and pro-Trump grassroots Conservatives like yourself to ensure I can keep fighting for you and your family in Washington!

[**Are you willing to join me in the fight for the right to life today? >>**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4c0ead5387&e=645b3b1338)
[**_< < DONATE $200 TO PROTECT LIFE >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=707c4cdf54&e=645b3b1338)

[**_< < DONATE $100 TO PROTECT LIFE >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=06f3802d2e&e=645b3b1338)
[**_< < DONATE $75 TO PROTECT LIFE >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=20dfd1da68&e=645b3b1338)
[**_< < DONATE $50 TO PROTECT LIFE >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=70a81d52d2&e=645b3b1338)
[**_< < DONATE $20 TO PROTECT LIFE >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f5f5d6d044&e=645b3b1338)
Thank you for your support.

God Bless,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7b83329683&e=645b3b1338) Paul Gosar, D.D.S. Currently Serving Arizona’s 4th CD
Candidate for Arizona’s 9th CD _**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4107330c4f&e=645b3b1338)**_

P.S.: It hurts to see the amount of disrespect the Left shows towards human life. [**Donate**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9dcdbfafc6&e=645b3b1338) to my reelection campaign so I can get through this midterm and keep pushing pro-life legislation through Congress.

**[With your help, we can secure a pro-life majority THIS year and save millions of unborn children from being brutally murdered. Thank you in advance for your generosity](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7cd8190967&e=645b3b1338).**

clean_body: Join our winning movement today | | | | | | | | \- ALLOY ANALYTICS Friend, Have you seen this? Yet another poll shows Blake standing head and shoulders above his opponents with a commanding DOUBLE-DIGIT LEAD. This poll is just the latest of many that all show the same results: Blake consolidating the support of America First conservatives and pulling clear of the competition. Blake is thrilled with the news, yet he knows our work is far from over. We MUST keep the momentum going if we 're going to take back Arizona. Friend, as the Primary Election nears, its become clear that Blake is theonly candidate who has what it takes to defeat socialist Mark Kelly and flip the Senate. Together with patriots like YOU, we 're going to reclaim our country from the far Left. SUPPORTER: CONTRIBUTION STATUS: PENDING DEADLINE: SOON ** It's no surprise that after CRUSHING the competition in the debates and picking up key endorsements, including President Trump,Blake has surged to a BIG lead in the Primary Election. Blake knows we cannot rest on our laurels now though; there is too much at stake in this election. We MUST bolster our resources to defeat Clinton-Obama-Biden puppet Mark Kelly and the Democrats' massive fundraising machine. Friend, Blake needs YOU to step up and help our movement reclaim Arizona and our Senate majority. Thank you, Team Blake | | Contributions to Blake Masters for Senate are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. |

Derek, We are getting closer to reaching our mid-month fundraising goal! With only a few days left until our deadline, we here at the DPVA are crunching to make sure we raise another $5,000 before the weekend is up. Meeting our fundraising goals is _**absolutely essential**_ as we continue to offer the necessary support and resources to Democrats across the Commonwealth. #

This isn't the news we were hoping to share this morning.
Yesterday, we emailed and texted about our mid-month grassroots fundraising drive... and the truth is that we fell short of our goal.
Is it ideal? No.
Is it the end of the world? Also no.
We ran the numbers this morning, and if we receive 57 donations via email today, we can still make up for it and get back on track for the second half of July.
These goals aren't arbitrary — they're what we need to raise to fund a campaign that can take on the corporate and political establishment and **_WIN.**_
We know it's a lot to ask, but these are the stakes. What do you say?
[**Can you please make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to our grassroots campaign for Congress today? Alessandra cannot do this alone.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?refcode=em220716-1-t3&refcode2=926_59515_BPmf7C&akid=926%2E59515%2EBPmf7C)

A new report reveals that Senator Raphael Warnock used campaign funds to cover personal legal expenses from a lawsuit brought against him by a member of his church in Atlanta.

This is just plain wrong - _and illegal_. After all, it is a violation of federal law to spend campaign donations for personal use.

To divert attention away from his campaign violations and disastrous record of voting with President Biden 96% of the time, Senator Warnock's campaign has launched a series of attack ads against Herschel Walker. They've clearly decided that since they can't defend their own record, they only have one option left: attack, attack, attack!

Herschel is down a point or two in the polls, **but he can pull ahead again if we increase our Media Fund and run our ads across Georgia.**

clean_body: This headline says it all. Now he’s attacking to distract. | Fellow American, A new report reveals that Senator Raphael Warnock used campaign funds to cover personal legal expenses from a lawsuit brought against him by a member of his church in Atlanta. This is just plain wrong - and illegal. After all, it is a violation of federal law to spend campaign donations for personal use. To divert attention away from his campaign violations and disastrous record of voting with President Biden 96% of the time, Senator Warnock's campaign has launched a series of attack ads against Herschel Walker. They've clearly decided that since they can't defend their own record, they only have one option left: attack, attack, attack! Herschel is down a point or two in the polls, but he can pull ahead again if we increase our Media Fund and run our ads across Georgia. Raphael Warnock is: 1. Breaking campaign finance laws (a real Washington move). 2. Raising MILLIONS to bury the truth about his troubling record. 3. Taking our country in the wrong direction. 4. Barely ahead in the polls. Senator Warnock has proven that he's a typical Washington politician who doesn't think the laws apply to him. It's time to hold him accountable. Thanks, Team Herschel | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen=20Brown=20for=20Congress?=
subject: The heart and soul of Texas
body:
This is why I’m running for Congress | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=c95422e082&e=4712f71bea)
---
| [Give Today!](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=217a1604b1&e=4712f71bea "Give Today!")
---
| Do you know what motivates me?

It’s _**you**_.

It's the farmer who works tirelessly day in and day out to harvest crops that will feed our state and country.

The single mother who pours her love into her children and works two jobs to support her family.

The teacher who shapes our next generation of changemakers in the classroom, all while navigating a global pandemic.

**It’s these hardworking Texans – the heart and soul of Texas’ 13th District – who motivate me.**

I am inspired every single day to be the best candidate possible so I can be your representative and lead with the compassion our district deserves.

[**Will you join me on this journey and help elect me as your next Representative of Texas’ 13th District?**](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=8f04f4973f&e=4712f71bea)
---
| [Elect Kathleen Brown](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=d6f6990c5f&e=4712f71bea "Elect Kathleen Brown")
---
| Campaigning isn’t easy, especially when you’re up against Ronny Jackson. But I know that you******– **and every Texan **– **deserve someone who truly cares about you and who will never stop fighting for you.

[Can I count on you to support my campaign with a $15, $50, or $100 donation so I can defeat Ronny Jackson and truly represent the heart of Texas in DC?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=6d43d8da66&e=4712f71bea)

Thank you for reminding me why I’m here and for being part of this team.

Kathleen Brown

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark?=
subject: Fentanyl
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE
body:
‌ |
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brnoforaz/fentanyl?e=6dcd2506d1)
---
| Two men stand outside in a cow pasture as night begins to fall.

They’re wearing cloth masks and between them is an open flame...

But these aren’t two Covid-Conscious-Campers...

**They’re fentanyl cooks for the Sinaloa Cartel. **

Tonight’s cooks are experienced...

They know to move their bodies if the wind shifts, or they risk inhaling the toxic fumes and facing certain death.

It happens all the time...

Cooks drop down dead in a field and the Cartels don’t shed a tear.

All they care about is getting as much of their fentanyl into the U.S. as possible...

Where it’ll fetch as much as $10,000 per pound.

And you better believe that a lot of that fentanyl is being smuggled right into Arizona.

**Doesn’t it make you SICK?**

Mexican drug lords importing countless tons of poison across OUR borders each day...

And getting it directly into the hands of gangbangers and thugs...

Bad folks who have made it their lives’ mission to pass their poison onto our children.

**Have you ever Googled “Fentanyl Overdose?”**

I’d recommend you don’t.

It might make you cry...

_“Fort Wayne woman charged in daughter’s fentanyl overdose.”_
_\- 1 Day Ago_

_“14-year-old is suspected of overdosing on fentanyl”_
_-21 hours ago. _

_“Arrest report details day of woman’s fentanyl overdose death”_
_-1 Day Ago_

_“Father says his son was poisoned after taking half a Percocet pill laced with fentanyl.”_
_\- 1 Day Ago_

_“Man pleads guilty in child fentanyl overdose case”_
_\- 2 Hours Ago_

_“Man charged in fentanyl overdose death of mother of 3”_
_\- 21 Hours Ago. _

_“Coroner warns public of possible tainted pills following 2 overdose deaths.”_
_\- 1 Day Ago_

Let’s be clear...

**The Cartels are MURDERING Americans at unprecedented rates...**

And yet Joe Biden and his radical-left advisors want to keep defunding the border and making it easier-and-easier for fentanyl smugglers to come into this country.

It’s not just wrong...

It’s flat out immoral...

And this is one of the BIGGEST reasons why I am running for the U.S. Senate.

So I can FIGHT for Arizona, and for our country.

**There’s not a single candidate in this primary with**[**a stronger track record on securing the borders**](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=77a3cf31d7&e=6dcd2506d1)**than I have. **

In fact, one of my opponents was _for_ open borders until a few short years ago...

And in a time of crisis, like this...

We simply can’t risk sending anyone else to Washington.

Too many lives are at stake...

**Which is why I need your help. **

I’m counting on you to get out and vote for me on August 2nd.

And remember that when you do give me your support...

When you share this email with every single voter that you know...

And when you rally your friends and neighbors together to all TAKE A STAND...

It could be one of the most patriotic actions you ever take.

Heck, you could even save someone’s life.

God Bless,

Mark

**P.S.** It’s no secret I hate asking for money. But we’re also at the very home stretch of the primary. [**If you haven’t donated to my campaign yet**](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=fa7acc804a&e=6dcd2506d1)**,** it could be the difference between who controls the Senate next year. Everything helps, $5, $10, $20, and I’m counting on you.

---
| | PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE.
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Brnovich for Senate, All rights reserved._

**Brnovich for Senate**
PO Box 497
Phoenix, AZ 85007

You can [update your preferences](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=02ad8a9704&e=6dcd2506d1&c=4d20d49f7f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=02ad8a9704&e=6dcd2506d1&c=4d20d49f7f).

body:
The Senate is on the line.
#
Peter,

With each passing day, it becomes clearer what Republicans are fighting for: an out-of-touch extreme agenda that benefits themselves and leaves others behind.

**[We can stop them. Rush in $5 now to help us expand our Senate majority>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47929638/356199513/-227477173?refcode=pm_em_220716_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE1Nzg0MC0zYzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19ngKSHp9tA-6fdrOyeF2aaUopYqjz-JU0LplzCED8w=)**

MAGA Republicans are ready and willing to do anything to flip this seat and regain Senate control. If they’re successful, they’ll put corporations and the ultra-wealthy first while hiking taxes on working families, fighting for a national abortion ban, and tearing away more of our rights.

But we can fight back today, Peter, by stopping Mitch McConnell’s push to flip Washington state red and electing more pro-choice Democrats to the Senate.

With 52 Senators, Democrats will have the votes they need to get Patty’s bill to defend reproductive rights to President Biden’s desk.

**[We still need to raise another $9,247 to meet our mid-month fundraising goal to stay on track to defend Washington state. Will you chip in $5 now to help us fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47929639/356199514/-227477173?refcode=pm_em_220716_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE1Nzg0MC0zYzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19ngKSHp9tA-6fdrOyeF2aaUopYqjz-JU0LplzCED8w=)**

Thank you,

Team Patty

name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: Time for action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Democrats, I wanted to directly share an email with you that I sent to over 100 members of the Indiana media yesterday. Please read and then see how you can take action below. ###
Dear Hoosier media outlets / reporters: The last week has me deeply concerned about the path the Indiana Republican Party will take Indiana over the coming weeks. It looks like the Indiana GOP is putting Richard Mourdock’s [views from a decade ago](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47929691/356199979/586086184?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGE2YWVhZi0zZDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aKXIPY_AEp5Agi16NHKout5CNSZ-0m0SsfMJPQcK7Bk=&emci=98b31ccc-3905-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=f4a6aeaf-3d05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) on lightspeed. In just 24 hours, they have:
* smeared a physician for helping a 10-year-old rape victim attain a legal and safe abortion,
* broadcasted this doctor’s name and face on national TV before receiving the paperwork that proved she followed state laws and did nothing wrong,
* geared up to waste more taxpayer dollars on media plays for attention, and
* seemed to support the [national model legislation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47929694/356199982/2089897576?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGE2YWVhZi0zZDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aKXIPY_AEp5Agi16NHKout5CNSZ-0m0SsfMJPQcK7Bk=&emci=98b31ccc-3905-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=f4a6aeaf-3d05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) (which I believe the Indiana GOP will follow during the special session), which would have forced this girl to have her attacker's child.

Attorney General Rokita and attorney Jim Bopp are endorsing a level of dialogue that will endanger Hoosier women and families. This rhetoric is extreme -- and out of the mainstream -- and will lead to doctors and pro-choice advocates being targeted. So this is why I ask you to get every prominent Indiana GOP official (including Governor Holcomb, statewide candidates, the Congressional delegation, and the state supermajority) on the record:
1. Do they support Todd Rokita’s public smear campaign against a doctor who legally followed state law? If not, will they condemn his violent rhetoric against the doctor?
2. Do they agree with Jim Bopp’s belief that minors should be forced to have a child, especially if they were raped or experienced incest? If not, then would they support exceptions for rape and incest should you pursue a statewide abortion ban?
3. Do they believe Right to Life’s model legislation is the best bill for Indiana? If not, where do they stand? What about the exception for the life of the mother?

So far, the Indiana GOP have been quiet and cowardly -- [even meeting behind closed doors to figure out what they're going to do](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47929697/356199985/374062510?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGE2YWVhZi0zZDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aKXIPY_AEp5Agi16NHKout5CNSZ-0m0SsfMJPQcK7Bk=&emci=98b31ccc-3905-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=f4a6aeaf-3d05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) while Democrats are ready to get to work for people. They’ve dodged people like you about their plans for a total abortion ban for the Hoosier State, because they know how unpopular and extreme their plans are to voters. They’d rather caucus in secret than talk about one of the most personal issues facing voters. Thank you for the work you do each day to hold our elected leaders accountable -- particularly on an issue like this one that will define our state's future. Sincerely, Mike
### Democrats, This is why it’s necessary for us to take action. It’s why we must band together and do everything possible to protect the right for a woman to make her own reproductive health care choices. We must tell Republicans that politicians have no place in the doctor’s office. Contact the Indiana GOP. Reach out to your elected officials and let them know they must not pass their extremist agenda — one which would endanger the lives of women across our state. Come to the Statehouse the first day of session — Monday, July 25th — to rally for women's rights. **[Please also consider a donation. clean_body: | Democrats, I wanted to directly share an email with you that I sent to over 100 members of the Indiana media yesterday. Please read and then see how you can take action below. ### Dear Hoosier media outlets / reporters: The last week has me deeply concerned about the path the Indiana Republican Party will take Indiana over the coming weeks. It looks like the Indiana GOP is putting Richard Mourdock’s on lightspeed. In just 24 hours, they have: smeared a physician for helping a 10-year-old rape victim attain a legal and safe abortion, broadcasted this doctor’s name and face on national TV before receiving the paperwork that proved she followed state laws and did nothing wrong, geared up to waste more taxpayer dollars on media plays for attention, and seemed to support the (which I believe the Indiana GOP will follow during the special session), which would have forced this girl to have her attacker's child. Attorney General Rokita and attorney Jim Bopp are endorsing a level of dialogue that will endanger Hoosier women and families. This rhetoric is extreme -- and out of the mainstream -- and will lead to doctors and pro-choice advocates being targeted. So this is why I ask you to get every prominent Indiana GOP official (including Governor Holcomb, statewide candidates, the Congressional delegation, and the state supermajority) on the record: 1. Do they support Todd Rokita’s public smear campaign against a doctor who legally followed state law? If not, will they condemn his violent rhetoric against the doctor? 2. Do they agree with Jim Bopp’s belief that minors should be forced to have a child, especially if they were raped or experienced incest? If not, then would they support exceptions for rape and incest should you pursue a statewide abortion ban? 3. Do they believe Right to Life’s model legislation is the best bill for Indiana? If not, where do they stand? What about the exception for the life of the mother? So far, the Indiana GOP have been quiet and cowardly -- while Democrats are ready to get to work for people. They’ve dodged people like you about their plans for a total abortion ban for the Hoosier State, because they know how unpopular and extreme their plans are to voters. They’d rather caucus in secret than talk about one of the most personal issues facing voters. Thank you for the work you do each day to hold our elected leaders accountable -- particularly on an issue like this one that will define our state's future. Sincerely, Mike Democrats, This is why it’s necessary for us to take action. It’s why we must band together and do everything possible to protect the right for a woman to make her own reproductive health care choices. We must tell Republicans that politicians have no place in the doctor’s office. Contact the Indiana GOP. Reach out to your elected officials and let them know they must not pass their extremist agenda — one which would endanger the lives of women across our state. Come to the Statehouse the first day of session — Monday, July 25th — to rally for women's rights. = The upcoming special session will be a major political moment for Indiana. Will Indiana Republicans side with the extremists or stand with women? Large majorities of Hoosiers are lining up against the views of the supermajority — and they will make their voices heard this summer and this November at the ballot box. Thank you for taking action, and for your support. Mike [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org.
