name: Tina Kotek
subject: Peter, will you endorse my campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter — I’m running for Governor to take on the big fights and continue building a future of opportunity and justice for every Oregonian. I’ve got a track record of fighting for Oregon families — from passing paid sick leave, to expanding background checks on gun sales, to raising the minimum wage, to protecting access to reproductive health care. But it’s not nearly enough. Oregon needs a leader who puts people first, who prioritizes justice and equity, who brings people together, and inspires all of us to reach for a better future. **That’s why I’m asking for your personal endorsement.** [**Will you become an official supporter of my campaign for Governor to move Oregon forward?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47929748/356200044/857154942?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220716_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWE2YWVhZi0zZDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJFn0AjNBQont2WaQGhA1Bseej_cnqTQB_6fGsxOgdI=&emci=9f39aa4f-3b05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=faa6aeaf-3d05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47929750/356200046/857154942?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220716_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWE2YWVhZi0zZDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJFn0AjNBQont2WaQGhA1Bseej_cnqTQB_6fGsxOgdI=&emci=9f39aa4f-3b05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=faa6aeaf-3d05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729)
---
In the aftermath of the Supreme Court’s _Dobbs_ decision overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , abortion rights will now be determined on a state-by-state basis. That means Oregon’s next governor will have to step up and lead to make sure abortion remains accessible in our state.
We need a real champion of reproductive rights more than ever. Christine Drazan has frequently touted her long-standing support from anti-abortion extremist group Oregon Right to Life. And Betsy Johnson recently got excited about an anti-choice extremist running “Republicans for Betsy.” That’s why I am the only candidate in this race endorsed by Planned Parenthood PAC of Oregon and Pro-Choice Oregon.
And with gun violence taking a huge toll on communities across the country, I’m the only candidate with the courage to stand up to the NRA and fight for common-sense gun laws to keep our communities safer. I’ve been endorsed by Giffords PAC, and I’m a Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate. My opponents have both earned an “A” rating from the NRA.
**From reproductive rights to gun violence prevention to taking action on climate, the winner of the Governor’s race will have a _lot_ of power over the future of Oregon. This is a consequential election for everyone, so it will be critical to have your support in this tough race.**
[**If we’re going to win, we need an all-hands-on-deck approach. Will you join me and personally endorse the campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47929751/356200047/857154942?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220716_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWE2YWVhZi0zZDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJFn0AjNBQont2WaQGhA1Bseej_cnqTQB_6fGsxOgdI=&emci=9f39aa4f-3b05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=faa6aeaf-3d05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729)
Thank you for having my back. It really makes a difference.
Tina
Tina for Oregon
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242 **[tinafororegon.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47929752/356200048/1133357015?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220716_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWE2YWVhZi0zZDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJFn0AjNBQont2WaQGhA1Bseej_cnqTQB_6fGsxOgdI=&emci=9f39aa4f-3b05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=faa6aeaf-3d05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729) | [info@tinafororegon.com](mailto:info@tinafororegon.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47929754/356200050/-1830937231?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220716_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWE2YWVhZi0zZDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJFn0AjNBQont2WaQGhA1Bseej_cnqTQB_6fGsxOgdI=&emci=9f39aa4f-3b05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=faa6aeaf-3d05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729)** | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Please consider endorsing my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60816303:6ybqmNVkN:m:1:3317145305:0462A96133B59E0535B1BAAB8B877F0E:r)
---
Peter

As a front-line Republican and steadfast ally of President Trump, **Democrats have long targeted me for electoral defeat in November's election.**

They don't like debating with me with regard to important legislation in the House; **and they cannot stand how we're helping the American public come to the realization that Democratic leadership in Congress is more focused on partisanship than getting things done for the American people.**

So, if you agree with me that:

* We need to secure the southern border

* We should defund sanctuary cities

* All life is sacred and should be protected at all costs

**[Please consider endorsing my campaign for re-election today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60816303:6ybqmNVkN:m:1:3317145305:0462A96133B59E0535B1BAAB8B877F0E:r)**

Your endorsement today will serve me well as my team and I continue to implement our America First agenda in the House.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60816303:6ybqmNVkN:m:1:3317145305:0462A96133B59E0535B1BAAB8B877F0E:r)

Jim

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Biden Admin vs Abortion Activists | Pramila Jayapal: Expand
Supreme Court! | Bernie Backs Zuckerman in VT | Vote in MD Tuesday | Labor
Stands with Levin| Pitchforks in the Hamptons - TAX THE RICH | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5972?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220716_1_1.xCv9qX&t=1011&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]Become a monthly donor to fight far-right authoritarians and corporate
control. We need YOU to maximize our collective action and pressure on
Washington.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1012&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

Make sure to mark your calendars for 8:30p ET/5:30 PT next Monday (July
25th) when Our Revolution will host US Rep. Ilhan Omar (MN-5) and other
great progressives on our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1014&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1015&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

JAYAPAL ON DEMOCRATIC ACTION & RACES
EXPAND THE SUPREME COURT!

Our Revolution officially endorses US Rep. Pramila Jayapal (WA-7) for
re-election to Congress, where she serves as Chair of the Progressive
Caucus.

Rep. Jayapal joined our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1016&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]National Organizing Call Monday, laying out
concrete actions Democratic leadership can take now to fight for abortion
rights and deliver for our lives.

“Our strength comes in times of crisis. This is a moment for us to
organize,” she said. “We must expand the Supreme Court and hold these
rogue justices to account.”

(More on abortion rights in the ‘Progressive Policies’ section below)

She said progressives are pushing for a higher amount of student debt
cancellation and hope to get it before the moratorium ends on Aug. 31st.
“Another executive action would raise the overtime threshold for pay raise
to 30M workers.”

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1017&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]Dems must use their power to deliver tangible results and earn trust
and votes to stop a red wave in November. Help us maximize pressure on
Washington NOW.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1018&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

The Congressional Progressive Caucus is up to 100 members and Rep. Jayapal
is thrilled to welcome new movement allies we’re helping elect to the US
House – folks like Summer Lee in PA and Delia Ramirez in IL.

“We have a whole slate of candidates across the country destroying the
myth that progressives can’t win in swing districts,” Rep. Jayapal said.
“And, Our Revolution candidates aren’t just progressive, they’re
organizers — we need more organizing on the inside.”

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1019&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]As Rep. Jayapal said: “They want us to get discouraged - we don’t let
that happen.” Become an active member with Our Revolution to keep growing
progressive dominance in Congress.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1020&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

ZUCKERMAN ENDORSED BY BERNIE — AND US!

Our Revolution joins Bernie in our strong endorsement of David Zuckerman
to return to the post of Lt. Governor of Vermont!

David is an organic regenerative farmer and longtime progressive
independent voice in the VT House and Senate, where he’s led on: economic
justice, marriage equality, cannabis reform, renewable energy, water
quality, universal healthcare, and more.

David said they’ve built a coalition of folks challenging incrementalist
Dems in Vermont to meet the urgency of our times, while also reaching
working-class folks of all stripes.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1021&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

“Bernie inspired me when I was a student in ‘92 — he said exactly what he
believed and didn’t put his finger to the wind,” David said. “Some folks
on the other side actually agree with us, they’re just sick of
mealy-mouthed politicians.”

He said our progressive policy message resonates with folks who feel left
behind. “You used to come out of high school and be able to get a
manufacturing job — that’s all gone.”

“Reaganomics, ‘trickle-down,’ international exploitation of low-wage work
overseas – all made it so decent people can’t put food on the table or a
roof over their head,” David said. “We’re on the ground with folks seeing
their issues and working to solve them.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=1022&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]Join David and Our Revolution in the fight for economic, racial,
social, and environmental justice! Sign up to make calls with our 2022
Phonebank Force to get our progressive message out to the whole country.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1023&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

Our Revolution is proud to back Marc Elrich - one of our most effective
progressive allies - as he fends off a challenge from a healthcare CEO for
re-election as Montgomery County Executive in Maryland.

“I like doing the work. The most important thing someone can do with their
lives is to be purposeful and make a difference.” Marc told us on our
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6089?t=1024&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]National Organizing Call Monday night.

Since his election in 2018, Marc has worked hard to make strides on key
priorities of environment, public education, healthcare, and economic
justice — earning him the trust and support of a diverse coalition.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1025&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

In his next term, Marc told us his “goal is to accelerate our climate plan
and push for rent stabilization” — earning him the ire of wealthy
developers seeking taxpayer giveaways.

Marc is proving that “a lefty can not only win but govern so effectively
that voters want to return him to office,” reports [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6083?t=1026&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]FAIR.org. — despite
staunch opposition from the world’s third richest man, Jeff Bezos, and his
newspaper.

Marc was a beloved 5th-grade teacher at Rolling Terrace Elementary, then a
City Council and County Council member. He got his start in the movement
by listening to MLK Jr. speak at the March on Washington and later was
arrested at an anti-apartheid protest.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1027&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

In 2018 - by just 77 votes! - Marc beat out former Healthcare CEO David
Blair, who’s running again on massive ad spends — which we are countering
via direct voter outreach.

Recent polls show Marc with the lead and he has an excellent shot to win
this primary, but we’re mobilizing to power him over the finish line on
Tuesday!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6068?t=1028&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]SIGN-UP HERE to call voters for Marc and other great progressive
candidates ready to partner with our movement for positive change.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1029&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

VOTE TUESDAY FOR SHEILA RUTH

Tuesday is also Election Day for progressive Del. Sheila Ruth who’s vying
for a first full term on the Maryland State Assembly (District 44B)!

Sheila serves on the important Environment and Transit Committee, where
she is working hard for a well-planned transportation system. On our
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6089?t=1030&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]LIVE Broadcast Monday, she laid out the economic and equity impacts
for poor and marginalized folks in Baltimore.

Sheila is a champion for state-based universal healthcare — “there’s no
reason we can’t get it done in Maryland,” she told us. “And, we must allow
the AG to sue fossil fuel companies for the damage of the climate crisis —
taxpayers shouldn’t be on the hook for that!”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=1031&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]Sign-up to GOTV for Sheila, Marc, and other great candidates! Like
Sheila said: “It’s about building progressive power — we need more of us
in office at the state and local level.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1032&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

JOINING LEVIN FOR LABOR RALLY & CLIMATE CANVASS

Our Revolution rallied this weekend with labor unions and climate
activists working to re-elect US Rep. Andy Levin to Congress to represent
Michigan-11.

Our Revolution leader Don Mongrain helped lead a canvassing training for
volunteers hitting the street to knock on every door we can ahead of
Election Day Aug. 2nd!

Our folks were proud to rally and put in the work alongside union leaders
from across the district. On Monday, Andy joined striking workers at the
Bloomfield Hill Nursing Home demanding what they deserve.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1033&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

Members of Our Revolution also joined Andy and climate activists last week
to canvass neighborhoods and let folks know that Andy is THE CLIMATE
CHAMPION in this race.

While his opponent takes fossil fuel money, we know that Rep. Levin - an
original cosponsor of the Green New Deal - is dedicated to good-paying
union jobs and a prosperous green economy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5529?t=1034&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]Join our call team to GOTV for Andy! Bernie sounded the alarm on the
far-right money targeting this race and called on all of us to make sure
we re-elect this critical ally in Congress.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1035&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

We’re halfway through the 2022 primaries — and we’re still stacking up
major progressive wins for Congress: Greg Casar (TX-35), Summer Lee
(PA-12), Jasmine Crockett (TX-30), Jamie McLeod Skinner (OR-5), Andrea
Salinas (OR-6), Delia Ramirez (IL-3) and Jonathan Jackson (IL-1), and
others!

As corporate Dems sabotage their own prospects for the midterms, we’re
growing progressive power at every level of government so eventually,
we’ll outnumber them — and can override their complacency and complicity
in blocking progress.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5967?t=1036&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]Become a recurring donor TODAY to help us take down the worst
corporate Dems in these primaries and give voters the most electable AND
progressive candidates in November!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1037&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

This 2022 primary season, Our Revolution Phonebank Force has made more
than 500,000 phone calls to voters across the country! We’re recruiting as
many folks as possible to hit that one-million mark and beyond!

Right now, we have shifts for incredible candidates for Congress like
Brittany Ramos-DeBarros (NY-11), Andy Levin (MI-11), David Segal (RI-2),
Melanie D’Arrigo (NY-3), and many others!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1038&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]COMMIT TO A CALL SHIFT

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1039&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1040&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

Our rights are being stripped; climate chaos is intensifying; mass
shootings and police brutality are rampant; and most of us are struggling
to pay for food, gas, housing, healthcare, and, well, everything.

Naturally, the message from Corporate Dems is basically: shut up and vote
harder.

“I don’t believe the President can’t find a way to move two senators in
his own party — the president has the power, the reputation as a
dealmaker,” Our Revolution Political Director Aaron Chappell told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6127?t=1041&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]The
Hill. “We’ve been yelling about a looming disaster for a while now, and
we’ve tried to be very reasonable.”

“The president had plenty of warning with the leak on Roe v. Wade, and I
think it’s really hard to convince people to come back out with this kind
of response.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6126?t=1042&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ][IMG]

Sadly, the quote above is completely on-brand for Corporate Dems to
display such disdain and indifference toward pro-choice Americans doing
the work to defend our rights.

Here’s the deal, Jack: If Dems did their jobs, activism wouldn’t be such
heavy lifting. If they don’t want to do their jobs, then stop kneecapping
progressives who will.

The kicker — President Biden has been in talks with Mitch McConnell to
appoint an [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6128?t=1043&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]anti-abortion judge to a lifetime seat in Kentucky.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6129?t=1044&akid=3155%2E5885482%2EJNw-sP ]It’s time for progressives to take the reins from corporate DNC

HEADLINES: Biden Admin vs Abortion Activists | Pramila Jayapal: Expand Supreme Court! | Bernie Backs Zuckerman in VT | Vote in MD Tuesday | Labor Stands with Levin| Pitchforks in the Hamptons - TAX THE RICH | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Become a monthly donor to fight far-right authoritarians and corporate control. We need YOU to maximize our collective action and pressure on Washington. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Make sure to mark your calendars for 8:30p ET/5:30 PT next Monday (July 25th) when Our Revolution will host US Rep. Ilhan Omar (MN-5) and other great progressives on our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call! [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] JAYAPAL ON DEMOCRATIC ACTION & RACES EXPAND THE SUPREME COURT! Our Revolution officially endorses US Rep. Pramila Jayapal (WA-7) for re-election to Congress, where she serves as Chair of the Progressive Caucus. Rep. Jayapal joined our [ ]National Organizing Call Monday, laying out concrete actions Democratic leadership can take now to fight for abortion rights and deliver for our lives. “Our strength comes in times of crisis. This is a moment for us to organize,” she said. “We must expand the Supreme Court and hold these rogue justices to account.” (More on abortion rights in the ‘Progressive Policies’ section below) She said progressives are pushing for a higher amount of student debt cancellation and hope to get it before the moratorium ends on Aug. 31st. “Another executive action would raise the overtime threshold for pay raise to 30M workers.” [ ]Dems must use their power to deliver tangible results and earn trust and votes to stop a red wave in November. Help us maximize pressure on Washington NOW. [ ][IMG] The Congressional Progressive Caucus is up to 100 members and Rep. Jayapal is thrilled to welcome new movement allies we’re helping elect to the US House – folks like Summer Lee in PA and Delia Ramirez in IL. “We have a whole slate of candidates across the country destroying the myth that progressives can’t win in swing districts,” Rep. Jayapal said. “And, Our Revolution candidates aren’t just progressive, they’re organizers — we need more organizing on the inside.” [ ]As Rep. Jayapal said: “They want us to get discouraged - we don’t let that happen.” Become an active member with Our Revolution to keep growing progressive dominance in Congress. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ZUCKERMAN ENDORSED BY BERNIE — AND US! Our Revolution joins Bernie in our strong endorsement of David Zuckerman to return to the post of Lt. Governor of Vermont! David is an organic regenerative farmer and longtime progressive independent voice in the VT House and Senate, where he’s led on: economic justice, marriage equality, cannabis reform, renewable energy, water quality, universal healthcare, and more. David said they’ve built a coalition of folks challenging incrementalist Dems in Vermont to meet the urgency of our times, while also reaching working-class folks of all stripes. [ ][IMG] “Bernie inspired me when I was a student in ‘92 — he said exactly what he believed and didn’t put his finger to the wind,” David said. “Some folks on the other side actually agree with us, they’re just sick of mealy-mouthed politicians.” He said our progressive policy message resonates with folks who feel left behind. “You used to come out of high school and be able to get a manufacturing job — that’s all gone.” “Reaganomics, ‘trickle-down,’ international exploitation of low-wage work overseas – all made it so decent people can’t put food on the table or a roof over their head,” David said. “We’re on the ground with folks seeing their issues and working to solve them.” [ ]Join David and Our Revolution in the fight for economic, racial, social, and environmental justice! Sign up to make calls with our 2022 Phonebank Force to get our progressive message out to the whole country. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is proud to back Marc Elrich - one of our most effective progressive allies - as he fends off a challenge from a healthcare CEO for re-election as Montgomery County Executive in Maryland. “I like doing the work. The most important thing someone can do with their lives is to be purposeful and make a difference.” Marc told us on our [ ]National Organizing Call Monday night. Since his election in 2018, Marc has worked hard to make strides on key priorities of environment, public education, healthcare, and economic justice — earning him the trust and support of a diverse coalition. [ ][IMG] In his next term, Marc told us his “goal is to accelerate our climate plan and push for rent stabilization” — earning him the ire of wealthy developers seeking taxpayer giveaways. Marc is proving that “a lefty can not only win but govern so effectively that voters want to return him to office,” reports [ ]FAIR.org. — despite staunch opposition from the world’s third richest man, Jeff Bezos, and his newspaper. Marc was a beloved 5th-grade teacher at Rolling Terrace Elementary, then a City Council and County Council member. He got his start in the movement by listening to MLK Jr. speak at the March on Washington and later was arrested at an anti-apartheid protest. [ ][IMG] In 2018 - by just 77 votes! - Marc beat out former Healthcare CEO David Blair, who’s running again on massive ad spends — which we are countering via direct voter outreach. Recent polls show Marc with the lead and he has an excellent shot to win this primary, but we’re mobilizing to power him over the finish line on Tuesday! [ ]SIGN-UP HERE to call voters for Marc and other great progressive candidates ready to partner with our movement for positive change. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] VOTE TUESDAY FOR SHEILA RUTH Tuesday is also Election Day for progressive Del. Sheila Ruth who’s vying for a first full term on the Maryland State Assembly (District 44B)! Sheila serves on the important Environment and Transit Committee, where she is working hard for a well-planned transportation system. On our [ ]LIVE Broadcast Monday, she laid out the economic and equity impacts for poor and marginalized folks in Baltimore. Sheila is a champion for state-based universal healthcare — “there’s no reason we can’t get it done in Maryland,” she told us. “And, we must allow the AG to sue fossil fuel companies for the damage of the climate crisis — taxpayers shouldn’t be on the hook for that!” [ ]Sign-up to GOTV for Sheila, Marc, and other great candidates! Like Sheila said: “It’s about building progressive power — we need more of us in office at the state and local level.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] JOINING LEVIN FOR LABOR RALLY & CLIMATE CANVASS Our Revolution rallied this weekend with labor unions and climate activists working to re-elect US Rep. Andy Levin to Congress to represent Michigan-11. Our Revolution leader Don Mongrain helped lead a canvassing training for volunteers hitting the street to knock on every door we can ahead of Election Day Aug. 2nd! Our folks were proud to rally and put in the work alongside union leaders from across the district. On Monday, Andy joined striking workers at the Bloomfield Hill Nursing Home demanding what they deserve. [ ][IMG] Members of Our Revolution also joined Andy and climate activists last week to canvass neighborhoods and let folks know that Andy is THE CLIMATE CHAMPION in this race. While his opponent takes fossil fuel money, we know that Rep. Levin - an original cosponsor of the Green New Deal - is dedicated to good-paying union jobs and a prosperous green economy. [ ]Join our call team to GOTV for Andy! Bernie sounded the alarm on the far-right money targeting this race and called on all of us to make sure we re-elect this critical ally in Congress. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We’re halfway through the 2022 primaries — and we’re still stacking up major progressive wins for Congress: Greg Casar (TX-35), Summer Lee (PA-12), Jasmine Crockett (TX-30), Jamie McLeod Skinner (OR-5), Andrea Salinas (OR-6), Delia Ramirez (IL-3) and Jonathan Jackson (IL-1), and others! As corporate Dems sabotage their own prospects for the midterms, we’re growing progressive power at every level of government so eventually, we’ll outnumber them — and can override their complacency and complicity in blocking progress. [ ]Become a recurring donor TODAY to help us take down the worst corporate Dems in these primaries and give voters the most electable AND progressive candidates in November! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] This 2022 primary season, Our Revolution Phonebank Force has made more than 500,000 phone calls to voters across the country! We’re recruiting as many folks as possible to hit that one-million mark and beyond! Right now, we have shifts for incredible candidates for Congress like Brittany Ramos-DeBarros (NY-11), Andy Levin (MI-11), David Segal (RI-2), Melanie D’Arrigo (NY-3), and many others! [ ]COMMIT TO A CALL SHIFT ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our rights are being stripped; climate chaos is intensifying; mass shootings and police brutality are rampant; and most of us are struggling to pay for food, gas, housing, healthcare, and, well, everything. Naturally, the message from Corporate Dems is basically: shut up and vote harder. “I don’t believe the President can’t find a way to move two senators in his own party — the president has the power, the reputation as a dealmaker,” Our Revolution Political Director Aaron Chappell told [ ]The Hill. “We’ve been yelling about a looming disaster for a while now, and we’ve tried to be very reasonable.” “The president had plenty of warning with the leak on Roe v. Wade, and I think it’s really hard to convince people to come back out with this kind of response.” [ ][IMG] Sadly, the quote above is completely on-brand for Corporate Dems to display such disdain and indifference toward pro-choice Americans doing the work to defend our rights. Here’s the deal, Jack: If Dems did their jobs, activism wouldn’t be such heavy lifting. If they don’t want to do their jobs, then stop kneecapping progressives who will. The kicker — President Biden has been in talks with Mitch McConnell to appoint an [ ]anti-abortion judge to a lifetime seat in Kentucky. [ ]It’s time for progressives to take the reins from corporate DNC puppets. Help us elect better leaders at every level to turn the gears of government before it’s too late. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] WHAT DEMS CAN DO ON ABORTION RIGHTS EXPAND THE SUPREME COURT - AND MORE US Rep. Pramila Jayapal called for the expansion of the Supreme Court on our [ ]National Organizing Call on Monday, saying we need more justices because the court is “another institution that’s broken.” “I’m signed onto Mondaire Jones’ bill because the Senate is broken by the filibuster, creating a vacuum for the radical rightwing Supreme Court to step in and legislate on Roe v Wade, collective bargaining, the EPA, and more,” Jayapl told us. US Rep. Mondaire Jones (NY-17) also introduced a bill to institute Supreme Court ethics and transparency standards, requiring disclosure of lobbying and dark money interests. “And, I’ve introduced a bill to codify the right to access to contraceptives because we know the Supreme Court is going after that next,” Jayapal told us. Other options: put clinics on federal land, secure interstate travel, and challenge state bans on pills. [ ]As David Zuckerman told us: it’s because progressives shifted the power balance in Vermont that Prop 5 is on the ballot to enshrine reproductive rights. Help us build out progressive power in states across the country! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution activists have been in the streets making the demand for action on abortion rights for years - and when the Supreme Court decision leaked two months ago, we jumped into rapid response mode. In states across the country, our members have been on the frontlines: protesting, organizing, and getting vital info out to vulnerable folks in this time of crisis. We demand the Democratic leadership bring the same energy to this fight. Just this past Monday, Our Revolution NJ activists were outside the office of State Senate President Nicholas Scutari calling for the state’s bill to expand abortion rights to be passed. [ ]If you live in NJ and want to get involved, join our new member welcome session. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] TAX THE RICH - HAMPTONS EDITION! What a lovely weekend in the Hamptons... where hundreds of us [ ]marched on “Billionaire Row” - pitchforks in hand! - to demand New York TAX THE RICH! Our Revolution NYPAN and Long Island Activists joined NY Communities for Change, Extinction Rebellion, and others, calling for billionaire money to pay for climate action, housing, education, and community investment. A total of 16 arrests took place as activists blocked roads and the entrance to an airport for private planes in East Hampton, and stormed a private beach, [ ]Patch.com reported. [ ]Become a member right now to help us turn up the heat on billionaires whose greed is literally killing us with rising emissions, rising temperatures, and rising inequality. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] WORKPLACE DEMOCRACY IN CALIFORNIA WE HAVE A SHOT - CALL YOUR SENATORS We need YOU to stand up with fast-food workers, Our Revolution, SEIU, and Fight for $15 and a Union to demand the California State Senate pass AB-257 - The FAST Recovery Act. This bill would give these essential workers a say in setting health, safety, and employment standards while holding major food chains accountable. TAKE ACTION - add your voice in solidarity with worker activists - tell your state senator to pass AB 257 for greater power and democracy in the workplace. Let’s not squander this opportunity! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] BIRD-DOGGING FOR MEDICARE FOR ALL Our Revolution M4A Activists are continuously waging the fight and pressuring members of Congress to commit their votes in favor of Medicare for All. In NJ, we flipped Energy and Commerce Chair Rep. Frank Pallone (NJ-6) and now we’re working on US Rep. Andy Kim (NJ-3) — showing up to his town halls and calling him to co-sponsor the Medicare for All Act (HR-1976). So far, the majority of House Dems support the bill, but Rep. Kim hesitates, citing his fear that future Republican administrations might revoke it later — why do anything then? We need leaders to take a stand and press forward. [ ]If you’re in NJ-03, help us amass support and pressure for M4A — we’re holding rallies, and demonstrations, going to legislative offices, penning op-eds, gathering petitions, and more! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As you know, Bernie founded Our Revolution five years ago to wage the fight for our progressive policy solutions and elect allies who will work with our activists on the outside. Our Revolution is the largest progressive grassroots-funded organization in the country — [ ]but we need to double our coalition and max out our power to beat back the big money dominating American politics. Become a sustaining member TODAY. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] HOW WOULD YOU CHANGE THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY Our Revolution and progressives worked hard to get transformative proposals on the table to change the Party from within – and major DNC meetings are happening right now! These meetings are public, but there are more corporate consultants than ever. That’s why we need you to WEIGH-IN right now — [ ]tell us how the Democratic Party needs to change. We’re not cheerleaders for the party, but right-wing and corporate money is flooding primaries and there are currently no rules to address it. Make yourself heard NOW! [ ]SURVEY ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Mark your calendars for 8:30p ET/5:30 PT next Monday (July 25th) when Our Revolution will host US Rep. Ilhan Omar (MN-5) and other great progressives on our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call! [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is thrilled to be fighting for Ballot Initiative 1471 — Washington Health Trust – the first-ever non-profit, state-wide universal healthcare system in the country! A successful state program will prove that single-payer bills like Medicare for All not only save money but SAVE LIVES - and we need you to [ ]join this fight! Our Revolution is partnering with Whole Washington to get more than 400,000 signatures to put universal healthcare on the ballot. Ballot measures can circumvent obstructionist politicians, but they require dedicated activists like us to put in the work! [ ]SIGN UP HERE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our movement is showing primary victories that can overcome the force of big money through direct voter outreach. This summer, we can elect more allies and replace more #ManchinDems! Join a call shift — it feels great to change a voter’s mind in real-time and know that you’re changing the composition of power. [ ]SIGN UP TO PHONEBANK ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] US Rep. Andy Levin is one of our most committed working-class fighters in Congress — and we need your help to make sure he beats a corporate Dem opponent gunning for the seat with AIPAC money! We will be calling thousands of Our Revolution supporters in Michigan’s 11th district, which includes Detroit area communities like Bloomfield and Pontiac — hop on the dialer with us to make a few calls! [ ]PHONEBANK TO HAVE ANDY’S BACK! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is making calls to David Segal to Congress (RI-2) — and he would be a key ally against corporate power and corruption. Join us to make an impact on one of the most critical primaries of 2022. [ ]VOLUNTEER HERE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Melanie D’Arrigo is an incredible advocate for Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, and our popular progressive agenda – let’s beat out the establishment and send her to Congress! Help us reach voters directly in NY-3. [ ]MAKE CALLS FOR MELANIE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] DEFEND DEMOCRACY PETITION Congress is investigating the crimes of January 6th, but they don’t have the power to prosecute. That’s why Our Revolution is calling on state election officials to do their job, enforce the Constitution, and bar insurrectionists from the ballot! The American people can’t stomach any more political theater. Let’s put the evidence into action and ensure Trump and his minions are disqualified from ever serving in government again! [ ]SIGN & SHARE OUR PETITION! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] For $5 a month, become a sustaining member of Our Revolution and our critical work around the country. We’ll send you our new 2022 Membership Card, but at higher monthly donations, you get lots of cool gear! For $10 a month, get a sticker 6-pack, and at $15, get the stickers and a poster. For $27, get both PLUS a tote bag — or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. [ ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

Let us take a minute to remind you who Haley Stevens is – someone in 2017 who saw Donald Trump get elected and quit her job to run for Congress and flip a long-held Republican seat blue. She didn’t come from a big-name family, and, in fact, many people underestimated her. Here’s the thing: **TV ads are _expensive_** , and we want to keep this spot running all the way until polls close. We think having voters hear from Haley herself is the perfect way to counter the never-ending attacks. Never underestimate the power of a good political ad, team. If as many people see this ad as we hope, we’ll win our August 2nd primary and defeat the GOP once again in November. [So, can we count on your support? clean_body: | = | | Hey team, Last month, we released an ad in the aftermath of Roe being overturned. If you haven’t seen it, watch it below = = Keeping Haley’s ads on the airwaves is vital to victory. That’s because Washington super PACs are dumping six figures to baselessly tie Haley to the worst day in American government – the January 6th attacks on the Capitol – and undermine the work of the January 6th commission. Let us take a minute to remind you who Haley Stevens is – someone in 2017 who saw Donald Trump get elected and quit her job to run for Congress and flip a long-held Republican seat blue. She didn’t come from a big-name family, and, in fact, many people underestimated her. Here’s the thing: TV ads are expensive , and we want to keep this spot running all the way until polls close. We think having voters hear from Haley herself is the perfect way to counter the never-ending attacks. Never underestimate the power of a good political ad, team. If as many people see this ad as we hope, we’ll win our August 2nd primary and defeat the GOP once again in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for supporting this fight. name: Ohio State Rep. Joe Miller
subject: My district used to be solid blue, Peter​
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Rural America is at risk this November | | | Hi Peter – My name is Joe Miller, and I proudly represent Western Lorain County in the Ohio General Assembly. I'm a native Ohioan, and I've been working to bring quality education, good-paying jobs, opportunities for green investment, and support for our veterans to my state. **These are the issues that Democrats are fighting for, but like in many other states across the country, we've been held back by our Republican counterparts.** Now, I'm facing reelection in an extremely competitive Ohio state legislative district. My district in Lorain County is in a heavily industrial area – and it used to be a solid blue seat. Those issues that made my community blue are still going strong. People need affordable housing, a workforce-education pipeline, and infrastructure investment. **Democrats have long delivered and advocated around those core working-class priorities****. But recently, Republicans have corrupted that narrative** – urging my neighbors into culture wars instead of good debates on how to get things done. That's why it's so important that we have organizations like the United Rural Democrats to help build a movement that can reinvigorate the Democratic base in districts that are on the brink of turning red. **This November will be a crucial test, especially in districts like mine. Any support you can provide to help Democrats in rural areas is extremely important to make sure that our communities get the resources they need.[Will you consider donating anything you are able to Democrats have long delivered and advocated around those core working-class priorities. But recently, Republicans have corrupted that narrative – urging my neighbors into culture wars instead of good debates on how to get things done. That's why it's so important that we have organizations like the United Rural Democrats to help build a movement that can reinvigorate the Democratic base in districts that are on the brink of turning red. This November will be a crucial test, especially in districts like mine. Any support you can provide to help Democrats in rural areas is extremely important to make sure that our communities get the resources they need. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: I appreciate your support. – Ohio State Rep. Joe Miller United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

clean_body: Team, We ran the numbers today and, unfortunately, we barely fell short of our mid-month goal last night. This is a small setback, but we can still stay on track for July. We've extended our mid-month deadline to tonight at midnight to raise an additional $5,000 so our campaign can finish the month strong. Karen is counting on our grassroots team to build a winning campaign, and we're fired up to close this gap. Will you chip in what you can before the extended deadline to help Karen power this historic campaign to victory? Karen's billionaire opponent is self-funding his campaign – he's already spent over $40 million to buy the mayoral race. But Karen is building a movement for the people and by the people, which means we're hoping to see donations from every neighborhood in L.A. The only way we can go toe-to-toe with Caruso's spending is by talking to voters and funding our field program from now through November. If you're able, donate before tomorrow's extended deadline to help fund Karen's historic mayoral campaign » Thank you for all you do, Karen Bass Finance Team Now that we've begun working up to the General Election, there's a whole new round of matching funds. Individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Be one of the first people to get your funds matched by donating now. body:
This is the first election that I’m eligible to vote in, AND I’ll be casting my very first ballot to elect my dad as Maryland’s next Democratic governor.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47930249/356204175/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220716-fr_in-AK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220716-fr_in-AK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220716&&&&utm_content=fr_in&&&&utm_term=AK_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=8abe4036-4205-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWJlNDAzNi00MjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRRGvJbEDDqvrmYn2JAv9WmmG7WHiUkKCuZRVTcOEyU=)

| Hey Peter, it’s Amina King, John’s daughter. This election cycle is a special one for me. Not only is it the first election that I’m eligible to vote in, but my very first ballot cast will be to elect my dad as Maryland’s next Democratic governor! As a first-time voter, I have a lot on my mind. I’m voting for my future – for a healthy Chesapeake Bay, for student loan debt relief, and for common sense gun control to keep students safe in schools. And I am so lucky that my dad is running for governor to ensure that my future – and the future of all Marylanders – will be more safe, just, and prosperous than the current status quo. I cannot wait to vote for the only candidate truly devoted to progressive change (honestly, I’d be just as excited even if he wasn’t my dad!). But since he is my dad, I know better than most just how good of a governor he will be and that he will lead with the same grace, compassion, and humility that my sister, Mireya, and I have been so lucky to grow up with. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47930251/356204176/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220716-fr_in-AK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220716-fr_in-AK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220716&&&&utm_content=fr_in&&&&utm_term=AK_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=8abe4036-4205-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWJlNDAzNi00MjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRRGvJbEDDqvrmYn2JAv9WmmG7WHiUkKCuZRVTcOEyU=) Primary Election Day is this Tuesday, July 19th, and I’m calling on each and every one of you to step up and cast your vote for the only candidate committed to bold investment in climate action, fiercely protecting and expanding the right to choose, and ensuring every kid gets a world-class education, regardless of what zip code they live in. **Peter, I’m asking you to vote for my amazing dad: John B. King Jr.** Our entire family has been so grateful for your generosity and support throughout this groundbreaking campaign. It all comes down to this Tuesday, so make your plan to head to the polls! Thank you, Amina King
---

This election cycle is a special one for me. Not only is it the first election that I’m eligible to vote in, but my very first ballot cast will be to elect my dad as Maryland’s next Democratic governor! As a first-time voter, I have a lot on my mind. I’m voting for my future – for a healthy Chesapeake Bay, for student loan debt relief, and for common sense gun control to keep students safe in schools. And I am so lucky that my dad is running for governor to ensure that my future – and the future of all Marylanders – will be more safe, just, and prosperous than the current status quo. I cannot wait to vote for the only candidate truly devoted to progressive change (honestly, I’d be just as excited even if he wasn’t my dad!). But since he is my dad, I know better than most just how good of a governor he will be and that he will lead with the same grace, compassion, and humility that my sister, Mireya, and I have been so lucky to grow up with. = Primary Election Day is this Tuesday, July 19th, and I’m calling on each and every one of you to step up and cast your vote for the only candidate committed to bold investment in climate action, fiercely protecting and expanding the right to choose, and ensuring every kid gets a world-class education, regardless of what zip code they live in. Peter, I’m asking you to vote for my amazing dad: John B. King Jr. Our entire family has been so grateful for your generosity and support throughout this groundbreaking campaign. It all comes down to this Tuesday, so make your plan to head to the polls! Thank you, Amina King | = * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- | = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . No purchase necessary. If you would prefer to not get updates from the campaign, please

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Fwd: 🛑 Help STOP Big Government Socialism! 🛑
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Did you see my team’s message? Time is running out!
| | | Peter,

Did you see my team’s message yesterday?

I’ve never been more concerned about our great nation’s future, and I’m ALL-IN in our fight for a Republican victory this November.

The Democrats’ goal is a permanent one-party system, and if they prevail it’s over.

The country that you and I grew up in – the greatest country in the history of the world – will be “transformed” into a place we no longer recognize. The America we know and love will be lost forever and it will be on our watch.

I refuse to let that happen, Peter. I hope to have you standing with me.

Respond now to help us RETAKE THE MAJORITY and restore America’s promise:

**[https://secure.winred.com/tommytuberville/july-mid-month-22](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7649b39733593374/c2a270b31b376151c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**

Time is running out to reach our mid-month goal and we can’t afford to fall short.

\- Coach
---
|
---
To: All Supporters
From: Team Tuberville
Sent: Friday, July 15, 2022
Subject: 🛑 Help STOP Big Government Socialism! 🛑
---

---
---
Peter,

Coach is a straight shooter who doesn’t hold back. He is raising the alarm, calling out the far-left Democrats AND those Republicans who are willing to go along with their schemes.

The stakes this November could not be higher. America’s future is on the line.

If the Democrats get the chance, they’re going to NUKE the filibuster...

**And if they do that, we can say goodbye to freedom and say hello to big government socialism, gun grabs, and a renewed push to expand and pack the U.S. Supreme Court with left-wing activist judges!**

We have a critical mid-month fundraising deadline coming up fast tomorrow. It’s vital that we reach our goal as we prepare for the 90-day drive to Election Day.
**[Please make a $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 secure donation to help>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7649b39733593374/7b507ee78329759bc3d6b838967d376c/33013)**[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7649b39733593374/c76ae4e6ca7cfd21c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
As Coach said in a recent interview, if we don’t elect a new conservative majority our country as we know it will be gone. We have no choice but victory.

**We need EVERY Republican on board now – _we can’t have anyone on the sidelines!_**

**[Rush your most generous possible donation ASAP to ensure we don’t fall short.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7649b39733593374/3cfa3795f6b0796dc3d6b838967d376c/33013)**[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7649b39733593374/d89d1a5a51bf089cc3d6b838967d376c/33013)

\- Team Tuberville

Split $25 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to help us flip Ohio blue »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/18386?t=7&akid=3733%2E878179%2EXe_w7e) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tim Ryan and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/18387?t=8&akid=3733%2E878179%2EXe_w7e)
---
**Despite the GOP dumping over $80 million into Ohio, a new poll released TODAY shows us beating JD Vance 48 to 46.**

JD Vance might have billionaire backers like Peter Thiel and Donald Trump to fund vicious attacks against us, but this proves we have what it takes to do the impossible and flip Ohio blue.

Look folks, we can't take this 2-point lead for granted. We've still got a tough fight ahead and Republicans will stop at nothing to win this race and snatch back the gavel for Mitch McConnell.

**If we want to shock the nation, we need to raise $100,000 this week to compete with the right-wing attacks and reach the swing voters necessary to win this race. That 's why I'm personally reaching out to you today:**
[Ohio is the Democrats' BEST CHANCE to expand our Senate majority. Can you split $25 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project today to help us flip Ohio blue?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/18386?t=9&akid=3733%2E878179%2EXe_w7e)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tim Ryan and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/18387?t=10&akid=3733%2E878179%2EXe_w7e)
---
When we win this race, it'll be because of folks like you stepping up and giving whatever they can to help us beat the GOP's attack machine with grassroots power. That's why your donation is so important today.

Thank you,

Tim Ryan
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=3733%2E878179%2EXe_w7e). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=3733%2E878179%2EXe_w7e).**

name: Cecile Richards
subject: After the overturning of Roe, what's next?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
If we can expand our Senate majority, we can stop any attempts McConnell makes to pass a national abortion ban.
| | |
---
Friend,

Now that _Roe v. Wade_ , a landmark case decided 50 years ago, has been overturned, over a dozen states have already banned or restricted abortion – impacting _tens of millions_ of Americans.

Meanwhile, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are threatening to enact a national abortion ban to make sure our rights to our own bodily autonomy are stripped away.

**But we can't let this stop us. There is still hope. I need you to join me and Maggie Hassan in the fight for reproductive rights as we push back against Republican attempts to gut them entirely. **

If we can expand our Senate majority, we can stop any attempts McConnell makes to pass a national abortion ban. Political experts are calling New Hampshire's competitive seat one of the most likely to flip in the midterm elections. That's why I am doing everything in my power to protect Maggie Hassan's vital voice in the Senate – and I hope you'll join me.

**Maggie is just as committed as I am to defending the right to safe and legal abortions. But the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat, and they're doing all they can to make sure it's this one. **

_[**So please, friend, with our rights hanging in the balance, will you please rush a contribution of just $3 to protect this seat and protect our freedoms?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47930412/356205478/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1283-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjU4NjA5My00MjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80cN3cMpwBP5aazOclZF6I3CsBzFXtu_I6vO16AGP3E=)_

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: California is going to make our own insulin.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
body:
On my first day in office, I signed an executive order putting California on the path to creating our own prescription drugs.

Friends -
On my first day in office, I signed an executive order putting California on the path to creating our own prescription drugs.
Now it’s happening.
California is going to make our own insulin.
The budget I just signed sets aside $100 million to get it done. Half of the money will go toward developing low-cost insulin products, and the other half will go toward a California-based manufacturing facility that will also provide high-paying jobs and a strong supply chain for the drug.
With this act, we are going to use our market power, and our moral power, to get a better deal for Californians who need this lifesaving drug.
Instead of leaving our people to take on price-gouging drug companies alone, Californians are going to take them on together.
This act now means California is the ONLY state in the country that offers universal access to health care coverage AND the only state to produce our own insulin, making it cheaper and more affordable for everyone.
California has always helped to write America’s future.
We’re doing it again.
All my best,
Gavin
* * *
**Gavin Newsom is running for re-election and ballots will start arriving in just a few months. We’ve got a lot of work to do, and he needs your help. If you can, please make a contribution to our campaign today and we’ll keep California Blue in 2022.**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcn-em-july22?refcode=em-220716-1-30&refcode2=891_4767699_ptTVN7&akid=891%2E4767699%2EptTVN7)

PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=891%2E4767699%2EptTVN7).

name: Leo, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: 16 weekends left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Happy Saturday,
Peter.

For us, the weekend is an important time for us to have one-on-one
conversations with voters about the election and grow our movement.

We have volunteers organizing in every single county in the Commonwealth
of Kentucky. They’re meeting with folks to talk about why we need to
replace Rand Paul and mobilizing a grassroots coalition in all 120
counties of Kentucky.

There’s only 16 weekends left until Election Day. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220716.IS1jmH&refcode=em20220716-2234&t=1001&akid=2234%2E346206%2E2C8ilR ]Will you chip in $16
or anything you can right now to help power our organizing work for the
next 16 weekends? We rely on your donations to pay for expenses like
signs, gas, clipboards, training programs, and volunteer software.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220716.IS1jmH&refcode=em20220716-2234&t=1020&akid=2234%2E346206%2E2C8ilR ]Chip in now →

Everyone we meet, no matter where they live or who they voted for in the
past agree that it’s time for change.

A historic number of Kentuckians are rising up this election to end this
failed chapter of leadership under Rand Paul. Together, we can make sure
we elect a leader who will fight for real solutions like Medicare for All
and student debt cancellation that center working people.

That’s why we are building the largest statewide deep organizing campaign
in Kentucky’s history. We’re inviting as many Kentuckians as possible to
raise their voices in this upcoming election — especially those who have
been historically disenfranchised from voting and folks who typically
don’t turn in big numbers in our elections.

We need to organize our movement to make sure our voices are heard this
election. That means for the next 16 weekends we need to knock on doors,
make phone calls, and talk to as many voters as possible.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220716.IS1jmH&refcode=em20220716-2234&t=1021&akid=2234%2E346206%2E2C8ilR ]Every dollar you give helps us do that. Whether it’s more clipboards
for canvassing, yard signs for front yards, or funding for volunteer
training, grassroots donations is what keeps us strong.

Together,

Leo, Deputy Campaign Manager

“Read that one more time.” Heck, I’ll even shout it from the rooftops for you:
* YES, we need to **clean up voter rolls.**

* YES, we need to **secure our elections.**

* YES, we need to **combat voter fraud.**

* YES, we need to be able to **TRUST that the results on Election Day** reflect the will of the people of Pennsylvania.

That used to be something _both_ parties agreed on... until 2020, when Leftists like **Josh Shapiro and Joe Biden realized they could pervert democracy to force socialism** down our throats.
We need to win on Election Day _now_ to make sure the next Governor of Pennsylvania**delivers a FAIR election** in 2024 and beyond.
I’m ready to win, but I can’t do it without your help. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z617s61b3vguv3v79uo8sj747o6okrc1v98lfmq0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr31db6e1g66cjlc4oefdpmegr3eotk64pm6djm6qob4c9hclr79o3ks9gndctgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rjac37mphmcdb2mdiefc5lclp238h1e8he4933clge0o36c5j69oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7b31rrbcha9nqpd2im450aqrd5ufr1jh94ookho_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1g6cob6cjh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ab42io7pshda55ip8c87o36n1ov41dgbb7efu0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1g6cob6cjh2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2jlg3c1ralsn2usevv29mdi2v0ub4kpmicb6leo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1g6cob6cjh2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

subject: Looking to November
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=bfb8e8fc1f6b4327abff363e117eb186&_e=iLfk-uKu_5OiB0FoSTOoElQ4GerffcI7xhiW0Uq5PkHbfYZmIj8lUmQHbqY6BIk3VkrcOJuC9d9slbefv3EmuHUue05zyR--mKU-hPSwdMGlPn1oSTNwYZFVASPOaXWN7rJEOyMgFwMBKk2aToy2RzFsU_q6MIRoJdJwvXFY0N2nSgbYSf6V7XApVx0HK72NVqzY1-xbRKAwxjea1jlTcXRxCe7pfphVRp1mAxy6S6wJh55hGmZFrcZiuvY_4fIp5GC0trFVw4auwvbqop0MXt7_S6GbcV_xpLRWjRfxHomOfGpP-CxAFcJWEEpGiMjg6LiGpyH9jwwRFpLDA2yBb12pYC6uq6u15sWTOPg0XMYJVuw_B2CwjdD_HWRyP-7eIX9ANz4UDZSNPCR5MzSfJlFjFQewyNRLzGD6LO_QLucJRoILlMnIR8pQeBGOiCPP)
---
Friend,
---
Millions of freedom-loving Americans like you have joined me in my commitment to stand for America. It’s an honor to work alongside you every day. But November is approaching, and winning isn’t guaranteed. We cannot be complacent and let AOC, Kamala Harris, and Bernie Sanders take control of our Constitution and our rights. That thought is frightening to me. That’s why I’m grateful to have you with me as we work to elect conservative leaders across America. Stand For America PAC has been endorsing, training, advising, and financially supporting strong conservative candidates to fulfill our mission. **[Pitch in $25 today to support our effort.](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=bfb8e8fc1f6b4327abff363e117eb186&_e=iLfk-uKu_5OiB0FoSTOoElQ4GerffcI7xhiW0Uq5PkHbfYZmIj8lUmQHbqY6BIk3VkrcOJuC9d9slbefv3EmuHUue05zyR--mKU-hPSwdMGlPn1oSTNwYZFVASPOaXWN7rJEOyMgFwMBKk2aToy2RzFsU_q6MIRoJdJwvXFY0N2nSgbYSf6V7XApVx0HK72NVqzY1-xbRKAwxjea1jlTcc--8iPyM6fFDb9VN7OLkRJfqAfwydYeccQiloftvtvWFvYgAs-JAeF769bSfc0DmG0p4-CDu1B_7ER_V3hAIYLDoG7hWIgxBtC_0hj8kGOHtHpKb2Huv0hNGt2AUHMTgmuD2q72U2Zkx8OZ3BuY4d9x1A5tojOljytZsEKt-ATgwvzLMhnJuZ88FfdFaL8g-GeyRTHS_6w-IA2zFKHl8ZEUMQx_p_4e72yz_4Jz7sv7) ** Thanks to the help from people like you, we’ve already seen success with 20 of our endorsed candidates winning primaries. Looking to November, winning will only be possible because of grassroots conservative supporters like you. You can defend our Constitution, your rights, and your families’ rights against the liberals’ dangerous agenda. We can take control of the Senate and the House in November, but we still have our work cut out for us. We are standing for people like you, friend, and that’s exactly who will fuel our movement to defeat the Democrats. So, if you have even $1 to spare, I hope you’ll step up and fund our efforts today. I know I can count on you. Thank you for supporting Stand For America PAC. I hope you’ll continue to stand with us on our path to winning in November. My very best,
---

clean_body: | | | Friend, Millions of freedom-loving Americans like you have joined me in my commitment to stand for America. It’s an honor to work alongside you every day. But November is approaching, and winning isn’t guaranteed. We cannot be complacent and let AOC, Kamala Harris, and Bernie Sanders take control of our Constitution and our rights. That thought is frightening to me. That’s why I’m grateful to have you with me as we work to elect conservative leaders across America. Stand For America PAC has been endorsing, training, advising, and financially supporting strong conservative candidates to fulfill our mission. Thanks to the help from people like you, we’ve already seen success with 20 of our endorsed candidates winning primaries. Looking to November, winning will only be possible because of grassroots conservative supporters like you. You can defend our Constitution, your rights, and your families’ rights against the liberals’ dangerous agenda. We can take control of the Senate and the House in November, but we still have our work cut out for us. We are standing for people like you, friend, and that’s exactly who will fuel our movement to defeat the Democrats. So, if you have even $1 to spare, I hope you’ll step up and fund our efforts today. I know I can count on you. Thank you for supporting Stand For America PAC. I hope you’ll continue to stand with us on our path to winning in November. My very best, Nikki Haley | | | A Note From Nikki: Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. Friend,
---
With the August 9 election just weeks away, we’re facing our final ad buy of the primary TONIGHT.
---
It’s imperative that voters know exactly why I’m the _ONLY_ candidate who can take down Tony Evers. I’m not beholden to the Madison swamp like my opponent, I’m a conservative mom with the FIGHT and experience to fix Wisconsin as your next governor.
---
_I need to be sure that every voter hears my grassroots message in these final weeks – but as it stands, I’m still $8,130 short for our final ad buy with just hours to make up the difference._
---
**Simply put, without your help, we’ll be completely drowned out on the airwaves by both our opponent and the radical Left.**

There’s a reason voters are flocking to our grassroots campaign, Friend.
---
They are sick and tired of the Biden-Evers agenda of putting YOU last.
---
Unlike Evers, who only sympathizes with union bosses, I’m a mom who’s put over 200,000 miles on my minivan... I know what issues _REALLY_ matter to Wisconsinites.
---
_From soaring prices at the pump to slashing parents’ rights to pushing “wokeism” to an outrageous new extreme, voters have made it clear they’ve had enough of the radical Left._
---
And now with just weeks to go in this race, I need your help ensuring every voter knows I’m the only candidate who can TAKE BACK Wisconsin from the Democrats.

clean_body: Every voter needs to hear this message in the final weeks before Election Day. | Friend, With the August 9 election just weeks away, we’re facing our final ad buy of the primary TONIGHT. It’s imperative that voters know exactly why I’m the ONLY candidate who can take down Tony Evers. I’m not beholden to the Madison swamp like my opponent, I’m a conservative mom with the FIGHT and experience to fix Wisconsin as your next governor. I need to be sure that every voter hears my grassroots message in these final weeks – but as it stands, I’m still $8,130 short for our final ad buy with just hours to make up the difference. Simply put, without your help, we’ll be completely drowned out on the airwaves by both our opponent and the radical Left. There’s a reason voters are flocking to our grassroots campaign, Friend. They are sick and tired of the Biden-Evers agenda of putting YOU last. Unlike Evers, who only sympathizes with union bosses, I’m a mom who’s put over 200,000 miles on my minivan... I know what issues REALLY matter to Wisconsinites. From soaring prices at the pump to slashing parents’ rights to pushing “wokeism” to an outrageous new extreme, voters have made it clear they’ve had enough of the radical Left. And now with just weeks to go in this race, I need your help ensuring every voter knows I’m the only candidate who can TAKE BACK Wisconsin from the Democrats. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

subject: Last night in Dallas

body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Last night in Dallas, Beto spoke with conviction and urgency about what we
need to do to win in November and finally get our state on the right track
after years of Greg Abbott’s failed leadership.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220716-1.ISnqTj&refcode=ema20220716-198671&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=198671%2E444211%2E-pnaxo ]Beto at the Texas Democratic ConventionPhoto by The Dallas Morning News

We are fighting for every single vote by reaching out to Republicans,
Democrats, and Independents alike. It doesn’t matter who someone voted for
in the last election; Beto is talking to people of all backgrounds because
before anything else, they are his fellow Texans.

Beto is going to bring people together at a time when Greg Abbott and the
Republican Party is trying to divide us with an extreme and dangerous
agenda.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220716-1.ISnqTj&refcode=ema20220716-198671&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=198671%2E444211%2E-pnaxo ]We have less than four months until Election Day, and your support is
absolutely critical. Please make
your first
$3 contribution right now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220716-1.ISnqTj&refcode=ema20220716-198671&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=198671%2E444211%2E-pnaxo ]Donate Now »

In just three days, Beto will be launching a 49-day, 5,600 mile Drive for
Texas in which he will hold more than 70 events across the state. We know
there's only one way to win this race — by going everywhere, meeting
everyone, and making our case directly to the voters who will decide this
election.

But bringing Texans together and holding Greg Abbott accountable for his
extremism and cruelty will only be possible with your
support.

Abbott has pledged to spend $100,000,000 against us and attacking Beto,
which is why your support is so important right now. Together, we have
what it takes to win this race. But to do so, we must
keep the momentum.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220716-1.ISnqTj&refcode=ema20220716-198671&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=198671%2E444211%2E-pnaxo ]We have less than four months until Election Day. Make your best gift
now and let’s send Greg Abbott packing from the governor’s office.

Thank you,

Team Beto

body:
Join our monthly sustainer's club today | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bd6b2789bad9/i-am-running-for-congress-9136790?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=1775c24c98&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Folks,

We’ll make this short and sweet: Mike Van Someren is the real, common-sense leadership we need representing us in Washington.

Our human rights like privacy and choice are under attack, inflation is still at record highs, and we’re still facing shortages of essentials like baby formula.

And the man who is supposed to represent us has no plans outside of obstructing any policies to help everyday Americans, doing what his national party’s bosses expect of him, and refusing to listen to the needs of all his constituents.

**Scott Fitzgerald is doing nothing to preserve our rights or address kitchen table problems facing us here at home. He would rather let you suffer in hopes that it benefits him politically. We can’t reward this behavior. It’s time to replace him.**

**Mike Van Someren will put all of our families first. By joining our Sustainers Club,[your support, no matter how much you can contribute, makes all the difference.](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=a8cd8be5f3&e=356c0699dd)**
---

---
| [JOIN MONTHLY SUSTAINERS CLUB](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=35726b2e73&e=356c0699dd "JOIN MONTHLY SUSTAINERS CLUB")
---
| To truly compete with big money interest groups and millionaire donors who will do whatever they can to buy our elections and work against American families, Mike needs your support.

[**Even $5 a month will help Mike have the resources to fight back, win in November, and fix our broken system in Washington.**](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=99bace1f03&e=356c0699dd)

This election is critical and will have real, long term ramifications on us all. Scott Fitzgerald refuses to work for, or listen to, us. **But Mike Van Someren will.**

Thank you,
Team Van Someren
