name: =?utf-8?Q?Emilia=20Sykes=20for=20Congress?=
subject: ICYMI: Emilia Sykes Raises Nearly $550,000 in Second Quarter With $600,000 COH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/emiliasykesforcongress/emilia-sykes-statement-on-supreme-court-decision-16478671?e=7730fa895a)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release** : July 15, 2022
**Press Contact** : [press@emiliasykesforcongress.com](mailto:press@emiliasykesforcongress.com)

---
| **Emilia Sykes Raises Nearly $550,000 in Second Quarter With $600,000 cash on hand** _Strong Showing Comes On Heels Of Recent Poll Showing [Sykes Leading](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=c62d469611&e=7730fa895a) One Of Most Competitive Races In The County_
---
| AKRON, OH — Today, former Ohio House Minority Leader and candidate for Ohio’s 13th Congressional District Emilia Sykes announced that her campaign raised $543,961.03 in the second quarter of 2022 with roughly $600,000 cash on hand. "Emilia’s impressive haul and lead in the polls is evidence that her campaign has momentum because northeast Ohioans and working families across this state want a fighter in Washington who will work to lower costs, keep their communities safe, and protect a woman’s right to make decisions about her own body,” said **Sykes spokesperson Samantha Herd**. “While her opponent is more concerned with punishing women and putting them in jail for having an abortion, Emilia is ready to hit the ground running to give Ohio families some breathing room and put money back in their pockets.” Emilia’s average online contribution was $43 dollars, displaying strong grassroots support. Last month, Emilia’s campaign released a poll showing her leading her opponent 47-45 percent. Sykes is a DCCC Red to Blue candidate and has the endorsement of over 40 local elected officials in Summit and Stark counties; multiple labor unions, including the Ohio AFL-CIO, over a dozen members of Congress including Senator Sherrod Brown, and nearly 20 national political organizations, including EMILY’s List, CBC PAC, and more. **About Emilia** : Emilia Sykes is the State Representative for Ohio’s 34th legislative district. Born in Akron and raised on the city’s west side, Emilia has worked tirelessly to keep jobs in our state and expand opportunities for working families in Northeast Ohio. As House Minority Leader she worked with Republicans and Democrats to deliver real results for Ohio’s families, businesses, and seniors. ###
Learn more about Emilia Sykes at [www.EmiliaSykesforCongress.com](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=1ee159ac7d&e=7730fa895a). Follow along for updates @[EmiliaSykesOH](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=0d75270f95&e=7730fa895a) on Twitter and on Facebook at [Facebook.com/E](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=5110663a66&e=7730fa895a)[miliaSykes](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=18a91f0924&e=7730fa895a).

clean_body: This headline says it all. Now he’s attacking to distract. | Fellow American, A new report reveals that Senator Raphael Warnock used campaign funds to cover personal legal expenses from a lawsuit brought against him by a member of his church in Atlanta. This is just plain wrong - and illegal. After all, it is a violation of federal law to spend campaign donations for personal use. To divert attention away from his campaign violations and disastrous record of voting with President Biden 96% of the time, Senator Warnock's campaign has launched a series of attack ads against Herschel Walker. They've clearly decided that since they can't defend their own record, they only have one option left: attack, attack, attack! Herschel is down a point or two in the polls, but he can pull ahead again if we increase our Media Fund and run our ads across Georgia. Raphael Warnock is: 1. Breaking campaign finance laws (a real Washington move). 2. Raising MILLIONS to bury the truth about his troubling record. 3. Taking our country in the wrong direction. 4. Barely ahead in the polls. Senator Warnock has proven that he's a typical Washington politician who doesn't think the laws apply to him. It's time to hold him accountable. Thanks, Team Herschel | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

But we can’t afford anything less than our BEST effort when we’re so close to the primary! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Polls may be showing Chuck AHEAD right now... But that doesn’t mean we can get complacent. Especially since our opponents are sure to only double-down in these final 2 months. We can’t let our momentum slip right before the election! Instead, let’s help a leader who has been at the forefront of so many conservative victories in the NH State Senate bring OUR values to Washington... Your hard-earned contribution isn’t going to just sit in a campaign coffer - it’s going to be directly turned around to help fund critical operations needed for an Election Day VICTORY! | | | | | | | Thank you for the support, Team Morse | | | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Friends of Chuck Morse PO Box 106, North Salem NH 03073 United States

In case you missed it, friend: Jen Psaki recently stepped down from her role as President Biden's press secretary.

As press secretary, Psaki stood firm against Republican attacks on the Biden-Harris agenda, combated dangerous misinformation and played a crucial role in the administration's COVID-19 response and its historic vaccine rollout. **Next, she'll be joining political analysts like Rachel Maddow and Joy Reid with her own show on MSNBC!**
Psaki's voice will be invaluable in the lead-up to the 2022 midterm elections – elections that could determine the future of our country for DECADES. **But to keep her on the air, we need an outpouring of support so she can continue fighting for the truth. name: Midterm Election Update (via TrudyBuschValentine.com)
subject: quick question for you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
Who should Washington serve?
| | | **Peter, for far too long, we've let politicians in the pocket of corporate megadonors run things in Washington.** And what have we gotten for it? Gridlock, greed, partisanship, and a government that only works for those at the very top.
---
American families are getting left behind while politicians line their pockets and secure book deals. **We need a leader in Washington who refuses to be bought.**
**Trudy Busch Valentine, a former nurse, is running for Senate to put people****, not megadonors, ****first.** She'll put an end to partisan games and bring compassion back to Washington.
Right now, Trudy is hard at work on the campaign trail, traveling all over the state to meet Missourians who are struggling with real problems: affording healthcare and basic necessities amidst soaring prices, gun violence ripping our communities apart, the terrible opioid epidemic, and increasingly extreme attacks on our reproductive freedom.
We need Trudy's voice in the Senate, but she's up against powerful forces. It'll take a strong, united grassroots movement to win in Missouri and send this nurse's heart to Washington. **As we head into one of the most important election cycles in modern history, Trudy needs to know if you have her back. So please, before our poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight, will you respond to tell us:**
**Who should Washington serve?**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: 1 out of 15
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s crunch time for my re-election campaign and our work to protect the Democratic majority.
#
Peter,
**We're still short of where we want to be on our fundraising this month.** Because we’re in a critical midterm election year (and just 2.5 weeks from my primary), it's even more imperative that we reach every fundraising goal we set for this campaign.
Last quarter, my campaign’s fundraising dropped by 19%. And this month, we’re even behind our fundraising pace from last month. Peter, we can’t let this trend continue with the midterms coming up — [**please step up with a donation today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14555?refcode=em20220716-1433&t=1&akid=1433%2E420207%2E4pwkf_)
**I wouldn't reach out to ask for your help today if grassroots contributions weren't so important.** The money raised from emails like this helps keep me in Congress, fighting for social, economic, racial, and environmental justice. And it helps me fight to protect our Democratic majority in Congress. I don't take a dime of corporate PAC money — supporters and donors like you are the beating heart of our movement.
[**Can you chip in $3 or any amount right now to help us pick up our fundraising pace and hit our July goal? No matter the amount you can give, it makes a big difference — if just 1 out of every 15 people reading this email donated, we’d catch up in no time!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14555?refcode=em20220716-1433&t=2&akid=1433%2E420207%2E4pwkf_)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14555?refcode=em20220716-1433&t=21&akid=1433%2E420207%2E4pwkf_)**
It’s crunch time for my re-election campaign and our work to protect the Democratic majority. So, thank you for your support. And thank you, as always, for being a part of our people-first movement for bold and transformative change.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220716-1433-footer&t=22&refcode2=1433_420207_4pwkf_&akid=1433%2E420207%2E4pwkf_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=1433%2E420207%2E4pwkf_)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress
clean_body: It’s crunch time for my re-election campaign and our work to protect the Democratic majority. Peter, We're still short of where we want to be on our fundraising this month. Because we’re in a critical midterm election year (and just 2.5 weeks from my primary), it's even more imperative that we reach every fundraising goal we set for this campaign. Last quarter, my campaign’s fundraising dropped by 19%. And this month, we’re even behind our fundraising pace from last month. Peter, we can’t let this trend continue with the midterms coming up — I wouldn't reach out to ask for your help today if grassroots contributions weren't so important. The money raised from emails like this helps keep me in Congress, fighting for social, economic, racial, and environmental justice. And it helps me fight to protect our Democratic majority in Congress. I don't take a dime of corporate PAC money — supporters and donors like you are the beating heart of our movement. It’s crunch time for my re-election campaign and our work to protect the Democratic majority. So, thank you for your support. And thank you, as always, for being a part of our people-first movement for bold and transformative change. In solidarity, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: You don't just have to take my word for it 🌎

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
I've spent my life fighting to protect Arizona's wilderness and climate. I've helped preserve our wild spaces as a park ranger, fought to keep our communities safe and air clean as an environmental lawyer, and taught the next generation of climate advocates as a professor.
In Congress, I will champion legislation that prevents pollution, fights climate change, and keeps our wilderness clean.
I've officially been endorsed by both the Sierra Club and the League of Conservation Voters, two of the biggest environmental advocacy groups in the United States.
Your donation will help me reach more voters, which means more votes for our climate. Will you help my campaign spread our message before the primary in a couple weeks by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_071622_EnvironmentalGroups]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_071622_EnvironmentalGroups [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_071622_EnvironmentalGroups]
Thank you!
-- Kirsten

name: Team Olikara
subject: Tune in to the Only Debate (7/17)
body:
Image of Olikara campaign logo with photo of Steven Olikara and link to campaign website:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/OfS%20logo%20w%20headshot.png]
[https://www.stevenolikara.com]

Dear Peter,

Dear Friend,
Steven is gearing up for the debate tomorrow, and we hope you'll tune in! This is the only debate to give us the opportunity to see the candidates in action and get to know who they are and how they would serve. The debate is being broadcast on NBC stations in Wisconsin, as well as on the TMJ4 online live stream: TMJ4.com/live on this Sunday, July 17th at 6:00 pm. It will be moderated by Charles Benson and Shannon Sims.

Steven will also be appearing on MSNBC on Monday, July 18th between 12:30pm-1:30pm for an interview with Michael Steele.

If you are in Wisconsin, be sure to register to vote by July 20th, the last day to do so online. Here's the link to voting information: myvote.wi.gov.

Outside Wisconsin? Reply “YES” to this email to sign up to volunteer to help get out the vote!

With gratitude,
Team Olikara

We can make history on August 9th – help fuel our movement for a new, more inclusive politics:
Chip in today!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamolikara?refcode=0709email

With deep gratitude,
Team Olikara

United States

Derek, Our mid-month fundraising deadline is almost here, and we just need one more push to get us over the finish line. So, we’re asking Democrats from your area to make a contribution to the Democratic Party of Virginia today. With the November election quickly approaching it is crucial that we hit our fundraising goals. name: Team Franchot
subject: Peter’s Plan To Combat Climate Change
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Hi Peter,
We just wanted to make sure you saw Peter’s email from earlier about his plan to make Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, and protect the Chesapeake Bay for future generations.
Our climate future is on the ballot. If you are able, we’re urging you to chip in to help elect a leader who will take bold action on Day One to combat climate change. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
Forwarded Message Below:
Climate change is the greatest existential threat to our way of life. That's why if I’m blessed to be Maryland’s next Governor, I’ll take urgent action to make Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, and restore the Chesapeake Bay to lasting health. Below, I’m going to talk about the steps I’ll take to lead the transition to a greener Maryland economy. But if you don’t have the time to read my full message, I’d appreciate it if you could chip in whatever you can spare to help us reach as many voters as possible in the final days of this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker]
On Day One of my gubernatorial administration, I’ll sign an executive order requiring all energy consumed by the State to be created by 100% renewable energy where possible, with a mandate for full conversion by the end of my first term. I’ll also convert the entire fleet of state vehicles to electric power. By committing the State to renewable energy, we can lead the private sector’s transition to renewables by creating and sustaining demand for renewable energy infrastructure.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker]
And to protect the Chesapeake Bay, I’ll partner with the EPA and the signatory states to the Chesapeake Clean Water Blueprint to ramp up our efforts to achieve clean air, clean water, and lasting health for the Bay by the end of my first term. These efforts will include adding one billion adult oysters to Maryland’s portion of the watershed, reducing oxygen dead zones caused by algae blooms by 75%, and launching an initiative to preserve Maryland’s tree canopy.
If you believe that the next Governor of Maryland needs to put climate change front and center, then will you chip in to help power our movement to victory? Our climate future is on the ballot in 2022, and we cannot risk getting outspent by a Republican opponent who refuses to take climate change seriously.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=10&refcode=kicker]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=50&refcode=kicker]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=100&refcode=kicker]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?refcode=kicker]
We need your help to get our message out about the need to protect the environment, and any amount you can spare will go a long way in the last days of this competitive primary race. Climate change is not some far-away specter. It’s here right now, and we will continue to witness its devastating effects, from more intense flooding, to unseasonably warm weather, to disruptions to our ecosystem. We cannot afford to kick this can down the road – the actions we take today will have enormous consequences for tomorrow.
I can’t thank you enough for your support. With your help, we’re going to make Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, and secure a lasting and healthy future for the Chesapeake Bay for decades to come.
Chip in to help us spearhead the transition to a greener Maryland economy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot_climatepledge?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, We just wanted to make sure you saw Peter’s email from earlier about his plan to make Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, and protect the Chesapeake Bay for future generations. Our climate future is on the ballot. If you are able, we’re urging you to chip in to help elect a leader who will take bold action on Day One to combat climate change. [] Thank you, Team Franchot Forwarded Message Below: Climate change is the greatest existential threat to our way of life. That's why if I’m blessed to be Maryland’s next Governor, I’ll take urgent action to make Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, and restore the Chesapeake Bay to lasting health. Below, I’m going to talk about the steps I’ll take to lead the transition to a greener Maryland economy. But if you don’t have the time to read my full message, I’d appreciate it if you could chip in whatever you can spare to help us reach as many voters as possible in the final days of this race. [] On Day One of my gubernatorial administration, I’ll sign an executive order requiring all energy consumed by the State to be created by 100% renewable energy where possible, with a mandate for full conversion by the end of my first term. I’ll also convert the entire fleet of state vehicles to electric power. By committing the State to renewable energy, we can lead the private sector’s transition to renewables by creating and sustaining demand for renewable energy infrastructure. [] And to protect the Chesapeake Bay, I’ll partner with the EPA and the signatory states to the Chesapeake Clean Water Blueprint to ramp up our efforts to achieve clean air, clean water, and lasting health for the Bay by the end of my first term. These efforts will include adding one billion adult oysters to Maryland’s portion of the watershed, reducing oxygen dead zones caused by algae blooms by 75%, and launching an initiative to preserve Maryland’s tree canopy. If you believe that the next Governor of Maryland needs to put climate change front and center, then will you chip in to help power our movement to victory? Our climate future is on the ballot in 2022, and we cannot risk getting outspent by a Republican opponent who refuses to take climate change seriously. CHIP IN $10 [] CHIP IN $20.22 [] CHIP IN $50 [] CHIP IN $100 [] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [] We need your help to get our message out about the need to protect the environment, and any amount you can spare will go a long way in the last days of this competitive primary race. Climate change is not some far-away specter. It’s here right now, and we will continue to witness its devastating effects, from more intense flooding, to unseasonably warm weather, to disruptions to our ecosystem. We cannot afford to kick this can down the road – the actions we take today will have enormous consequences for tomorrow. I can’t thank you enough for your support. With your help, we’re going to make Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, and secure a lasting and healthy future for the Chesapeake Bay for decades to come. Chip in to help us spearhead the transition to a greener Maryland economy. [] Thank you, [] CHIP IN [] By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer. Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate 4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J Bowie, MD 20715 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . body:
We’ll keep this quick, but we have an important update about yesterday’s deadline.
#

We’ll keep this quick, but we have an important update about yesterday’s deadline.
The short version is: We missed our goal, and we need to work quickly to make up the difference.
[**Can you please rush a $3 donation to our campaign right now? Our fundraising has slowed down significantly this month, and we have to get back on track.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220716-2-ma&t=1&akid=1238%2E357359%2Esk9aKB)
No exaggeration: We are considerably short of where we had hoped to be at this point in July. The timing isn’t great either with our new wave of ads currently up across this state.
This doesn’t mean we need to panic, but we do have to do something to make up for the shortfall.
That’s why we’re reaching out now. We hadn’t planned on asking you today, but this goal is just that important.
[**Please consider making a donation of any amount you can to help catch up on our goals. We cannot afford to slow down with Election Day approaching so quickly.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220716-2-ma&t=2&akid=1238%2E357359%2Esk9aKB)

subject: Running for Congress certainly isn’t easy, but Wisconsin is worth it.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
America deserves all we can give.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47928528/356194168/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.9b267835-3305-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.9b267835-3305-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjI2NzgzNS0zMzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HOQ_oCGK6_ZThTIY2CXG_jX-zTs2tMZbqhTs9aGTd8E=) Peter, I knew from long before I entered this race that running for Congress wouldn’t be easy. But in my family, we take on the toughest challenges and go the extra mile in service to our country - I firmly believe that America deserves all we can give. **I’m running for office not because it’s an easy way to make a difference, but precisely because it is a difficult, worthwhile way to serve.**

Before I share more, I need to ask for your support for our campaign. **We are just 24 days away from our primary election, and we’re at risk of falling behind in this competitive race. Peter, I’m no stranger to going above and beyond when it comes to serving our nation. Early in my Army career, I signed up for airborne training because I wanted to be deployable to our nation’s toughest assignments. I was the only woman in my class of 140 soldiers - and when it was time for the first jump out of the plane, the sergeants placed me first in line to lead.

When I had the option of serving in Japan or on the Demilitarized Zone in Korea, I didn’t choose the “safer” place. Being a woman on the DMZ wasn’t easy, but the 2nd Infantry Unit on the DMZ was where the Army needed me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47928536/356194176/-174114498?amount=25&refcode=ea.9b267835-3305-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.9b267835-3305-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjI2NzgzNS0zMzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HOQ_oCGK6_ZThTIY2CXG_jX-zTs2tMZbqhTs9aGTd8E=)
_Picture of me on the DMZ - only woman in leadership_
My father, Al Baldus, my husband, Kevin, and our son, Daniel, and I all served in that same Army unit - the 2nd Infantry Division - on the DMZ. We went above and beyond to serve where needed. My father was awarded the Bronze Star for valor in the Korean Conflict. Kevin was a Special Forces (Green Beret) Army Ranger. Daniel is an Army Ranger Airborne Sapper. And I earned Airborne wings.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47928537/356194177/-174114498?amount=25&refcode=ea.9b267835-3305-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.9b267835-3305-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjI2NzgzNS0zMzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HOQ_oCGK6_ZThTIY2CXG_jX-zTs2tMZbqhTs9aGTd8E=)
_On the left, my husband Kevin and my son Daniel, and on right, my father Al Baldus._
Then, following the horrific events of 9/11, I knew I had to step up to serve again. I joined the CIA as a direct consequence of the attacks, where I worked in covert operations in some of the world’s most hostile environments and conflict zones.

Throughout my life, I continued to further my education so I could empower others and lead strategically. At the U.S. Army War College, I was a Distinguished Graduate. And I was often the only woman in a class of men.

Peter, running for Congress may not require me to work undercover, carry a glock, or jump out of planes, but it presents challenges of its own. Still, I relish the opportunity to do what I can to deliver real leadership and real results for my hometown community.

**Ours is one of the most competitive House races in the nation, and the Republican House campaign arm is already targeting WI-03 as a pick-up opportunity. If we’re going to succeed in holding this district for Democrats, we ALL have to join together and be ready to do whatever it takes.

clean_body: America deserves all we can give. | = Peter, I knew from long before I entered this race that running for Congress wouldn’t be easy. But in my family, we take on the toughest challenges and go the extra mile in service to our country - I firmly believe that America deserves all we can give. I’m running for office not because it’s an easy way to make a difference, but precisely because it is a difficult, worthwhile way to serve. Before I share more, I need to ask for your support for our campaign. We are just 24 days away from our primary election, and we’re at risk of falling behind in this competitive race. That’s why I set a goal of raising $40,000 in our final four weeks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Peter, I’m no stranger to going above and beyond when it comes to serving our nation. Early in my Army career, I signed up for airborne training because I wanted to be deployable to our nation’s toughest assignments. I was the only woman in my class of 140 soldiers - and when it was time for the first jump out of the plane, the sergeants placed me first in line to lead. When I had the option of serving in Japan or on the Demilitarized Zone in Korea, I didn’t choose the “safer” place. Being a woman on the DMZ wasn’t easy, but the 2nd Infantry Unit on the DMZ was where the Army needed me. = Picture of me on the DMZ - only woman in leadership My father, Al Baldus, my husband, Kevin, and our son, Daniel, and I all served in that same Army unit - the 2nd Infantry Division - on the DMZ. We went above and beyond to serve where needed. My father was awarded the Bronze Star for valor in the Korean Conflict. Kevin was a Special Forces (Green Beret) Army Ranger. Daniel is an Army Ranger Airborne Sapper. And I earned Airborne wings. = On the left, my husband Kevin and my son Daniel, and on right, my father Al Baldus. Then, following the horrific events of 9/11, I knew I had to step up to serve again. I joined the CIA as a direct consequence of the attacks, where I worked in covert operations in some of the world’s most hostile environments and conflict zones. Throughout my life, I continued to further my education so I could empower others and lead strategically. At the U.S. Army War College, I was a Distinguished Graduate. And I was often the only woman in a class of men. Peter, running for Congress may not require me to work undercover, carry a glock, or jump out of planes, but it presents challenges of its own. Still, I relish the opportunity to do what I can to deliver real leadership and real results for my hometown community. Ours is one of the most competitive House races in the nation, and the Republican House campaign arm is already targeting WI-03 as a pick-up opportunity. If we’re going to succeed in holding this district for Democrats, we ALL have to join together and be ready to do whatever it takes. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Together, we can make a real difference in the future of our country. Thank you, Deb | Deb Baldus McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. This campaign runs on the support from folks like you. = | **=** **=** Learn more at: Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 41, Menomonie, WI 54751 Use of Deb Baldus McGrath's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform (or that of others) does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, the Central Intelligence Agency, or any other branch of government. name: LBR (personal)
subject: We're almost there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
We are so close to meeting our mid-month fundraising goal. Over the past few days, dozens of grassroots supporters have stepped up — giving $5, $15, or whatever they can — and helped us get to where we are now.

But we still have to raise $1,059 more by midnight tonight in order to hit our mid-month fundraising goal. And to get there, we need 71 supporters to pitch in before midnight.

I'm focused on reaching and inspiring voters across Delaware. But with the GOP spending millions on House races nationwide, it is more important than ever to ensure that we have the funds to keep our grassroots movement going and make sure our story gets told over all of the negative attacks.

So, will you chip in $15 to help us close the gap? You can donate at the link here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-july2022

Thanks,

LBR

PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

# Should Republicans Recruit Democrats
|

|

It has recently been discovered that Speaker of the House Philip Gunn is recruiting Democrats to switch to the Republican Party. name: Tyler Kistner
subject: I couldn’t just sit around and wait.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
When I was commissioned into the Marine Corps more than ten years ago, it was for a multitude of reasons. I was inspired to take action, protect our country, and answer a call for public service. I believed America was worth protecting, and I still do. These are the same motivations that have driven me to run for Congress today. | [](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=fa53e7c066c9451ca5ab6c36dc2c459f&_e=EwPsjnqp1txHsWUKKlUBvhn1HpAoHJjvWlQXhJte8tnisON3c1sZM_k3h2Bfst0X6-QudPnIUcUC7nKxTTfwhvPa_y_Zc1NUiAuK-ukCRPlVolceosRbu5PzKyk6SNrZrx9LD4sN8HccBrCOqDDRdpgbvfEnj-ERS6D5ys8LjEf4iZ2ZGOBnUa85XUHL9oRnX3WceeXbHbnZvmmYgiJDOrj8Dy2icsFvVvluE--meHa9Bfs_Wuzc5pPvAdF1v8Sj-tlJkW1H85V2s4Z3_sfl_sKXnienQP3kxu_Sp8x9z9FupOeAOKF9iIcdrNpdAnXXVfcT2zhyRaOZIoo9Wfz8vytIwS9thpjBQBSfFaVnw7MGdm5cHsokKDamIWMZK1v_RxhI5cPyNRwPwYuEkp-kmUo6cvvhFHzyFzNEjNB3hf4wRqFjVTaNXsJeIOycVAG7qeNJiJ9OWzPqkrssz1VsWv_2VztA6EOk2QY3CcACGH2fXZ77Soe5sAU5Fmmx7kXP)

---
Fellow American,

When I was commissioned into the Marine Corps more than ten years ago, it was for a multitude of reasons. I was inspired to take action, protect our country, and answer a call for public service. I believed America was worth protecting, _and I still do_.

[**These are the same motivations that have driven me to run for Congress today.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=fa53e7c066c9451ca5ab6c36dc2c459f&_e=EwPsjnqp1txHsWUKKlUBvhn1HpAoHJjvWlQXhJte8tnisON3c1sZM_k3h2Bfst0X6-QudPnIUcUC7nKxTTfwhvPa_y_Zc1NUiAuK-ukCRPlVolceosRbu5PzKyk6SNrZrx9LD4sN8HccBrCOqDDRdpgbvfEnj-ERS6D5ys8LjEf4iZ2ZGOBnUa85XUHL9oRnX3WceeXbHbnZvmmYgiJDOrj8Dy2icsFvVvluE--meHa9Bfs_Wuzc5pPvAdF1v8Sj-tlJkW1H85V2s4Z3_sfl_nzoSZ2MCBjvjXsBdAHCR_xU2iwSaJxU2nYtEUe0OB8FKduQHyvonpmp0B7EewASu4x3jaTWxk1e0h_bZCGLn4lTKo_F2lLYYqQ8Uj9EKzvRaDJJsgRF7ND5HruSE1gvmHh450XWKMC5rLnfRHuTPu3q3pfRsHwV6JaVBMVgFlJ0KXGhlIBkdqOnGHBdRJETUzBSp4PM4MLzT2vtOQ6SKE6flV3R76uC9C85qDIQZLZu)

As Americans, we _deserve_ a new generation of leaders representing us in Congress. Leaders who understand the problems families all over the country are experiencing. Leaders who will fight for a strong economy, good paying jobs, affordable and high-quality healthcare, security and safety, education for our kids, and a better life for all Americans.

Many leaders in Congress right now have sold out our kid’s futures and put their own needs before the needs of constituents.

**The Marines taught me that teamwork is essential to the success of a mission, and a service-first mindset is fundamental.** Far too many folks in Washington are too busy playing partisan politics, instead of putting their heads down and doing the work of the people.

[**I promise you, as your next Representative in Washington, that I will commit to serving you and your family – because that’s what it’s all about right?**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=fa53e7c066c9451ca5ab6c36dc2c459f&_e=EwPsjnqp1txHsWUKKlUBvhn1HpAoHJjvWlQXhJte8tnisON3c1sZM_k3h2Bfst0X6-QudPnIUcUC7nKxTTfwhvPa_y_Zc1NUiAuK-ukCRPlVolceosRbu5PzKyk6SNrZrx9LD4sN8HccBrCOqDDRdpgbvfEnj-ERS6D5ys8LjEf4iZ2ZGOBnUa85XUHL9oRnX3WceeXbHbnZvmmYgiJDOrj8Dy2icsFvVvluE--meHa9Bfs_Wuzc5pPvAdF1v8Sj-tlJkW1H85V2s4Z3_sfl_tNnocLSoasYIxdlOid3mVXI_oopqRxB9MauNM43FwohinySToAxrVrvq3kaQ802yirkQUDVpmgECV7T8Ptr427wphZI3celiRPDMEsg0BMaP0uUPMssENrgKlnhSeUI5w-tcG-tDzaRvFBUAjk3PmFeNXVmK8oO44vmxp-wGtYgzH8rtyNIhfJK4AqvvfBChcRp4_j-5CAYmYZPlJHwP_ntuf5imodikEkjgiOOTHX1)

When I first ran for Congress in 2020, _no one_ thought I had a shot.

I was facing a well-funded Democrat who took checks from the likes of Nancy Pelosi, corporate PACs, and special interest donors. _**But sitting around doing nothing went against every instinct in my body.**_ With zero resources or experience, I narrowly lost to my opponent, coming within just two points.

After a tough race and an even tougher loss, I picked myself up and decided to try again. **The Marines taught me to jump in, resolve problems, take action, and to have the courage to try.**

If I’ve learned anything in my 34 years on this earth, it’s that failure often teaches us more than success. So, I’m failing forward. I’m giving this race all that I’ve got. clean_body: When I was commissioned into the Marine Corps more than ten years ago, it was for a multitude of reasons. I was inspired to take action, protect our country, and answer a call for public service. I believed America was worth protecting, and I still do. These are the same motivations that have driven me to run for Congress today. | Fellow American, When I was commissioned into the Marine Corps more than ten years ago, it was for a multitude of reasons. I was inspired to take action, protect our country, and answer a call for public service. I believed America was worth protecting, and I still do. As Americans, we deserve a new generation of leaders representing us in Congress. Leaders who understand the problems families all over the country are experiencing. Leaders who will fight for a strong economy, good paying jobs, affordable and high-quality healthcare, security and safety, education for our kids, and a better life for all Americans. Many leaders in Congress right now have sold out our kid’s futures and put their own needs before the needs of constituents. The Marines taught me that teamwork is essential to the success of a mission, and a service-first mindset is fundamental. Far too many folks in Washington are too busy playing partisan politics, instead of putting their heads down and doing the work of the people. When I first ran for Congress in 2020, no one thought I had a shot. I was facing a well-funded Democrat who took checks from the likes of Nancy Pelosi, corporate PACs, and special interest donors. But sitting around doing nothing went against every instinct in my body. With zero resources or experience, I narrowly lost to my opponent, coming within just two points. After a tough race and an even tougher loss, I picked myself up and decided to try again. The Marines taught me to jump in, resolve problems, take action, and to have the courage to try. If I’ve learned anything in my 34 years on this earth, it’s that failure often teaches us more than success. So, I’m failing forward. I’m giving this race all that I’ve got. - I can guarantee you this – I will never give up on you. I will never stop fighting for what is right (not just what party-leadership says so). name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Stacey and I are protecting abortion rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek, it’s
Gretchen Whitmer.

Last month, the Supreme Court overturned Roe, putting abortion rights in
jeopardy across the country. This fight is moving to the states and we
need leaders like Stacey Abrams in office who will protect reproductive
rights.

In addition to our commitment to abortion rights, Stacey and I both got
our start working in the state legislature, we’re both in tight toss-up
races for governor, and we’re both committed to getting things done.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220716_B2_Whitmer_S1_T1_GW_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=1003%2E1862389%2E8Uh8iB ]With abortion rights, voting rights, and more on the line this
election, Stacey needs your help to defeat Brian Kemp and get to work for
Georgians. Can you donate just $5 today to make sure Stacey
wins in November?

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220716_B2_Whitmer_S1_T1_GW_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=1003%2E1862389%2E8Uh8iB ]DONATE

From day one in the Georgia House of Representatives, Stacey put the
people of Georgia first. She’ll work with anyone to get things done for
the people of her state.

This November is going to be tough, there’s no doubt about it. But I know
that Stacey won’t back down no matter what.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220716_B2_Whitmer_S1_T1_GW_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=1003%2E1862389%2E8Uh8iB ]So, Derek,
will you join Team Abrams by giving $5 or any amount today?

clean_body: [1]Stacey Abrams for Governor Derek, it’s Gretchen Whitmer. Last month, the Supreme Court overturned Roe, putting abortion rights in jeopardy across the country. This fight is moving to the states and we need leaders like Stacey Abrams in office who will protect reproductive rights. In addition to our commitment to abortion rights, Stacey and I both got our start working in the state legislature, we’re both in tight toss-up races for governor, and we’re both committed to getting things done. [ ]With abortion rights, voting rights, and more on the line this election, Stacey needs your help to defeat Brian Kemp and get to work for Georgians. Can you donate just $5 today to make sure Stacey wins in November? [ ]DONATE From day one in the Georgia House of Representatives, Stacey put the people of Georgia first. She’ll work with anyone to get things done for the people of her state. This November is going to be tough, there’s no doubt about it. But I know that Stacey won’t back down no matter what. [ ]So, Derek, will you join Team Abrams by giving $5 or any amount today? [ ]DONATE Thank you, Gretchen Whitmer [ ]Gretchen Whitmer +---------------------------------+ | PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR | +---------------------------------+ Abrams for Governor 931 Monroe Dr NE Ste A102 #363 Atlanta, GA 30308 United States Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

name: Tony B.
subject: Hey, I’m John’s Research Director
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here’s a quick look at Dr. Oz...
#
Hi Derek,
This is the first time you’re hearing from me, so let me introduce myself.
My name is Tony, and I’m the Research Director on John’s campaign for U.S. Senate.
You may be wondering, 'What exactly does a “Research Director' do on a campaign?”
**Well, a lot of my time is spent researching Dr. Oz + all his terrible politics, Derek. And let me tell you, there are a lot of terrible things you should be aware of.**
Here’s a handy research fact sheet I put together with everything you need to know about the guy we’re up against in November.
**Dr. Oz**
* Dr. Oz is a Republican multi-millionaire who kicked off his campaign with a multi-million dollar ad buy.
* Oz is a longtime resident of New Jersey — NOT of Pennsylvania.
* He’s one of Donald Trump’s favorite doctors and a former Trump administration appointee.
* He has a history of pushing deadly disinformation about COVID-19 and highlighting vaccine deniers on his TV show.
* Oz has spent the last decade profiting off of provably false medical theories and pseudoscience— including promoting harmful conversion therapy for LGBTQ+ youth.
* He has support from a super PAC run by longtime GOP operatives and during the primary spent more on TV ads than any other Senate candidate in the entire country.
* He said he would support an extreme abortion ban, with no exceptions for rape or incest.

---
Dr. Oz thinks he can buy this election, Derek. But we can’t let him get away with that.
**[If you’re ready to defeat this self-funding extremist, please consider chipping in a donation of any amount today to send John to the U.S. Senate and flip this seat blue.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220716-2?refcode=em20220716-6547&refcode2=6547_434096_jgZFJm&akid=6547%2E434096%2EjgZFJm)**
**[Chip in »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220716-2?refcode=em20220716-6547&refcode2=6547_434096_jgZFJm&akid=6547%2E434096%2EjgZFJm)**
Thank you so much for your support.
I’ll be back in touch with another research update soon.
Best,
Tony B.
Research Director
Fetterman for PA

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220716-6547-footer&t=1&refcode2=6547_434096_jgZFJm&akid=6547%2E434096%2EjgZFJm)**
---

name: Greg Stanton (iPhone)
subject: Hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
We need to hit the ground running.
Friend,

I'm reaching out to you one more time tonight because I know you care about this race, and I wanted to make sure you know why it's so important that we reach our goal tonight.

I knew from the start that this race would be tough, and it's only going to get tougher from here. With my opponents set to focus their attacks fully on me once the primary is finished in just over two weeks, it's critical that my team build up the resources we'll need to respond to that onslaught right now. We need to raise $500 more by midnight to stay on track to meet our Primary Preparation Fund goal, and you could be the one to let us make that last dash to the finish line. Can you chip in now? [**actblue.com/donate/gs-q322?refcode=Today**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bcu3g6vWUbynNfRlZRD0bBQthveaqpB1TlWD4ljd_yQ=/HUH-whBYNPq44KnodEhfP5WMnOQmLJ_2g3sZLUTO6NU=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.07.16_b2_gsi_all)

Thanks for listening,

Greg

clean_body: how are we doing? | Peter, I’m a huge proponent of constructive feedback. We have an internal feedback form that our campaign team can fill out and we discuss the submissions at our weekly meetings. So, the other day, it occurred to me that it would be super helpful to do the same with our supporters nationwide! We’ve decided to make it simple and have only 2 multiple choice questions for you. | To incentivize you to submit your responses, my team put together an exclusive offer for you: After filling out our feedback form, you will receive a 5x match on your donation to our campaign! Just like we do with our internal form, we will discuss the feedback at our next meeting (or next meetings, depending on how much feedback we get!). This is a win-win situation: YOU get to directly impact our efforts and get a 5X match on your donation, and WE get to improve our work to save America! Can’t wait to hear from you, Peter! Sincerely, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. We all know Gov. Ron DeSantis is one of the most right-wing governors in America, but he isn't just a threat to Florida; **_he's a threat to the entire country_**.

If DeSantis wins reelection and immediately pivots to running for president in 2024, he could spread his far-right agenda across the nation.

[_That's a huge reason we're so focused on defeating him — right here, right now. Donate whatever you can to help Charlie Crist win this race and topple DeSantis._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47932556/356215658/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220716_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDdiZDQwNS01YjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADax7HWvrbe_MKbpLdVVMilrWyzWRYacb5D6XhFa10M=)

We can't let DeSantis continue to hurt Floridians with his far-right policies ... **_or export them to the rest of the country._**
**THE DESANTIS AGENDA**
* Attack reproductive freedom and pass a total abortion ban
* Weaken gun safety laws and ban background checks
* Silence the LGBTQ+ community with hateful legislation like the “Don't Say Gay” law
* Suppress the vote
* Dilute the vote of minority communities through extreme gerrymandering
* Punish private companies like Disney that speak out against his politics

---
Despite his claims to the contrary, the DeSantis Agenda isn't about “freedom.” It's about building a society where you're only free if you say what he wants you to say, act like he wants you to act, and believe what he wants you to believe.

**_And that sure as hell isn't freedom._**

No wonder an autocracy expert was quoted in _POLITICO_ as saying,
**“Ron DeSantis is turning Florida into his own mini-autocracy.”**
If we can't stop him in November, Gov. DeSantis could pivot to turning **_America_** into his own mini-autocracy. What's more, he's raising gobs of cash from his far-right, billionaire donors and launching a wave of digital ads to raise his national profile.

[_The time to fight back, defeat him, and elect Charlie Crist is RIGHT NOW. We're counting on you. Please chip in $5, $12, $17, or whatever you can afford._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47932558/356215660/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220716_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDdiZDQwNS01YjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADax7HWvrbe_MKbpLdVVMilrWyzWRYacb5D6XhFa10M=)

name: Mayra Flores
subject: I’m not a taco?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mayra Flores for Congress
body:
Is this really what far-left liberals think about our Hispanic community? That we're no better than breakfast food?
**Jill Biden is unbelievable!** She said Hispanic Americans are "unique as breakfast tacos." **_I simply couldn 't believe this when I saw it. _** Is this really what far-left liberals think about our Hispanic community? That we're no better than breakfast food? **Of course, it is!** This so-called "Doctor" and the Democrats think that proud Hispanic Americans, like myself, are nothing more than useful idiots who will support their socialist agenda. Let me tell you PERSONALLY that this is NOT TRUE. Hispanic Americans are waking up to the reality that the Radical Left does not represent us or our values. The clearest evidence of this yet was when I won my Special Election last month and became the FIRST person to flip my seat RED in 100 years. name: Val Demings
subject: A moment of reflection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this evening, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and thinking about my day, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So last year, as I thought about what we’d be facing in 2022 and what our country would need to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So I decided to run. Now, I’m just a few points behind Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control.

It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to start prepping for tomorrow. Before I sign off, I’d like to ask: If you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47932918/356216758/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3766-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDdiZDQwNS01YjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SAlHuoZ5QQncgi5Qmh0zaD6L-jfsUCTAH8j1xHmzOCs=)**
All the best,

Val Demings

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. name: Jena Griswold
subject: FWD: Anderson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw my team's message from yesterday. Election denier Tina Peters isn’t our opponent, but now we’re up against the force of Super PAC-supported Pam Anderson.
She opposes automatic voter registration and refused to support legislation in 2019 to increase ballot drop boxes and voting centers.
This is unacceptable.
To protect Colorado’s elections, we need to win this race. Can you rush in a donation now to support my re-election campaign against Anderson? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg-mm?refcode=220716-email]
Thank you,
Jena Griswold
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg-mm?refcode=220716-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg-mm?refcode=220716-email]
We have some good news and some bad news.
Good news: Election deniers lost across the state of Colorado
Bad news: This race just got a lot more competitive
Chip in NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg-mm?refcode=220716-email]
Coloradans showed up in the June primary and voted against the candidate in this race who touted the Big Lie and had multiple felony charges. Democracy prevailed, and election deniers were rejected.
But now, after seeing the amount of dark money dumped in for Pam Anderson in the primary, we know we have a tough fight ahead. A GOP Super PAC spent a half million to support her, and their spending is only going to increase in the coming months.
Major Super PACs supported Anderson in the primary, and we know she’ll have support from the Republican Party. Chip in any amount you can today to strengthen our grassroots-funded campaign! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg-mm?refcode=220716-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg-mm?refcode=220716-email&amount=10&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg-mm?refcode=220716-email&amount=25&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg-mm?refcode=220716-email&amount=50&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg-mm?refcode=220716-email&amount=100&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg-mm?refcode=220716-email&amount=250&express_lane=true] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg-mm?refcode=220716-email&]
This race has officially been kicked into high gear. Now that we know who we’re up against, we have no time to waste. We must ensure that Jena is re-elected and continues fighting for Colorado’s gold standard elections.
Rush in a donation NOW to help Jena defeat Pam Anderson and continue serving the people of Colorado! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg-mm?refcode=220716-email]
– Griswold HQ
My name is Jena Griswold. In 2018, I was elected as the first democratic Secretary of State in Colorado since 1958, the first democratic woman Secretary of State in Colorado’s history, and only the 10th woman in Colorado’s history to hold the statewide constitutional office of governor, attorney general, secretary of state, or treasurer!
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg-mm?refcode=220716-email&recurring=true]
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]

Louisville, CO 80027

With voters fired up about the right-wing attacks on our democracy and reproductive rights, we have a real shot at flipping this seat blue in November. FOX is still forecasting the Republicans will take the House Majority this fall. body:
I sounded the alarm on issues with our primary. Sadly, those concerns were justified. | | |
---
| |

Friend, Weeks ago, I sounded the alarm on potential issues regarding the administration of our primary election. Now, thanks to carelessness and laziness in Pinal County’s elections department, over **60,000 Arizonans,** myself included, were given the **WRONG BALLOTS.**
---
[**Stand up for FAIR elections NOW >>**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fdba5f9bb3424e8c997b135694857c93&_e=x5U3mMvPu-J5GJXsQtde9cB9eKSXVWOe_jQWRm5_nj0pNjeQawGbNHKAvuxjssDsOJ8g1tCl1r5Da38VByruSOQbp7RoaUN7VWsJyV4j-QJTEAYHd12cgmAnmkYFaQrjMGjsmr15LwMePVOucymaxpegnTmktT0R1srvrJ_0BQqcES4CoS1Vfzrh1Ac-g3lVRWhMsOG0h6XILQCk_aHUPfDCm_hSMrinDoeecI9VXG4YfqlQo_bOT-_60OR36YrTk7ry7leHISeHEid48TMOPdlyq_IHmXm2etW-7VbTu1WGEclU9KmLFfRPK3vXyRTIb6EbjxPc4FegCrHzqfrZAYD8y1L577Y_0bHATD5SsdHsXBBw_9-9lUf4r8Dm-NSuHaU7iF2zTfOAu6uNV5PCsnxY7LMbnk_COm9_7eTbmF2-ABhhwyQnWSL7XRg4dV3wnBd014IJg33Hw5Qgl-vaRdOfcQy0pgwWyIUQG1EkI9ApzlCGxm5CXWdIV07QZLO3)
---
This isn’t just some innocent mistake. This is an issue that **WILL** impact the primary election and cause massive confusion among voters–and it could have all been avoided with better oversight. Friend, I was the **ONLY** candidate for Attorney General to raise the alarm over ballot issues here in Pinal County. I’m the **ONLY** candidate who will ensure our elections are run smoothly and fairly, and as Attorney General, [**I’ll assure that mistakes like this can’t happen again.**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fdba5f9bb3424e8c997b135694857c93&_e=x5U3mMvPu-J5GJXsQtde9cB9eKSXVWOe_jQWRm5_nj0pNjeQawGbNHKAvuxjssDsOJ8g1tCl1r5Da38VByruSOQbp7RoaUN7VWsJyV4j-QJTEAYHd12cgmAnmkYFaQrjMGjsmr15LwMePVOucymaxpegnTmktT0R1srvrJ_0BQqcES4CoS1Vfzrh1Ac-g3lVRWhMsOG0h6XILQCk_aHUPfDCm_hSMrinDoeecI9VXG4YfqlQo_bOT-_60OR36YrTk7ry7leHISeHEid48TMOPdlyq_IHmXm2etW-7VbTu1UlFP6iyrTFR3GiqEJ496_ydscbCofYyLcrrd6GiR4SeIi1a7z1X78wpqsr2WAx3KhLu3qCtXJqVyalVW8P9XiWyFneXcewVbbTZCgF6k4xk-XxrqYuTcLedC1qhT2gs4PBce3Vj0RPHrQMnatj4h7fXaEw8Eq1EQFDdgzm6F_WrkmPOrJFKuC8LJRxg5wxZaj9nWvjXQFN6RuYf2_Rp_wT) With free, fair and competent elections on the line, we cannot give even an inch. [**Can you chip in RIGHT NOW**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fdba5f9bb3424e8c997b135694857c93&_e=x5U3mMvPu-J5GJXsQtde9cB9eKSXVWOe_jQWRm5_nj0pNjeQawGbNHKAvuxjssDsOJ8g1tCl1r5Da38VByruSOQbp7RoaUN7VWsJyV4j-QJTEAYHd12cgmAnmkYFaQrjMGjsmr15LwMePVOucymaxpegnTmktT0R1srvrJ_0BQqcES4CoS1Vfzrh1Ac-g3lVRWhMsOG0h6XILQCk_aHUPfDCm_hSMrinDoeecI9VXG4YfqlQo_bOT-_60OR36YrTk7ry7leHISeHEid48TMOPdlyq_IHmXm2etW-7VbTu1UVDoc7nwlf-xxXU2DMsnBWlC5Bhnh-ibNFZk7_MmP3NHo2edhiCiscmhSwGIGz2-8YpDtRPmld5q8ceAVj8KZWuAamS4Z1ewtNrUuxYpTJ6c8UZc6Vgkjt0aej6rNVSgmcXrz-5gepkCPNAo8c1WlBzEupxbNh9vAJ1vzp3tsBEwawScdaWlAQqaYtujcOuwYc5i1tt3YNIhL5qk3aq4gb) before our **FINAL MID-MONTH PRIMARY DEADLINE****** to help me fight for our elections? clean_body: I sounded the alarm on issues with our primary. Sadly, those concerns were justified. | | | | | Friend, Weeks ago, I sounded the alarm on potential issues regarding the administration of our primary election. Now, thanks to carelessness and laziness in Pinal County’s elections department, over 60,000 Arizonans, myself included, were given the WRONG BALLOTS. This isn’t just some innocent mistake. This is an issue that WILL impact the primary election and cause massive confusion among voters–and it could have all been avoided with better oversight. Friend, I was the ONLY candidate for Attorney General to raise the alarm over ballot issues here in Pinal County. I’m the ONLY candidate who will ensure our elections are run smoothly and fairly, and as Attorney General, With free, fair and competent elections on the line, we cannot give even an inch. before our FINAL MID-MONTH PRIMARY DEADLINE** to help me fight for our elections? I won’t stop fighting for you. The mishandling of Arizona’s elections NEEDS TO END NOW.** For Arizona, Tiffany | | | | Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

clean_body: If we can’t make this ad buy by 10:45 P.M., we have no way of fighting back. | Peter – we’re up against the clock, so I’ll cut right to the chase... McConnell’s RINO Super PAC is spending MILLIONS on lying attack ads to viciously smear me with just WEEKS to go in the primary. Our only way of fighting back is to run ads of our own that EXPOSE McConnell and the swamp establishment for the feckless RINOS they are. But the final ad-buy deadline of the election is TONIGHT at 10:45 P.M. – and with just hours to go, we’re still $11,090 short for our placement. Now more than ever, I’m counting on grassroots patriots like YOU to help me meet this make-or-break deadline. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

Hello,
Well, it didn’t take long. **Less than an hour after I was declared the Democratic nominee for Senate in Iowa, the attacks from Chuck Grassley began.**
_“The most liberal nominee in Iowa Senate history”
“Radical”
“Socialist”_
Gotta love it!
Chuck Grassley doesn’t know what to say about me. He’s never faced an opponent like me before. I’m his political nightmare, so he’s just throwing cow pies at the wall and hoping something sticks.
Calling me “radical” is laughable when Chuck Grassley supports a complete ban on abortion and letting literally anyone buy an AR-15 without even a background check. **But there’s one attack that I absolutely won’t take lying down, and that’s Chuck Grassley’s attacking me for serving our country for 36 years in the U.S. Navy.**
Grassley is already trying to say that because I enlisted in the military at age 19, because my deployments meant that my family had to move from state-to-state and country-to-country... that I’m not an Iowan anymore.
Chuck Grassley wants to pretend that I wasn’t raised in rural, northwest Iowa. He ignores the enormous sacrifices that my family – my wife and my kids – made to allow me to serve in the Navy.
**Grassley’s attacks denigrate every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, spend holidays away from each other, and be absent from life’s big events like weddings and the birth of a child.**
**And if Chuck Grassley thinks that I will stand silent while he says that every Iowan who puts on our country’s uniform stops being an Iowan... he’s delusional.**
These are the kinds of attacks I’m going to be up against. Nasty stuff from Chuck Grassley, Mitch McConnell, and the Fox ‘Entertainment’ News propaganda network.
There’s one reason why: The GOP is scared. They’ve seen the polls, and they know that if we defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, Democrats are guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority.
**In order to fight back, we need to raise another $25,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, but the only way we’ll hit our goal and send Grassley packing is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
[**Please, can I count on you to give $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47933119/356217646/-42398318?refcode=em20220716pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjY4YmEzNi01ZjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lZ0vuVuWjyICmP8FIeGUszjlPPGeBysAqZGW0EOgKm8=)

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: Mitch McConnell’s eyes are on Vermont
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
This is the final sprint of this primary—help get Peter to the finish line.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=668%2E61531%2EwdkARa)
Hello,
Early voting is underway right now for the August 9th Vermont primary. That means, for the next few weeks, every day is Election Day.
[**Now is when Peter needs your support most—we’ve got to reach as many voters as we can in a short amount of time. Will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help elect Peter as the next Senator from Vermont?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3469?t=3&akid=668%2E61531%2EwdkARa)
[CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3469?t=7&t=8&akid=668%2E61531%2EwdkARa)
---
We can feel Mitch McConnell’s eyes on Vermont as he and other national Republicans do everything in their power (along with $141 million in their war chests) to win back the Senate majority.
We don’t take corporate PAC money like they do—instead, we rely on a committed coalition of folks like you who know how important this race is. With a 50-50 split in the Senate, this seat could decide the balance of power in Congress.
Peter’s to-do list when he gets to the Senate looks a lot like the policies we all believe in: paid family leave, affordable child care, climate action, lower prescription drug costs, codifying the right to abortion, strong voting rights, and so much more. **The truth is, Republicans don’t want Peter in this seat because he’s someone who gets things done.**
Let’s show Mitch McConnell and the national Republicans that this is Vermont’s seat, not theirs.
[**With voters casting ballots right now, please chip in $5 or anything you can today to help send Peter to the Senate and keep this seat blue.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3469?t=4&akid=668%2E61531%2EwdkARa)
Thanks for your support,
Team Welch

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22jul?refcode=em_20220716_f_w_earlyvote&refcode2=668_61531_wdkARa&akid=668%2E61531%2EwdkARa)

clean_body: This is the final sprint of this primary—help get Peter to the finish line. Hello, Early voting is underway right now for the August 9th Vermont primary. That means, for the next few weeks, every day is Election Day. We can feel Mitch McConnell’s eyes on Vermont as he and other national Republicans do everything in their power (along with $141 million in their war chests) to win back the Senate majority. We don’t take corporate PAC money like they do—instead, we rely on a committed coalition of folks like you who know how important this race is. With a 50-50 split in the Senate, this seat could decide the balance of power in Congress. Peter’s to-do list when he gets to the Senate looks a lot like the policies we all believe in: paid family leave, affordable child care, climate action, lower prescription drug costs, codifying the right to abortion, strong voting rights, and so much more. The truth is, Republicans don’t want Peter in this seat because he’s someone who gets things done. Let’s show Mitch McConnell and the national Republicans that this is Vermont’s seat, not theirs. Thanks for your support, Team Welch | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT Welch for Vermont P.O Box 909 Richmond, VT 05477

The Supreme Court has once again thrown our democratic ideals under the bus.

When a federal judge blocked Louisiana's manipulated congressional map back in June, it was a victory for voters, particularly for Black voters whose political power had been diminished by GOP gerrymandering.

But a few days ago, **the Supreme Court's conservative majority reinstated the Republican-drawn map**. Justices Elena Kagan, Sonia Sotomayor, and Stephen Breyer dissented.

**[We have to be prepared for potential changes in Louisiana and across the country so we can respond accordingly in the states and at the ballot box. Will you help with a donation?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47933337/356219663/1479146301?amount=20&refcode=20220716.3r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1NDNiODY3LTYzMDUtZWQxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3M9IK_HS-zPo8XedqAL7UkhL7lkUhOuAgKh9XIydH34=)**

After the conservative justices overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , A.G. Holder said:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47933338/356219664/1479146301?amount=20&refcode=20220716.3r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1NDNiODY3LTYzMDUtZWQxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3M9IK_HS-zPo8XedqAL7UkhL7lkUhOuAgKh9XIydH34=)
---
That's exactly what the NDRC is working toward this election year – helping to win races that will be critical to upholding democracy and justice.

**So today, will you recommit to the ideals this country was founded on by making a donation to help us fight for them?**

# Criminalizing Dissent
**June 17th **Disturbing evidence shows how government power is being abused under the pretext of January 6th to criminalize dissent and neutralize Democrats' political opposition. The GOP must demonstrate how the January 6th narrative, persecutions, and show trials gravely threaten the rights of all Americans. [Listen on Spotify](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bukvtd-ihhjkhtyud-j/) [Apple Podcasts](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bukvtd-ihhjkhtyud-t/)

clean_body: Your future self will thank you | Friend, I NEED your help, and I need it ASAP! The finance team just called me and told me some scary news. They are worried we could lose in Pennsylvania. My Democrat opponent John Fetterman is completely outraising me, and I am not on track to reach my monthly fundraising goal. Election day is less than 120 days away ...it’s going to be here before we know it. If John Fetterman continues to take the lead in the polls - Conservatives have no shot in November, and Pennsylvania will turn BLUE. | I encourage you to ask yourself - next year, when you are paying even MORE money at the gas station, experiencing higher inflation, crime is skyrocketing, and the American dream is fading \- Will you regret not chipping in? I need you - Pennsylvania needs you, God Bless, Dr. Mehmet Oz Dr. Mehmet Oz is a Trump-endorsed, America First Conservative running for U.S. Senate to reignite our divine spark, fight for freedom and return the power to you. to ensure that he has the support he needs to become Pennsylvania’s next Senator. Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate If you would like to donate by mail, Our mailing address is: Doctor Oz For Senate PO Box 576 Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006

** _A Note From Nikki:_** Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | The Supreme Court OVERTURNED Roe v. Wade according to leaked documents. And now red states are OUTLAWING abortion rights. We need you in this fight, \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? subject: I hope I have made you proud

body:
I’ll be honest, I never thought this is how it would go.
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220716-Kelly-CampaignTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220716-Kelly-CampaignTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=4901%2E9716520%2EatdRBf)

_Your contribution will be split between Mark Kelly for Senate and the DSCC to keep Arizona and the Senate blue._
Friends —

I’ll be honest with you:

When Gabby and I got married, I never thought this is the way things would turn out.

I never thought I’d run for public office. She was the elected official in the family — and on the International Space Station, I was about as far from Congress as you can get.

I never thought more than 1 million people would contribute and volunteer to help elect me.

And I never thought that I’d need to ask you to do more than that to defend this seat.

But I do need to ask you to do more. We are facing millions of dollars in attack ads, Trump says beating me is the first step to "taking America back," and we’ve missed a few fundraising goals in a row already this year.

So please. You may not have woken up this morning thinking you’d make a donation to my re-election and the DSCC, but **I really need you if we’re going to hold Arizona’s seat and our Senate majority against the National Republican groups coming to take them.**

**[Can you PLEASE split a $5 contribution between my campaign and the DSCC, before tonight’s critical fundraising deadline ends at midnight tonight?](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220716-Kelly-CampaignTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220716-Kelly-CampaignTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=4901%2E9716520%2EatdRBf)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Mark Kelly and the DSCC.

Former U.S. Navy combat pilot, engineer, and NASA astronaut Mark Kelly is running for re-election in Arizona. He's fighting to lower costs for Arizonans, cut taxes for hardworking families, and create good-paying jobs.
[**Will you help Mark Kelly and the DSCC fight back against National Republicans and hold the Senate?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220716-Kelly-CampaignTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220716-Kelly-CampaignTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=4901%2E9716520%2EatdRBf)

clean_body: I’ll be honest, I never thought this is how it would go. | | | | | Your contribution will be split between Mark Kelly for Senate and the DSCC to keep Arizona and the Senate blue. Friends — I’ll be honest with you: When Gabby and I got married, I never thought this is the way things would turn out. I never thought I’d run for public office. She was the elected official in the family — and on the International Space Station, I was about as far from Congress as you can get. I never thought more than 1 million people would contribute and volunteer to help elect me. And I never thought that I’d need to ask you to do more than that to defend this seat. But I do need to ask you to do more. We are facing millions of dollars in attack ads, Trump says beating me is the first step to "taking America back," and we’ve missed a few fundraising goals in a row already this year. So please. You may not have woken up this morning thinking you’d make a donation to my re-election and the DSCC, but I really need you if we’re going to hold Arizona’s seat and our Senate majority against the National Republican groups coming to take them. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Mark Kelly and the DSCC. | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in. It all adds up when we all do our part. Mark Kelly U.S. Senator, Arizona Former U.S. Navy combat pilot, engineer, and NASA astronaut Mark Kelly is running for re-election in Arizona.
