[During his closing statement to the January 6th committee, Rep. Adam Schiff made it clear just how fragile our democracy can be.

**He said: “ That we have enjoyed a democracy for more than 200 years does not mean we will tomorrow. All of us _must play a part in its preservation_.”**

Rep. Schiff couldn't be more right. With 361 bills in 47 states aimed at restricting voting rights since the start of 2022 alone, we're seeing the decimation of democracy all over the country. There's a widening gulf between the agenda of a GOP-led government and the will of the voters — a dynamic that is a death knell for any democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47933745/356241243/-1272162360?amount=15&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=20220716_em_f_7BM_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGI0YWMzNC02YzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5U9t30rjj3nkkGysBr2iCDI7bGPAVgYwyLJqpNcIOw=)

#

Friends —
Here are FIVE reasons you should chip in $5 to help Mark Kelly win re-election before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight. Check it out:
1. In 2020, Mark won by 2.4% of the vote.
2. Polls show Mark is down by as much as TWO POINTS in Arizona.
3. Donald Trump just endorsed one of Mark’s opponents, MAGA-extremist Blake Masters.
4. Blake Masters supports a national abortion ban that would criminalize abortion entirely in this country and imprison abortion providers.
5. Donating $5 is the most impactful thing you can do today to help Mark win re-election, defeat Trump and Masters, and prevent a Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.

These are 5 good reasons to chip in $5 today before our mid-month fundraising deadline to make sure Mark has the resources he needs to win re-election.
But now, it’s up to you. All we can do is ask:

And it’s getting worse. But I think we can all agree on one thing - we need to start getting our nation back on track. Keep in touch, JD Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Vance Victory, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and comprised of JD Vance for Senate Inc., Working for Ohio and Ohio Republican Party. name: Bella
subject: asking for a huge favor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17060?t=1009&amount=49&akid=4613%2E3611125%2EhRpRWx ]Bella gif

Hi There, it’s Bella!

As I’m sure you’ve heard by now, today is Tim’s birthday. But since I’m
already off at college, it’s been a little harder for me to surprise him
this year.

But I still know just the thing to get him—and I need your help to pull it
off.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17060?t=1010&amount=25&akid=4613%2E3611125%2EhRpRWx ]I’m hoping I can raise $4,900 for Tim’s 49th birthday (pls don’t tell
him I told you he was turning 49 😂) before midnight tonight. So, would you
do me a HUGE favor and donate $5, $10 or even $49 to support his Senate
campaign and surprise Tim for his birthday?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17060?t=1011&amount=25&akid=4613%2E3611125%2EhRpRWx ]Donate Now

Even being away at college, I can tell Tim is a tad stressed about his
Senate race. He’s been pretty worried about his opponent having “all the
money in the world,” and the fact that there’s this Silicon Valley
billionaire who is doing everything he can to stop Tim from winning.

We all know money isn’t everything—especially not to Tim. But I know it’d
be a big help if we could just help him get on a level playing field with
his millionaire opponent.

That’s why I’ve decided to help Tim raise some more money for his Senate
campaign. And why I need your help to hit my $4,900 birthday surprise
before midnight tonight!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17060?t=1012&amount=25&akid=4613%2E3611125%2EhRpRWx ]So, if you can, would you donate any amount to support Tim’s campaign
and help me give him this special birthday surprise? It’d really mean a
lot to me—and to Tim.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17060?t=1013&amount=25&akid=4613%2E3611125%2EhRpRWx ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17060?t=1014&amount=50&akid=4613%2E3611125%2EhRpRWx ]Donate $50

Thanks!

—Bella

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans are running Jan 6th insurrectionists for Secretary of State races. Stand with the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State to make sure those offices are filled by candidates who care about election integrity.
body:
Insurrectionists shouldn’t run state elections
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, your state’s Secretary of State is the first line of defense when it comes to election integrity. Especially this year, because ... **Insurrectionists are still agitating to steal our elections, and some of them are campaigning to be Secretaries of State.** **[Will you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, so we can ensure that in 2024 we have someone setting up the electoral process and counting votes in each key state who believes in democracy?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T956ebaab-d41a-4e27-876b-9c02fe922188/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** During the shocking Jan. 6th hearings, we found that Donald Trump, Mark Meadows, Ted Cruz, Josh Hawley and dozens of House members, state legislators, governors and other officials **told the deadly lie ****that Donald Trump won the election enough times that it inspired people to commit acts of vandalism, violence and treason.** Two of these individuals, de-programmed, as if from a cult, talked about why they attacked the Capitol on January 6th, 2020, why they were there, what they believed, and what they intended to do. And it all came down to one very simple fact: If they had not been lied to by Republicans day in and day out--the very Republicans who are still inciting riot every day by lying about this election--then January 6th would not have happened. A dozen or so House members were revealed to have met with Donald Trump to plan the coup, likely leading to criminal liability for them. Yet, some of them and various other **_GOP officials are now running for positions where they will have control of state election machinery. _**For example, one of these coup plotters, Jody Hice of Georgia, was running for Secretary of State (SoS) in a primary vs Republican Brad Raffensberger, who stood up to Trump's calls for stealing votes.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: DEMOCRATIC ASSOCIATION OF SECRETARIES OF STATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98984d5e-7e2f-4e46-84eb-c9b26ff7c2c6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Luckily, Hice lost in the primary. But we weren't so lucky in other states. Some primaries have not yet taken place, and in some states, Republicans who claim Trump won the 2020 election are their party's nominee. **_We must defeat these democracy arsonists if we are to keep our democratic republic._** **_The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State helps elect Democrats Secretary of State in all states where this is an electoral position._** **_We absolutely must help them if we're to prevent Republicans who perverted our electoral process in 2020--but failed to overthrow our government--from succeeding when they inevitably try the same exact thing in 2024._** If we let these fascistic Republican lunatics win this important position in key states, we're as good as done. **[Will you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, so we can ensure that in 2024 we have someone setting up the electoral process and counting votes in each key state who believes in democracy?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T343fa534-9de7-4584-b994-877887c421cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thank you so much for protecting our elections. Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: HELP THE DASS PROTECT OUR ELECTIONS!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0901a78d-a476-4227-b651-61989cccfb2c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---

subject: Help me catch up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
With my primary being only THREE weeks away, the media attacks are heating up. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/help-me-catch-up?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e54d417cb6&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

With my primary being only _THREE_ weeks away, the media attacks are**heating up**.

**These next few weeks are going to be the difference between a successful victory for America First Republicans nationwide... _or a victory for the Democrat establishment_.**

_I am reaching out to you to ask for your hand in the fight._

My Democrat opponents have **_FLOODED_** my district with millions of dollars from Hollywood liberals, woke corporate Democrats, and progressive super PACS.

**Unlike the Leftists in my race who will take any money they can get their grubby hands on, I am relying on the support of hardworking, patriotice, grassroots Americans.**

**I do not owe anything to the massive super PACs or billion-dollar donors because I am running for reelection to TRULY fight for the American people.**

I know what our country needs right now. We are at a crossroads. The fight is between good and evil.

**_Americans can either step up and FIGHT BACK against the Democrat regime and regain a strong Republican majority this midterm, or we will face TWO more years of unchecked Biden tyranny._**

[**Join my campaign for truth by donating to my reelection fund. I**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=2a691f8335&e=645b3b1338)[** _need_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=d980703482&e=645b3b1338)[**all hands on deck so I can maximize my outreach over these next few weeks.**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=16198cacbf&e=645b3b1338)

My opponents may have the millionaire and billionaire donors, but I am relying on you.
[**JOIN THE FIGHT**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=2869cb095f&e=645b3b1338)
[**CHIP IN $200**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=8487ca8b90&e=645b3b1338)
[**CHIP IN $150**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=236cb7a637&e=645b3b1338)
[**CHIP IN $100**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e10e317ab5&e=645b3b1338)
[**CHIP IN $50**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b806a52a27&e=645b3b1338)
[**CHIP IN $25**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=701a306449&e=645b3b1338)
No matter what happens before my election, I am going to fight until the minute the polls close. **_My America First, pro-Trump, pro-God agenda NEEDS to be spread as much as possible._**

[**Rush a last minute donation of $5, $15, $25 or even $50 today to help my communications team spread advertisements about my campaign across my district before it’s too late**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=373821dbf0&e=645b3b1338)!

Thank you for your support.

God Bless,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=d75e4bdb32&e=645b3b1338) Paul Gosar, D.D.S. Currently Serving Arizona’s 4th CD
Candidate for Arizona’s 9th CD _**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=cfa1918530&e=645b3b1338)**_

P.S.: My opponents in the upcoming election are relying on mega donors and super PACs to fund their campaigns. I am relying on the hardworking Americans that make this country so great. [**Help me fend off the Democrat millionaire money by rushing a donation to my campaign today.**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=512dbe93b0&e=645b3b1338)Thank you in advance for your generosity.

They’re moments where our country chooses:

**_Are we going to give in to those who want more government?_**

**Right now, we’re facing one of those moments. **

Control of the Senate is up for grabs, and whether or not Republicans win will determine the America we live in for _generations._

Friend,

We already knew that Kari Lake (R) – our extremist opponent – was supported by far-right extremists and white nationalists who are dumping MILLIONS into our state to help her win this race.

**Now she's on the air with new TV ads trumpeting her support from the most notorious far-right extremist in the country: Donald Trump.**

But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, = Thank you so much. – Marco Lopez | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | © 2022 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
